name: Josh Harder
subject: I’m thinking about my brother
body:
Heartbreaking, despicable, and cruel.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823867/555449514/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY5YjYwMWItNmI1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hQIyum6BI5j358l4Muehy3W8RKfZ5o9gdhNPG9zW-Yc=) | Peter, Today is a sad day. Republicans voted to pass Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” to cut health care for millions of Americans. I voted no, but Democrats simply didn’t have enough votes to stop it. I’ve been trying to wrap my head around this bill, and the main thing that keeps coming up is the cruelty within it. Taking healthcare away from poor people in order to give massive tax breaks to the richest 1%? There’s no other word for it. In moments like this, I think about my brother, David. He was born with a pre-existing condition, and our family wouldn’t have been able to afford his care if we didn’t have my dad’s health insurance. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823868/555449522/-1149165536?&refcode=E14043-20250703-BudgetVote-Image-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY5YjYwMWItNmI1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hQIyum6BI5j358l4Muehy3W8RKfZ5o9gdhNPG9zW-Yc=)** I ran for Congress for David, and for the tens of thousands of families in my community who were going to lose health care. **In 2017, the last time Trump tried to rip health care away from millions of people, we were able to stop him, thanks to Senator McCain’s infamous thumbs down vote. I’m devastated that this time none of my Republican colleagues had the same courage. Instead, JD Vance smiled as he cast the deciding vote.** This is why elections matter. And it’s why Democrats need to stop playing nice and need to ACTUALLY HOLD REPUBLICANS ACCOUNTABLE. Every single voter needs to know who cut their health insurance. With your help, I plan to make sure everyone in my district knows what happened today and who caused it. — Josh [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823869/555449529/-1149165536?&refcode=E14043-20250703-BudgetVote-SB-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY5YjYwMWItNmI1OC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hQIyum6BI5j358l4Muehy3W8RKfZ5o9gdhNPG9zW-Yc=)

body:
This is a longer email about the Big Bad Bill.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823892/555449893/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.03_BigBadBill_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJiODQ2My02YjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04s_V-G6kEYktsY2kK-AO23GRaAuHf6DhGl6tvXn8a4=&emci=7dd3b1e2-5858-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bbbb8463-6b58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) | Peter — I recorded a message for you right after today’s critical budget vote. [_**If you have Instagram, please take a second to watch and share:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823893/555449894/-1001087726?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.03_BigBadBill_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJiODQ2My02YjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04s_V-G6kEYktsY2kK-AO23GRaAuHf6DhGl6tvXn8a4=&emci=7dd3b1e2-5858-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bbbb8463-6b58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823894/555449895/-1001087726?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.03_BigBadBill_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJiODQ2My02YjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04s_V-G6kEYktsY2kK-AO23GRaAuHf6DhGl6tvXn8a4=&emci=7dd3b1e2-5858-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bbbb8463-6b58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) Here’s what’s weighing on me after today’s vote: For the last 30 hours, I’ve joined my fellow Democrats to fight against the Big Bad Bill, the Big Sh**y Bill, the Big Betrayal — whatever you prefer to call the destructive Republican budget. **Trump calls it “beautiful.” But there’s no beauty in this bill. It’s the largest cut to healthcare and the largest transfer of wealth from working people to the wealthiest 1% in American history.** We used every procedural tactic available to us. We offered dozens of amendments. We read your stories on the House floor. Leader Jeffries spoke for more than eight hours — the longest floor speech ever — to delay the final vote. And thousands of working Americans called Congress to speak out against this bill. Many Republicans also spoke out against this bill — and we needed four of them to show John McCain-like bravery, cross party lines, and defeat this budget. In the final vote, the bill passed 218-214, with only two Republicans crossing party lines. Here’s the harsh truth: No matter how long we speak, how many stories we tell, or how much data we share, these bills pass or fail by the number of votes on this floor. **That’s why I’ve “adopted” a swing district, Arizona’s 6th, so that we can replace MAGA footsoldier Juan Ciscomani with mom, veteran, and community leader JoAnna Mendoza.** Rep. Ciscomani was one of the Republicans who vocally opposed the Big Bad Bill — but caved as soon as Trump and GOP leadership applied a little pressure. We must make sure his constituents know that he just sold them out. If you’re able, I’m asking for two things: [_**Please split a donation between JoAnna Mendoza and our own organizing efforts**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823895/555449896/-634445530?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.03_BigBadBill_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJiODQ2My02YjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04s_V-G6kEYktsY2kK-AO23GRaAuHf6DhGl6tvXn8a4=) to take back the House and undo the damage of the Trump agenda. [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823896/555449897/-634445530?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.03_BigBadBill_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJiODQ2My02YjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04s_V-G6kEYktsY2kK-AO23GRaAuHf6DhGl6tvXn8a4=) If you can’t donate today or want to help another way, [_**sign up to join our volunteer team**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823897/555449898/1260324048?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.03_BigBadBill_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJiODQ2My02YjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04s_V-G6kEYktsY2kK-AO23GRaAuHf6DhGl6tvXn8a4=&emci=7dd3b1e2-5858-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bbbb8463-6b58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442). We’ll have opportunities soon to help win races in Washington, Arizona, and across the country. [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823898/555449899/1475719955?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.07.03_BigBadBill_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJiODQ2My02YjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04s_V-G6kEYktsY2kK-AO23GRaAuHf6DhGl6tvXn8a4=&emci=7dd3b1e2-5858-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bbbb8463-6b58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) I'm tired, sad, and heartbroken today. The Big Bad Bill will endanger our neighbors, close hospitals, and make the world worse than it was yesterday. But I am proud to be a member of this Democratic caucus that stands for the American people and not for billionaire mega-donors. We're going to keep fighting. Please know that we are going to keep fighting for you, that we are going to use every tool that we have to make this right. Thank you for reading this longer message, and thank you for everything you do. — Emily

In the final vote, the bill passed 218-214, with only two Republicans crossing party lines. Here’s the harsh truth: No matter how long we speak, how many stories we tell, or how much data we share, these bills pass or fail by the number of votes on this floor. That’s why I’ve “adopted” a swing district, Arizona’s 6th, so that we can replace MAGA footsoldier Juan Ciscomani with mom, veteran, and community leader JoAnna Mendoza.** Rep. Ciscomani was one of the Republicans who vocally opposed the Big Bad Bill — but caved as soon as Trump and GOP leadership applied a little pressure. We must make sure his constituents know that he just sold them out. If you’re able, I’m asking for two things: = to take back the House and undo the damage of the Trump agenda. = If you can’t donate today or want to help another way, . We’ll have opportunities soon to help win races in Washington, Arizona, and across the country. I'm tired, sad, and heartbroken today. The Big Bad Bill will endanger our neighbors, close hospitals, and make the world worse than it was yesterday. But I am proud to be a member of this Democratic caucus that stands for the American people and not for billionaire mega-donors. We're going to keep fighting. Please know that we are going to keep fighting for you, that we are going to use every tool that we have to make this right. Thank you for reading this longer message, and thank you for everything you do. — Emily = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Tim Walz
subject: They call it "beautiful." I call it cruel.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
The House just passed what they’re calling the “Big Beautiful Bill.” But here’s the truth: it’s the biggest attack on health care and food assistance this country has ever seen.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823978/555455395/623376497?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmYzOWExZi02ZDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y88UCVyGZ7UYutHzCbfW0aY9xmwcuq2k-MSBceGZIxc=)
---
Peter,
The House just passed what they’re calling the “Big Beautiful Bill.” But here’s the truth: **it’s the biggest attack on health care and food assistance this country has ever seen.**
Seventeen million Americans — including kids and seniors — could lose access to the care they count on. Millions more will see their SNAP benefits gutted, making it harder to put food on the table.
And almost every single Republican voted for it.
It’s not just numbers on a page. This means higher energy costs, longer waits for ambulances, rural hospitals shutting down — and families right here in Minnesota struggling to get by. And then Trump has the nerve to call it “beautiful.”
I won’t stand by while they take health care and meals away from our neighbors just to give more tax breaks to billionaires. I’m fighting to protect health care and nutrition for every Minnesotan — but I can’t do it alone.
[**If you’re able, can you chip in today to help us stop these cruel cuts to health care and SNAP, protect our neighbors, and show that in Minnesota, we take care of each other? Let’s stand up together and make sure they answer for every vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110823979/555455400/-526377996?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmYzOWExZi02ZDU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y88UCVyGZ7UYutHzCbfW0aY9xmwcuq2k-MSBceGZIxc=)

clean_body: The House just passed what they’re calling the “Big Beautiful Bill.” But here’s the truth: it’s the biggest attack on health care and food assistance this country has ever seen. | = Peter, The House just passed what they’re calling the “Big Beautiful Bill.” But here’s the truth: it’s the biggest attack on health care and food assistance this country has ever seen. Seventeen million Americans — including kids and seniors — could lose access to the care they count on. Millions more will see their SNAP benefits gutted, making it harder to put food on the table. And almost every single Republican voted for it. It’s not just numbers on a page. This means higher energy costs, longer waits for ambulances, rural hospitals shutting down — and families right here in Minnesota struggling to get by. And then Trump has the nerve to call it “beautiful.” I won’t stand by while they take health care and meals away from our neighbors just to give more tax breaks to billionaires. I’m fighting to protect health care and nutrition for every Minnesotan — but I can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I'm grateful, Tim Walz ********=******

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: BREAKING: The House passed Trump’s bill
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250703-1413-foote&t=1001&akid=1413%2E342411%2EzWQXXV ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The worst has happened: The House just passed the so-called “One Big
Beautiful Bill” and it’s on its way to Trump’s desk.

Let’s call it what it is:

A gift to Trump’s wealthy donors. A slap in the face to working families.
And a dangerous escalation in the GOP’s attacks on healthcare, economic
justice, and climate action.

The newest version of the bill includes: Slashes to Medicaid where over 17
million could lose care, massive tax cuts for the ultra-rich, SNAP
benefits gutted, green energy programs dismantled killing thousands of
union jobs, defunding public schools, and that’s just the start.

This bill isn’t just cruel — it’s calculated. Trump and his MAGA allies
want us to give up. They want us silent, divided, and defeated.

We’re not backing down,
Peter.

We’re building a movement to hold the line, speak truth to power, and
elect progressives who will fight back — but we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250703-movement.P_GZn5&refcode=em20250703-1413&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1413%2E342411%2EzWQXXV ]Can you rush a $3 donation right now to help defeat

subject: Only 14% (!!!!!!) of Maine voters currently view GOP Senator Susan Collins favorably

body:
This is our chance to flip Maine’s Senate seat and restore our Democratic majority... and we’re counting on your help to do it, Peter.
#

**NEW:** Favorability rating of Maine’s GOP U.S. Senator Susan Collins **57% Unfavorable**
**14% Favorable**
---
Here’s the deal, Peter: _We MUST flip Maine’s U.S. Senate seat if we want to restore our Democratic Senate majority next year —**and this new polling proves that momentum is on our side.**_
According to the University of New Hampshire, the favorability of Maine’s incumbent GOP Senator Susan Collins is CRASHING.
**_Only 14% of Maine voters currently view Susan Collins favorably._**
Our path to flipping the Senate does not exist without defeating Susan Collins. And now, we know that we have a real chance to do it.
**But we need your help to reach voters across Maine with the truth about Senator Collins’ record every day between now and November of next year.** Online, on TV, on the radio — we need to get our message out early + often.

name: Mohan Seshadri, API PA
subject: We Deserve Better.
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Hi Peter,
Asian American families know all too well what it means to be scapegoated and targeted. We have felt it in our schools, our workplaces, and our neighborhoods. We have had to fight - generation after generation - for our rights, our recognition, and our place in this country.
That’s why we’re devastated about the bill that was just passed by House and Senate Republicans. This bill is a direct attack on our communities’ dignity, safety, and future. Republicans voted to funnel billions into detention and deportation forces while stripping legal protections from immigrants. And it doesn’t stop there. They slashed funding for healthcare, food security, affordable housing, education, and the basic services our families rely on.
The message is loud and clear: the Trump administration wants to exclude us. They want to rip apart our communities and destroy us. They are more interested in punishment and division than in solving the very real affordability crisis facing all working families.
We reject their vision - and we are not backing down. We fought the bill tooth and nail across the state. And now that Republicans have passed this bill, we will keep fighting. We will fight in every arena available to us: through legislation, in the courts, and in the streets. We are fighting for an America that keeps its promises. One where every member of our community, no matter when or how their family came to this country, is safe, healthy and strong.
You are an important part of this fight and we need your voice right now. Call your member of Congress [https://www.house.gov/representatives/find-your-representative] right now. If they voted to protect our communities, thank them for their work. If they voted to rip apart immigrant families while also taking away the services families across the country need to survive and thrive - let them know that you're watching and you won't forget what they did to us.
How Pennsylvania Representatives Voted:
Voted to Protect Our Communities: Voted to Attack Our Communities:
* Sen. John Fetterman * Sen. Dave McCormick
* Rep. Robert Bresnahan

* Rep. Summer Lee
* Rep. Brendan Boyle * Rep. Scott Perry
* Rep. Madeline Dean * Rep. John Joyce
* Rep. Chris Deluzio * Rep. Mike Kelly
* Rep. Dwight Evans * Rep. Ryan Mackenzie
* Rep. Chrissy Houlahan * Rep. Daniel Meuser
* Rep. Mary Gay Scanlon
* Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick
* Rep. Guy Reschenthaler
* Rep. Lloyd Smucker
* Rep. Glenn Thompson
These calls are just the beginning. Join a local rally this Monday to show our strength and demand a better future. [https://www.mobilize.us/seiu-pa-statecouncil/event/810584/] Let’s make it clear: This is our country too and we’re not going anywhere.
Long-term, we need voters to know how their elected officials stood in advance of 2026. Donate so that we can make sure everyone knows who we can trust to fight for safety, dignity, and affordability for our communities [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=20.00&contactdata=kM6Rk3QrwuP0orWDzY8D5LdZ2cSkCvyrnd+Ol7oyf+gv/9bM89dkcuYLOmw4SHB4JA4aoWlWyGuwuXCtry6YK7tw7AkI5XWMuSGYSb/oUPaBkgpfgyToc5U6gGPEbndzr2gYskPpEfWT2hjnk0UeqA6RYNpJ2zTw3TV2e8dXUCU=]
Donate [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=20.00&contactdata=kM6Rk3QrwuP0orWDzY8D5LdZ2cSkCvyrnd+Ol7oyf+gv/9bM89dkcuYLOmw4SHB4JA4aoWlWyGuwuXCtry6YK7tw7AkI5XWMuSGYSb/oUPaBkgpfgyToc5U6gGPEbndzr2gYskPpEfWT2hjnk0UeqA6RYNpJ2zTw3TV2e8dXUCU=]
In solidarity,
Mohan Seshadri
Executive Director
Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance (API PA)

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Asian American families know all too well what it means to be scapegoated and targeted. We have felt it in our schools, our workplaces, and our neighborhoods. We have had to fight - generation after generation - for our rights, our recognition, and our place in this country. That’s why we’re devastated about the bill that was just passed by House and Senate Republicans. This bill is a direct attack on our communities’ dignity, safety, and future. Republicans voted to funnel billions into detention and deportation forces while stripping legal protections from immigrants. And it doesn’t stop there. They slashed funding for healthcare, food security, affordable housing, education, and the basic services our families rely on. The message is loud and clear: the Trump administration wants to exclude us. They want to rip apart our communities and destroy us. They are more interested in punishment and division than in solving the very real affordability crisis facing all working families. We reject their vision - and we are not backing down. We fought the bill tooth and nail across the state. And now that Republicans have passed this bill, we will keep fighting. We will fight in every arena available to us: through legislation, in the courts, and in the streets. We are fighting for an America that keeps its promises. One where every member of our community, no matter when or how their family came to this country, is safe, healthy and strong. You are an important part of this fight and we need your voice right now. Call your member of Congress [] right now. If they voted to protect our communities, thank them for their work. If they voted to rip apart immigrant families while also taking away the services families across the country need to survive and thrive - let them know that you're watching and you won't forget what they did to us. How Pennsylvania Representatives Voted: Voted to Protect Our Communities: Voted to Attack Our Communities: Sen. John Fetterman Sen. Dave McCormick Rep. Robert Bresnahan Rep. Summer Lee Rep. Brendan Boyle Rep. Scott Perry Rep. Madeline Dean Rep. John Joyce Rep. Chris Deluzio Rep. Mike Kelly Rep. Dwight Evans Rep. Ryan Mackenzie Rep. Chrissy Houlahan Rep. Daniel Meuser Rep. Mary Gay Scanlon Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick Rep. Guy Reschenthaler Rep. Lloyd Smucker * Rep. Glenn Thompson These calls are just the beginning. Join a local rally this Monday to show our strength and demand a better future. [] Let’s make it clear: This is our country too and we’re not going anywhere. Long-term, we need voters to know how their elected officials stood in advance of 2026. Donate so that we can make sure everyone knows who we can trust to fight for safety, dignity, and affordability for our communities [=] Donate [=] In solidarity, Mohan Seshadri Executive Director Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance (API PA) [] [] [] [] [] API PA PO Box 22611 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Zoe Lofgren always puts the American people first.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Dear Peter –

Donald Trump’s second presidency has been nothing short of chaotic and downright disgraceful to the American people.

My friend, Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren, is continuing to fight back for our democracy and the Constitution – something Donald Trump knows nothing about.

That’s why Trump-loyalists like Roger Stone have been making false attacks on Zoe’s character, name, and record to try to tarnish her reputation.

So now more than ever, we need to have Zoe’s back as she continues standing up to Trump and fighting for everyday Americans, while Trump only puts the interest of himself and his friends first.
Peter , will you join me in supporting Zoe in her ongoing fight against Trump and to protect our democracy?

Donate Now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-03_ADK_ZOL_ES-27001_RS&amount=25]

If we want to save our democracy from Trump 2.0, we must continue to support and elect leaders like Zoe and others like her across the country.

I refuse to be part of the generation that lets democracy die under our watch, Peter.

Zoe has always fought to protect our democracy, something that is more at risk than ever these days. So please join me in supporting Zoe today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-03_ADK_ZOL_ES-27001_RS&amount=25]

## Fireside Chat: Wake Up The Sleeping American Revolution!!
#### Join Bill Ferguson and Cliff Kiracofe at 9pm EST Tonight!
---
[ ](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=gFB7Tylx1fPa2jOHrKCBPkH39pY_DR3EtDNLCLVf_9ATRIrG_A7_JcbD_lomTr4VhwFVDgdGAS-9t6Fn9s9x25QFsGCi3ITks0bcGgCm2Qk&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thursday_call_07_03&n=2)

| [](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=1yI5FFrJJjILKygrTDlNJTqg44MwtKMuZB7Fq023O6eRjPB9G9iOop4Bs464F1zl&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thursday_call_07_03&n=3 "Join on ZOOM") [Join on ZOOM](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=1yI5FFrJJjILKygrTDlNJTqg44MwtKMuZB7Fq023O6eRjPB9G9iOop4Bs464F1zl&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thursday_call_07_03&n=3)
---
**Dial in by Phone one-tap:
+13092053325,,83226412240# US
+13126266799,,83226412240# US (Chicago)
Webinar ID: 832 2641 2240**
---
Friend,
---
It’s one thing to admiringly speak of the principles upon which the United States of America was founded, July 1-4, 1775, 249 years ago. It’s another to act, right now, in the present, in the name and spirit of those principles of the American Revolution, and take back our government from the War Party. Today, Americans need to have an honest conversation about why we have shrunk, and why we are allowing the Democratic-Republican War Party to take the world to the brink of extinction. As economist and statesman Lyndon LaRouche said in “The Dialogue of Eurasian Civilizations: Earth’s Next Fifty Years:”Specifically, to conduct a dialogue of cultures, we would be fools to rely upon agreements reached on the dictionary meaning of a grammarian‘s dead words. We require a living subject, not the dead word upon which anyone might freely impose an arbitrary meaning of their own design.... “ Perpetual war, leading to thermonuclear war, is against the General Welfare. It is against the self-interest of the greatest number of people on the planet. The prosecution of war by the Anglo-American War Party, in Iran, Ukraine, and soon with China, is a clear violation of the “self-evident truths” of Life, Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness that our founders not only intended, but declared. The same imperial institutions that were being fought against 249 years ago, must be defeated here and now. As LaRouche also stated, “ We need government which wins popular support for even extensive and sudden reforms through those methods of constructive Socratic dialogue, which were used to win popular support for the adoption of the original US Federal Constitution. “ Our distribution of the leaflet “Will there Be Thermonuclear Fireworks For the Fourth of July?”is the springboard for that self-government through Socratic dialogue that founded this country, and must now re-dedicate it to the cause for which it was created, before it is too late. Join us tonight to discuss how “we, the people” can intervene this July 4 and immediately after to return, first to the principles, and then, the mission of 1776. Speakers: Bill Ferguson, Cliff Kiracofe
---

It’s another to act, right now, in the present, in the name and spirit of those principles of the American Revolution, and take back our government from the War Party. Today, Americans need to have an honest conversation about why we have shrunk, and why we are allowing the Democratic-Republican War Party to take the world to the brink of extinction. As economist and statesman Lyndon LaRouche said in “The Dialogue of Eurasian Civilizations: Earth’s Next Fifty Years:”Specifically, to conduct a dialogue of cultures, we would be fools to rely upon agreements reached on the dictionary meaning of a grammarian‘s dead words. We require a living subject, not the dead word upon which anyone might freely impose an arbitrary meaning of their own design.... “ Perpetual war, leading to thermonuclear war, is against the General Welfare. It is against the self-interest of the greatest number of people on the planet. The prosecution of war by the Anglo-American War Party, in Iran, Ukraine, and soon with China, is a clear violation of the “self-evident truths” of Life, Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness that our founders not only intended, but declared. The same imperial institutions that were being fought against 249 years ago, must be defeated here and now. As LaRouche also stated, “ We need government which wins popular support for even extensive and sudden reforms through those methods of constructive Socratic dialogue, which were used to win popular support for the adoption of the original US Federal Constitution. “ Our distribution of the leaflet “Will there Be Thermonuclear Fireworks For the Fourth of July?”is the springboard for that self-government through Socratic dialogue that founded this country, and must now re-dedicate it to the cause for which it was created, before it is too late. Join us tonight to discuss how “we, the people” can intervene this July 4 and immediately after to return, first to the principles, and then, the mission of 1776. Speakers: Bill Ferguson, Cliff Kiracofe | | Have fun causing good trouble. We look forward to having you on tonight. Hop on Zoom or Rumble live at 9pm ET: | "Listen on Rumble" ****or by Zoom/phone "Join on Zoom" The LaRouche Organization Please subscribe to the LaRouche Organization, , , and . | "DONATE" | | | ---|---|--- The LaRouche Organization · 2 University Plaza Dr, Suite 100, Hackensack, NJ 07601, United States

body:

Good Evening,

I’m writing to share that **Katherine Jeanes has stepped down from their role as the Young Democrats of America’s representative to the Democratic National Committee, effective June 30, 2025**.

Katherine made this decision to pursue a new opportunity to continue their advocacy for young people within the DNC by running for an at-large appointment via the Youth Council. We are grateful for their service and the example they set for future youth leaders.

To ensure that YDA retains its full voting rights in the upcoming DNC Council and Caucus elections, which commence next week, **I have****appointed YDA General Counsel, Mohammed Tazbir Alam,****to s****erve for the remaining 19 days of the term**. This appointment is made under the authority granted to me by the YDA Charter (Article XI, Section 7) and in recognition of the critical July 1 deadline for DNC members to be seated and participate in these elections, as without swift action, YDA risked losing its voice in this pivotal election.****

Tazbir provided the following statement on July 1:

“ _**As of last night, I was appointed to serve the remaining few weeks of a term as an officer of the Young Democrats of America to the DNC. Aside from the incredibly short amount of time I will serve in this role, it is an honor for me to once again represent the voices of young Democrats across the country.

I’ve had the privilege of serving this great organization in various roles—from Vice President, to Treasurer, to General Counsel—and as I head to my last convention this month as a Young Democrat, I get to serve as a YDA representative to the DNC.

Another amazing fact: in addition to being the newest DNC Member from the great state of New York, I am also the only Muslim member and the youngest member. This honor is especially meaningful to me after over a decade of advocacy and organizing to bring young people to the table.

I look forward to casting my vote in the upcoming DNC regional and caucus elections for some of my close friends, alongside Quentin Wathum-Ocama and Steph Campanha Wheaton. Hopefully one day I’ll return to serve a full term in a different capacity.

To the future, my friends**!_”

Please don’t hesitate to reach out with any questions.

In solidarity,
Quentin Wathum-Ocama
President, Young Democrats of America
| **_**The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. clean_body: | | | | | | Good Evening, I’m writing to share that Katherine Jeanes has stepped down from their role as the Young Democrats of America’s representative to the Democratic National Committee, effective June 30, 2025. Katherine made this decision to pursue a new opportunity to continue their advocacy for young people within the DNC by running for an at-large appointment via the Youth Council. We are grateful for their service and the example they set for future youth leaders. To ensure that YDA retains its full voting rights in the upcoming DNC Council and Caucus elections, which commence next week, I haveappointed YDA General Counsel, Mohammed Tazbir Alam,to serve for the remaining 19 days of the term. This appointment is made under the authority granted to me by the YDA Charter (Article XI, Section 7) and in recognition of the critical July 1 deadline for DNC members to be seated and participate in these elections, as without swift action, YDA risked losing its voice in this pivotal election.** Tazbir provided the following statement on July 1: “ As of last night, I was appointed to serve the remaining few weeks of a term as an officer of the Young Democrats of America to the DNC. Aside from the incredibly short amount of time I will serve in this role, it is an honor for me to once again represent the voices of young Democrats across the country. I’ve had the privilege of serving this great organization in various roles—from Vice President, to Treasurer, to General Counsel—and as I head to my last convention this month as a Young Democrat, I get to serve as a YDA representative to the DNC. Another amazing fact: in addition to being the newest DNC Member from the great state of New York, I am also the only Muslim member and the youngest member. This honor is especially meaningful to me after over a decade of advocacy and organizing to bring young people to the table. I look forward to casting my vote in the upcoming DNC regional and caucus elections for some of my close friends, alongside Quentin Wathum-Ocama and Steph Campanha Wheaton. Hopefully one day I’ll return to serve a full term in a different capacity. To the future, my friends!” Please don’t hesitate to reach out with any questions. In solidarity, Quentin Wathum-Ocama President, Young Democrats of America | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/kQKygaTaSpE-ogusEFlny0kSOULJLAl2PqQYV6dNot-7aZPVmEVjXAdEDB0Erf-V9Q-0ufz0ftOaTP-kgxLLlAScwY1tg5MEO8lpjrlRT4utuFKasYE-kwU2-aWEr_sBIJt5h2lF3Nm2e6D7aRHVQXaQtQy0g8pId8zgMtNvxr-VEGoNttr25YqgKNWaX0nQYnKx_CDM5nikFd4YFKZY7mNRlE1qd0yqgWxIHxrsLrrNYdn03AzOi7uDv26i0awyzPwkk7oGuQPY39Q8DURgx1Rjxvvujh9_oOZhf3RScagVApNbJYgw8uMSnzrguEkJwRH0gz1A6EU5NOSUz0N-eHA8iKOovcEZP1-Iiil-vc6ujdarjr-jSagQDtNWnV2mgLFXLZQO4XeQnHE8qYikgoiYIxCCRh7cHpCvQQmdvwj-pBr5mFm_9fhnf712UdFa4LrzMKfOds41hgJeNM_8BYnXJSSehq0OVtJHDqyXA50QZ8cJBbbuE1nSKn-xDXJ3fiJ4s_hxqqSGacwmeHR9iGGUqcEWv00LKDT7jR-SGcLgy8t_0daVkMkhiuaBmiZOFDMGHoeSwL_8mZ8LWidmjex2w6V2J-k7FeoUZXB_haURwa7EGVTbqUDMiCnCWNqKEo6gZApXcUrpUklsukyMEvThwIw5F3NLT4UY9zaetLpgPRG0HEgJxm7bw6wdwSIWRjR7FH9_Iw1K_ivrJnrqJADObdd50j61jZJ06yB_6ersy8ryt-4ctmRknYbHZME1hjjjKpNGBIid01MLEk3ilgYajuORKRruOO4prtk5pnrckuWFwg/UHBkLqxGQqEA0bq_Gl1KTyQEohKWcR6E/10 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Let’s talk about why it’s so important to pay attention to Ohio and Texas right now.
In Ohio, lawmakers are in the process of redrawing its congressional map under the same system the GOP used to craft the current gerrymandered map. The Republican-controlled General Assembly could approve another unfair map, which means **as many as three Democratic seats could be stolen by Republicans.**
In Texas, as the fair maps movement fights in court to secure fair representation for communities of color in multiple congressional districts, Republicans are assessing whether to hold a special legislative session to initiate a mid-decade map redraw. The move could **expand their majority by five additional seats.**
But this goes far beyond Ohio and Texas, Peter. If Republicans are successful in passing extreme, gerrymandered maps before the midterm elections, they stand to unfairly win congressional seats that could help them maintain control of the U.S. House where they can continue to rubber stamp Donald Trump’s agenda.
**We need all hands on deck to take on this critical battle for our democracy. And we need to be prepared to respond whenever there are attacks on fair representation.[Will you rush a donation to our emergency response efforts to help stop future attempts to manipulate maps in Ohio, Texas, and across the country?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110824817/555484504/-575129389?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_UnitedUnfairMapsOHTX_email_20250703-NDRC-Tier1-UnitedUnfairMapsOHTX_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250703-NDRC-Tier1-UnitedUnfairMapsOHTX_&utm_campaign=UnitedUnfairMapsOHTX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMzU3NzI5LTgwNTgtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pJ16kD4Gu3aL0Y1VfIUVNjzYb9a9qjcKzT9EdVKA5J8=)**

clean_body: We need your support to fight for fair maps in these states | | = Peter, At this very moment, Republicans are strategizing a power grab in Ohio and Texas. = Both states have a long history of Republicans gerrymandering. That’s why the fair maps movement has identified Ohio and Texas as two of this year’s most consequential states when it comes to fair representation. In a moment, we’re going to explain everything that’s at stake in these two critical states, but if you’re already convinced,= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Let’s talk about why it’s so important to pay attention to Ohio and Texas right now. In Ohio, lawmakers are in the process of redrawing its congressional map under the same system the GOP used to craft the current gerrymandered map. The Republican-controlled General Assembly could approve another unfair map, which means as many as three Democratic seats could be stolen by Republicans. In Texas, as the fair maps movement fights in court to secure fair representation for communities of color in multiple congressional districts, Republicans are assessing whether to hold a special legislative session to initiate a mid-decade map redraw. The move could expand their majority by five additional seats. But this goes far beyond Ohio and Texas, Peter. If Republicans are successful in passing extreme, gerrymandered maps before the midterm elections, they stand to unfairly win congressional seats that could help them maintain control of the U.S. House where they can continue to rubber stamp Donald Trump’s agenda. We need all hands on deck to take on this critical battle for our democracy. And we need to be prepared to respond whenever there are attacks on fair representation.= Thanks for being a part of this critical work, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Team —
We can’t sugarcoat this: Republicans just passed the biggest Medicaid cut in American history — all to fund more tax breaks for billionaires.
And shockingly, California Republicans in swing districts voted YES.
➡️ David Valadao (CA-22)
➡️ Ken Calvert (CA-41)
➡️ Kevin Kiley (CA-03)
➡️ Young Kim (CA-40)
They all chose Trump over the people they’re supposed to represent. They voted to rip health care away from 17 million Americans — including tens of thousands of their own constituents.
Will you rush a donation to help us defeat Valadao, Calvert, Kiley, and Kim? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-july25-trumpbill?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-july25-trumpbill?&refcode=&amount=]We’re probably not telling you something you don’t already know, but this bill is a DISASTER for Californians:
— 17 million Americans could lose their healthcare;
— 5 million face cuts to food support;
— 1.75 million construction jobs are at risk;
— $3 trillion added to the national debt.
And it passed because California swing seat Republicans betrayed the American people.
Let’s be crystal clear: If you betray our healthcare, you lose your seat.
We’re launching an emergency push to fire these GOP traitors and flip their districts blue. But we urgently need to raise $25,000 for our Swing Seat Fund to expand organizing and voter outreach programs now. Will you pitch in $ or more? body:

---
| |
---
Dear Patriot , That’s me, my three kids, and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches, in the picture I’ve sent you.

This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because a police-hating, Soros-funded prosecutor... ...is trying to rip my husband away from our family and lock him up for life for doing his job. **[And he might succeed if no one can help us.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e416365d34ee4a6096385b96dc69c642&_e=jqVbKZxHwFfybHD6cDVKKD6EEkoNGExrzBN_lWRLE0uxn8M-eM6FOC2ZduYpwGymDKUgp99wb0c5KpL1prcZ3KXFD9PxSB8ZhK70mPEVdrri0PWWtC_nS3cy0i3QUPcD0Ljah81R5UfbPo1tc3V8I2ZC_wJmS22qqphXGHYhKiZirqIDSHHAkv3zZajUBrSQdwlyLEJ8wrBIU0nq-qk3oVYE3Lo5jUsPq7Ggpy3-CHh8AHJhs0rd4RhR-5mOrqPP793SsoztnmcHO4LvzCAcNasYJ0AsasjyggutIDe0VgRfOdXuiyHY52Paq83J-1yBWUYE7PjRah1jU3UxxN738QRyTbi3ADZDjRhiBZxoCYU3dRMOYaWbrtUnuaM-BAjehZ6WchZzmoA3Yke1L6ArZ2swsrCMijZmjk78QByJ8elgbv8pJJ6xIoZ3HJxQ_JAJPXk3Z0hnzCbljd9Mbm4R6BIuqrIAIZSG0KJMOsXQncmaWZdBkiKQMbv4uuRTtqbO-fTVlzya2C7cMdqOCc05Ws7sUuq7bP5GGLjFBGzdwBpcvcMnereKN3Xkx5YXgloqy35HCQsAeVDiz_ZuQvO__JoF0vkBxEgQG02CVdEKWEHkLztK1lmn5MmXjP46IpeDVeGJOymSw_2coZyn297YgtxdDQELfo73wL1ACOh1kcT8jH426o9OJ8TJJrpK4rIX)** I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were “mostly peaceful.” It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down the interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn’t restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same “beanbag guns” that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before things got any worse. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. But what Chance didn’t know is that one of the beanbags he fired wound up hurting a rioter’s hand. And nearly **TWO YEARS** after my husband helped save our city from being burned to the ground... ...the county prosecutor decided to charge my husband with “aggravated assault by a public servant” – a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, I went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don’t care if my husband is innocent. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year-old police veteran. My husband was a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He’s served on mission trips – planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars could be his “reward.” Even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God’s grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us – the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (**LELDF**). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policeman’s best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they’ve agreed to help Chance. My friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: **[Will you help Chance, too?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e416365d34ee4a6096385b96dc69c642&_e=jqVbKZxHwFfybHD6cDVKKD6EEkoNGExrzBN_lWRLE0uxn8M-eM6FOC2ZduYpwGymDKUgp99wb0c5KpL1prcZ3KXFD9PxSB8ZhK70mPEVdrri0PWWtC_nS3cy0i3QUPcD0Ljah81R5UfbPo1tc3V8I2ZC_wJmS22qqphXGHYhKiZirqIDSHHAkv3zZajUBrSQdwlyLEJ8wrBIU0nq-qk3oVYE3Lo5jUsPq7Ggpy3-CHh8AHJhs0rd4RhR-5mOrqPPx0Wmc_GNn9-Datgh1wkMvMMEDQmzEPlXaE4ILvOapQUlQGvDE8Wzu_R_ID5zrYfmBBSJv-oM_jby5KEzYim8QOki2tZdMn49V7B37GZoYh_EWBKaD33lNzlCmLHlws2jbatodeiIpLIT5ytIdp2j_Fy-8ANNm9zG8a4jFHvvDoIuUmylkIJlXUpvECmDM2oEeGxwHgJOGrcq3kzV936JTrfoTaYcKESuA4pWDfp4_uFvcrVqvZzoFUKd8C7h4lmfiOuo9WFZ8L6G0Ds1QZMyR6zVAdqADsApLPlpKn8XDxkY_BbvLcKs88WCWbeJMee2oNr0ITsIXGvrbUo0CzAF5r8D-8Q8y5hw70wJ47lKHXTyUP6XPdQ2E488k5n_VBW_GT1VOrPbC-MV4gHc36rzW2_nLFfdcyOBOMfQyZW3WMJwbfaDaz7yBLE5rGj1RAzu)** Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused? Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he’ll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won’t be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won’t be able to walk our daughter down the aisle on her wedding day... I can’t bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, – or any amount – could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his “reward.” And to make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros-back prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance’s trial begins. Chance and I have three children – and one more on the way. Please don’t let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

subject: The “pardon-proof” witch hunt to jail me for life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I’m counting on YOU to add your name to save me.

I’m counting on YOU to add your name to save me.

---
My God, Friend...
---
_Has it really come to this?_
---
I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my good friend, our 45th and 47th President.
---
But what the radical Democrats and the Deep State are trying to do to those of us who’ve _REFUSED_ to surrender to tyranny will destroy our once free Republic forever.
---
**Today, all due to bogus state-level charges schemed up by a Democrat Attorney General in Arizona, I'm staring down the possibility of spending the rest of my years in PRISON!**
---
My crime? Helping to defend Donald J. Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_And on top of it all, because the Democrats concocted these sham criminal charges at the _state level_ , President Trump won’t even be able to issue a federal pardon to save me. _
---
But rest assured, while things may look bleak, I will **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER**!
---
My whole life, I’ve always been known as a fighter. And at 80 years old, I’m _still_ fighting back against these Deep State goons!
---
**And while the President cannot save me from the Democrats’ vindictive scheme, there is _ONE_ thing that still can... **
---
**_...The collective voice of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU._**

Friend, the leftist thugs who had me unjustly booked in one of the most violent jails in America filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757**.

_So, how fitting would it be to collect**2,313,757** petition signatures from true America patriots like you demanding they DROP ALL CHARGES? _

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I felt moved to write this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now.

President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now.
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9oie58rk0fsa4cgu4udaugg9hmjfpbff2rtvmsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh62p32c3h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
As we celebrate our nation's independence, I felt moved to write you this private letter. I promise you, every word is from the bottom of my heart.
---
With President Trump back at the helm, it's truly inspiring to see our country victorious once again.
---
Our President is racking up so many wins, even CNN was forced to admit President Trump just had the _" best week as President."_
---
**And the cherry on top? He scored a momentous judicial victory as the Supreme Court ruled to bring an end to the Left 's tyrannical nationwide injunctions and LAWFARE posed by radical Democrat judges across the country!**
---
**But while it certainly feels that _America_ has found her way out of those four long and dark years of Joe Biden's disastrous presidency and weaponized justice system, I must admit, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
The 4th of July is a stark reminder that our Founders created a nation where we are _guaranteed_ our indelible rights to **LIFE** and **LIBERTY**.
---
_But the Democrats and the Deep State 's LAWFARE against me is very much alive and well..._
---
... __And make no mistake, they are coming for my liberty and my life!__
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet - President Trump - can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
This entire scheme by the Left all to destroy a close friend of the President's is truly the type of vindictive and sinister plot you'd think would only exist in the movies.
---
_But believe me, Friend, it exists; I 'm living it. And if I fail to win this trial, the Democrats will be able to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life!_
---
I've been left with no escape, no lifeline - especially after they've already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill. _
---
_But even though the most powerful man in the country _legally_ cannot step in to save me, that doesn't mean he isn't sending out a CALL TO ACTION_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfbcliqnrkm0t9tb2n6hbn8253g7cql17it5ojno_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh62p32c3h2bs)
---
With my back now against the wall, the President knows there is only ONE thing that can save me: **_the collective strength of MILLIONS of grassroots patriots like _YOU_._**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqsk6eqe55eviq9vm7ducbj0356qlvuofjg4er1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh62p32c3h2bs)
---
[**So please, answer President Trump 's call and make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice. **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z57aq9omcl8fsft1ul70bbsoqim2sifi5pt7vps8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh62p32c3h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdkbs7965i5booake4pbnn1o5vicu85mft68302o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh62p32c3h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs9li9r87mc2ql8m5oahvbro4fh5vpgejgprc7hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh62p32c3h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0o820bhnocp9q67dppl9652sku61te6ltcrflt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh62p32c3h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztmmigd919gt7p85n7r07bejofkg1l4nan9cg6to_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh62p32c3h2bs)

Thank you and God bless you,

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Happy Independence Day!
body:
Celebrate the greatest country in the world today!
| | | |
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac860fa6/1edb9794ac7d5f4d)
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** Nearly 250 years ago, our forefathers rose against a tyrant who tried to bind the colonies with taxes, suppression, and intimidation. From that struggle came a timeless declaration: all men are created equal before God, and this new nation would be governed accordingly.
Though America has drifted from those ideals, your love and dedication are helping steer us back to the principles our founders fought for so bravely.
As you gather with family and friends this Independence Day, consider reading the Declaration of Independence aloud--a powerful reminder of what we celebrate and why the fight for liberty endures.
Let us honor the sacrifices that secured our freedom and protect those blessings for the generations yet to come.
From everyone at Tea Party Patriots Action, have a wonderful, patriotic, and joyful Independence Day.

**_God Bless America!_****
**Jenny Beth Martin **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
|
---
|

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I felt moved to write this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now.

President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmtf373o62sf6rha6lmqhj6i4t2l2dpcfac37rv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
As we celebrate our nation's independence, I felt moved to write you this private letter. I promise you, every word is from the bottom of my heart.
---
With President Trump back at the helm, it's truly inspiring to see our country victorious once again.
---
Our President is racking up so many wins, even CNN was forced to admit President Trump just had the _" best week as President."_
---
**And the cherry on top? He scored a momentous judicial victory as the Supreme Court ruled to bring an end to the Left 's tyrannical nationwide injunctions and LAWFARE posed by radical Democrat judges across the country!**
---
**But while it certainly feels that _America_ has found her way out of those four long and dark years of Joe Biden's disastrous presidency and weaponized justice system, I must admit, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
The 4th of July is a stark reminder that our Founders created a nation where we are _guaranteed_ our indelible rights to **LIFE** and **LIBERTY**.
---
_But the Democrats and the Deep State 's LAWFARE against me is very much alive and well..._
---
... __And make no mistake, they are coming for my liberty and my life!__
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet - President Trump - can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
This entire scheme by the Left all to destroy a close friend of the President's is truly the type of vindictive and sinister plot you'd think would only exist in the movies.
---
_But believe me, Friend, it exists; I 'm living it. And if I fail to win this trial, the Democrats will be able to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life!_
---
I've been left with no escape, no lifeline - especially after they've already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill. _
---
_But even though the most powerful man in the country _legally_ cannot step in to save me, that doesn't mean he isn't sending out a CALL TO ACTION_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkgcbr2uhlbvc6acijmbkdehnr1hs58pbdibpbb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---
With my back now against the wall, the President knows there is only ONE thing that can save me: **_the collective strength of MILLIONS of grassroots patriots like _YOU_._**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztf1aksqshelemg4ahuakq6d31sco3odcmgfbac8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---
[**So please, answer President Trump 's call and make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za4drri3o3e9q1n7m80svh4ddj99bl60k0hqa360_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbn6k8299p1r2rr8ev127un8pl275o47n6ms19hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb5t6sq5k8vqm3o26k3h3pq64fjnqg0t1dme830o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjoqfhsto03en9j9o0dc3fgvhhj3tdcf2nka33bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6odmfh2t50889c00sf7djppu7tr8k9cm8hov188_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Our ACHILLES HEEL at the midterms?
body:
Don’t let our greatest advantage from 2024 become our greatest WEAKNESS in 2025.

Don’t let our greatest advantage from 2024 become our greatest WEAKNESS in 2025.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqq9r6nuae2edin5ilhl6e42l30nciufqj5jrc18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
We’re on the 1-yard line, and we’re either about to score big or fumble badly.
---
_The latest Rasmussen polling shows the Democrats’ lead in the midterms has been CUT DOWN to just**1 POINT** ... well within the **_margin_ _of_ _error_**._
---
But here’s the kicker – one of our greatest advantages in the 2024 election was our unparalleled voter data.
---
A fully verified file allowed us to not only see who the most high-propensity voters were, but also where Republicans could most _effectively_ spend our resources to WIN.
---
_However, as it stands this year, we’re still missing countless voter profiles, leaving key zip codes unrepresented._
---
**After all our hard work to send President Trump back to the White House and secure majorities in both chambers of Congress last November, I REFUSE to allow one of our biggest 2024 _advantages_ turn into our ACHILLES HEEL at the midterms! **
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
_That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats._
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlvf9fvt4a2oce9n1rjvoirikoan73iue7t3gcbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh15si5ieulsnm2hfrtv0cvmp45l958pie9dpevg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---
[VERIFY NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk3pnqtmniomh7m851788gkg1e2ntfav52d4cong_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4osgtak4e3gshfs16efntpspblhfu79kfalsiq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh66o72c3h2bs)
---
Jim Jordan
---

President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now. | Dear Friend, As we celebrate our nation's independence, I felt moved to write you this private letter. I promise you, every word is from the bottom of my heart. With President Trump back at the helm, it's truly inspiring to see our country victorious once again. Our President is racking up so many wins, even CNN was forced to admit President Trump just had the " best week as President." And the cherry on top? He scored a momentous judicial victory as the Supreme Court ruled to bring an end to the Left 's tyrannical nationwide injunctions and LAWFARE posed by radical Democrat judges across the country! But while it certainly feels that America has found her way out of those four long and dark years of Joe Biden's disastrous presidency and weaponized justice system, I must admit, my journey out of that darkness is not yet finished. The 4th of July is a stark reminder that our Founders created a nation where we are guaranteed our indelible rights to LIFE and LIBERTY. But the Democrats and the Deep State 's LAWFARE against me is very much alive and well... ... And make no mistake, they are coming for my liberty and my life! A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet - President Trump - can save me with a federal pardon in state court. This entire scheme by the Left all to destroy a close friend of the President's is truly the type of vindictive and sinister plot you'd think would only exist in the movies. But believe me, Friend, it exists; I 'm living it. And if I fail to win this trial, the Democrats will be able to JAIL me for the rest of my life! I've been left with no escape, no lifeline - especially after they've already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No pardon. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. With my back now against the wall, the President knows there is only ONE thing that can save me: the collective strength of MILLIONS of grassroots patriots like YOU. name: Larry Klayman
subject: USAID’s LGBTQ Crusade Wastes Your Money— Help Us Sue!
body:
On March 28, 2025, the 4th Circuit allowed some cuts but kept USAID staggering on. Every day these courts stall, your wallet bleeds—$220 per family, year after year.

| [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk473hs383ui809tnv315nq851iqvujgspu5pg2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)
[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkobp274njdartbjsr7fd712blgs346g7ctq7ak8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

**Freedom Watch is gearing up to slam USAID with a class action lawsuit for their rogue LGBTQ agenda** --but [**we need**your help** to make it happen**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zas4mkbnj8jen5oovn2gh4scfk4f86qdtpm6pnp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs).

This lawsuit will be a MONSTER!

President Trump's fighting to gut this leftist cesspool, and I'm his bulldog in this war. [**USAID 's out of control, and it's time to stop them. **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdd3mvefrc6esi6a40oquhtalqumepgspdub6qj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)

Take Uganda, 2014. USAID didn't deliver food or medicine--**they pumped millions into LGBTQ groups, igniting a firestorm.**

Ugandans, rooted in tradition, saw it as a cultural assault. Protests exploded, and their parliament rammed through a harsh anti-LGBTQ law, blaming "Western meddling."

**This wasn 't aid; it was a leftist fiasco that trashed America's reputation and endangered our people.** Locals burned USAID posters, shouting "No to gringo values!"--**all funded by your tax dollars.**

And it's not just Uganda. From Poland to Saudi Arabia, USAID's LGBTQ pushes spark chaos and resentment.

**Your family 's tax hit? $220 a year--part of USAID's $27 billion budget--wasted on woke stunts that turn allies into enemies.** Trump's livid, and so am I.

**_[**Donate now**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjg5sj8n2qaik3puagb1ubki5a2e9fc56ookmb80_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)_****[**to fund our lawsuit and halt this taxpayer-funded madness.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0lq293lnjpmfosmkpqbmsag3pj0f9ath07oji2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)**

Here's the outrage: Trump's battling to kill USAID, but activist judges keep it alive.

On March 18, 2025, U.S. District Judge Theodore Chuang--a leftist puppet--blocked Trump's shutdown plan, whining about "worker rights."

Then, on March 28, 2025, the 4th Circuit allowed some cuts but kept USAID staggering on. **Every day these courts stall, your wallet bleeds --$220 per family, year after year.** USAID's flops make America a global laughingstock, and China's loving it.

**_[**Donate now**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zii6lt1cp1c33q851jpt3qcb2003342p36docvqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)_****[**to fuel our legal war and bury this rogue agency.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0gtvuoes4gaasqus8ka986rt2bjbvkcbfbqoq70_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)**

**Think of your family**. USAID's Uganda mess burned $10 million--part of the $220 you lose yearly. That's $220 that could pay bills or fund your kids' future, not leftist experiments that backfire. **Patriots, we can 't sit still.**

**_[**Donate now**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2vo722e8o0hqo5tk9h5h48tnvb86ag5q2p2vm98_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)_****[**to back Trump, back me, and crush USAID 's woke empire!**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3ut7uruft5dciolcfevf7fv1vgd8gm1vrbp1g30_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)**

Our lawsuit's a monster--alleging 10th Amendment violations, fraud, and more.

I've beaten federal giants before, but this fight needs millions for lawyers, evidence, and experts. Trump's counting on us; your family's counting on us. **USAID 's robbing every American taxpayer--$220 a year stolen from your pocket.** Let's hit back hard.

**_[**Donate now**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z57gtq5cvfblj9a98b2muen9ahtfrhp19cfkspc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)_****[**to fund this battle and protect your wallet and our Constitution!**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7mdagm46n0odn9336870a106n7b9f58618l9qkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdh6epr4c3h2bs)**

For America,

Larry Klayman

name: Larry Klayman
subject: USAID’s LGBTQ Crusade Wastes Your Money— Help Us Sue!
body:
On March 28, 2025, the 4th Circuit allowed some cuts but kept USAID staggering on. Every day these courts stall, your wallet bleeds—$220 per family, year after year.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztdeuk5nj8ol6nrd9tsk822nq2ouh6dgjegk86a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)

**Freedom Watch is gearing up to slam USAID with a class action lawsuit for their rogue LGBTQ agenda** --but [**we need**your help** to make it happen**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgjlobltqr1chvkekjp2lqtv0ift9qu8j5av3crg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs).

This lawsuit will be a MONSTER!

President Trump's fighting to gut this leftist cesspool, and I'm his bulldog in this war. [**USAID 's out of control, and it's time to stop them. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zssjd7bpd3vd0dkfr0p7c3c77gg9u1j9l4ui9ab0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)

Take Uganda, 2014. USAID didn't deliver food or medicine--**they pumped millions into LGBTQ groups, igniting a firestorm.**

Ugandans, rooted in tradition, saw it as a cultural assault. Protests exploded, and their parliament rammed through a harsh anti-LGBTQ law, blaming "Western meddling."

**This wasn 't aid; it was a leftist fiasco that trashed America's reputation and endangered our people.** Locals burned USAID posters, shouting "No to gringo values!"--**all funded by your tax dollars.**

And it's not just Uganda. From Poland to Saudi Arabia, USAID's LGBTQ pushes spark chaos and resentment.

**Your family 's tax hit? $220 a year--part of USAID's $27 billion budget--wasted on woke stunts that turn allies into enemies.** Trump's livid, and so am I.

**_[**Donate now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs4togd5favcpq503uvj2dvn8mpctfmp1b2mqeu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)_****[**to fund our lawsuit and halt this taxpayer-funded madness.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zml5tsrvsbr4h81a2jrt04ehbblj6ibf09ghk1s8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)**

Here's the outrage: Trump's battling to kill USAID, but activist judges keep it alive.

On March 18, 2025, U.S. District Judge Theodore Chuang--a leftist puppet--blocked Trump's shutdown plan, whining about "worker rights."

Then, on March 28, 2025, the 4th Circuit allowed some cuts but kept USAID staggering on. **Every day these courts stall, your wallet bleeds --$220 per family, year after year.** USAID's flops make America a global laughingstock, and China's loving it.

**_[**Donate now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z99gupcebrdbripc7snbagr6jtd9m8qceqbn8a4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)_****[**to fuel our legal war and bury this rogue agency.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zosulgo1uf8oai0pk8fscekovajk65ha1l8sek0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)**

**Think of your family**. USAID's Uganda mess burned $10 million--part of the $220 you lose yearly. That's $220 that could pay bills or fund your kids' future, not leftist experiments that backfire. **Patriots, we can 't sit still.**

**_[**Donate now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziprbv58v0hb9hurg3ntolvdaqn9mjduutf7m9j8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)_****[**to back Trump, back me, and crush USAID 's woke empire!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za2taslliappj87ihk038ajibuq2e05bluj55r8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)**

Our lawsuit's a monster--alleging 10th Amendment violations, fraud, and more.

I've beaten federal giants before, but this fight needs millions for lawyers, evidence, and experts. Trump's counting on us; your family's counting on us. **USAID 's robbing every American taxpayer--$220 a year stolen from your pocket.** Let's hit back hard.

**_[**Donate now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z22qomti4gog7lt3einvu72igq00aaoia8a30m90_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)_****[**to fund this battle and protect your wallet and our Constitution!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0melthnrtg9e3jlbr8iff2hv94m54njc4nuvd90_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6chh2bs)**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Can I tell you a story about my father, Rafael?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Socialism is creeping into the Democratic Party.

Friend,

The socialist movement is no longer a distant threat -- _**[it's taking over the Democratic Party right now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7keq907jefe9hmli2sec9d8ns9tf9t7ecfdi8o8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)**_

And if we don't act fast, America as we know it could be gone forever.

As the son of a man who fled the socialist revolution in Cuba, I know firsthand what happens when the government takes control and individual freedoms are stripped away.

**[My father was imprisoned and tortured by the communist forces that seized power in Cuba. He risked everything to escape and come to America with nothing but a dream of freedom and $100 sewn into his underwear.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za52fkihk17nnhbm982i2793gf0g0pbuceaeujho_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)**

******************************************************[STOP SOCIALISM](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmv01v2s78poachcrnd0m5s51vo3liv01fefirl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)******************************************************

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zccrikpn0b0orkqb6u1qn31gkqqcji4ovu5aoofg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)

But today, that same socialist ideology that stole everything from my father is starting to take root right here in America.

**[It's creeping into the Democratic Party, and we've already seen a socialist win the NYC Democratic primary for mayor.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoe741p3drefktsq5jroid9uhc6kvbautbse129o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)**

Make no mistake, Friend, _**[this is not the country](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4d7f8viggpdv9sarvsf10es69gc3crvprpmahi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)**_ we want for our children and grandchildren.

**[That's why I am turning to you at this critical moment. Will you please chip in $10, $50, or even $100 to stop this socialist movement from taking over America?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd29p8tblrtfq1ig6l5uupd9e7uhdca0ski0k6bo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)**

******************************************************[STOP SOCIALISM](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zle7725hg6jpge00jsai9tg937p2nbk0cjjav6ug_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)******************************************************

I will never stop fighting to protect our freedom, our values, and the American Dream that my father risked everything to find.

We cannot let the Left take away what we've worked so hard to build.

**[So please, join me today and stand up against the socialist takeover that's threatening our great country. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo87em359d3rf205ego8jvcl8pn5r9tjsolr67q0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)**

******************************************************[STOP SOCIALISM](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh6fdltcoq25l3qglind1cb5ua0dpscsbjaekveo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)******************************************************

Thank you,
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zctuors0cv7a7kh4kigqo95mduidgtinel1a9e9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cdj60ob6c9h2bs)
Ted Cruz

name: Troy Downing
subject: Happy Independence Day, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Celebrating America and fighting for her future.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
As we celebrate our nation’s birthday today, I’m reminded of how fortunate we are to live in the land of the free and the home of the brave.
Thanks to President Trump's leadership, America is making a strong comeback. We're renewing the values that built this great nation, standing proud for our anthem, securing our borders, and defending the Constitution.
I’m proud to be part of this incredible country and committed to fighting for the principles that make America exceptional. Together, there’s no challenge we can’t overcome and no limit to what we can achieve.
So let’s raise our flags high and celebrate our freedom.
**Happy 4th of July, America!**
God bless you, and God bless the United States of America.
Sincerely,[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Troy Downing| |
