name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Happy Independence Day from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin!
body:
Happy Independence Day from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12928814?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

**Today, we celebrate our Independence Day and the freedoms we have here in America.** As we spend time with family and friends over the weekend, let’s remember to reflect on our nation’s rich history and the bold risks taken by our Founding Fathers to secure the right to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for future generations of Americans.

**But we should never forget that this freedom comes with a cost.** This 4th of July, let’s honor the many lives lost defending our great nation and keeping us safe. **We are the land of the free because of the brave.** Thank you to all of our active-duty military members and veterans for your service and unwavering dedication to protecting America. **We owe you an incredible debt!**

Happy Birthday, America! 🇺🇸

**May God continue to bless these United States and the Free State of Florida.**
---
| | Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=ef296e109a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=ef296e109a).

name: Team Evergreen
subject: 🗣️ Exercise your freedoms this Independence Day
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Holding our lawmakers accountable is core to a functioning democracy
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3751690/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi friend,

This weekend, people around the country are celebrating freedom, democracy, and the power of people to shape their own future.

But behind the fireworks, **extremist Republicans have been working against those core American principles to pass their Big Brutal Bill.**

This disaster of a budget slashes clean energy investments, rips healthcare away from millions of the most vulnerable Americans, and raises our electricity bills—things that no one wants to celebrate this Independence Day.

And while this outcome stings for so many of us, it’s important to remember that **one of the core aspects of a healthy and functioning democracy is the ability to hold our lawmakers accountable.**

So, whether your lawmakers voted for or against this ugly bill, [**take a minute today—on Independence Day—to tell them how you feel about their vote.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3751691/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SEND YOUR MESSAGE NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3751692/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| **If any of your representatives voted _against_ the GOP budget bill**, then show them some appreciation for holding their ground and standing up for what’s right. This won’t be the last time your lawmakers have to fight for you in Congress—and your support today can be an important reminder for them to keep doing what’s best for their constituents.

**And if any of your representatives voted _for_ the GOP budget bill**, then hold them accountable— _loudly and urgently_. Because they just sold out working people in order to line the pockets of the richest billionaires. And the impacts will hurt people from all walks of life.

Our democracy may be as fragile as it’s ever been, but our movements aren’t. **And movements are what power our democracy.**

[**So please, take a minute today to thank your lawmakers if they voted against the GOP budget bill, or to hold them accountable for supporting it.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3751693/87SdQ4wZ)

Because today is a day to celebrate our freedoms—and this is what freedom is all about. |
---
[CONTACT YOUR REPRESENTATIVES](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3751694/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Happy Independence Day, friend.

— Team Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

But behind the fireworks, extremist Republicans have been working against those core American principles to pass their Big Brutal Bill. This disaster of a budget slashes clean energy investments, rips healthcare away from millions of the most vulnerable Americans, and raises our electricity bills—things that no one wants to celebrate this Independence Day. And while this outcome stings for so many of us, it’s important to remember that one of the core aspects of a healthy and functioning democracy is the ability to hold our lawmakers accountable. So, whether your lawmakers voted for or against this ugly bill, | | If any of your representatives voted against the GOP budget bill, then show them some appreciation for holding their ground and standing up for what’s right. This won’t be the last time your lawmakers have to fight for you in Congress—and your support today can be an important reminder for them to keep doing what’s best for their constituents. And if any of your representatives voted for the GOP budget bill, then hold them accountable— loudly and urgently. Because they just sold out working people in order to line the pockets of the richest billionaires. And the impacts will hurt people from all walks of life. Our democracy may be as fragile as it’s ever been, but our movements aren’t. And movements are what power our democracy. Because today is a day to celebrate our freedoms—and this is what freedom is all about. | | Happy Independence Day, friend. — Team Evergreen | | Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support. | | | Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn. | ---|--- And follow our new project, Hope This Helps.** | | | ---|---|---|--- © 2025 Evergreen Action and paid for by Evergreen Action. subject: Happy Fourth, Big Beautiful Bill Passes, and the Best Ice Cream
body:
The [House approved the One Big Beautiful Bill Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO3SAMRp-GbFwRk8DE0CXb37VjBMEkrrghAvNf5e2rdOgLdPFypCOf79fX-uUp07n_9G90nMp64qdlZMa6Hv667lR65SPQHtB3ptRzoBUUzFJZqaY1esr3Og3RJURAPaAb7Twa0Gaeh8PZcdYBtqCi0XH2BjRsAZLXxptZpXEg99iUVdOolNXTa9I2GDuC3xKiilFMCiNxqa_fhU4-MOW7fGN9beU9ZHcwX03oHwIWAct5X6XxgwQsj1jAouxztIClN_n0CViO0hvKy7eGTQba5b88GShn6TeWDc9I5y6JJRfJtb8v6RNjlaF2ag9qXPu-ZxSwDNXF60M5UzNWTGp_e8p_f-T_GvbbwZ8AAAD__wSfjcw) on Thursday by a 218-214 vote, advancing a broad legislative package to President Trump’s desk.

# Friday, July 4, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1776, the Continental Congress formally adopted the Declaration of Independence, announcing the American colonies' separation from Great Britain and [giving birth to a new nation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAQgOHT4C4WxhjyCorXuMu2W1oDDGEiEiw8juXbr7JX2PqXvuL_vi03oEKv-xc80XGqywuPrSAztiXDup6p7o2zp7tH2JnSXjwtSqrpIu1F6iUClXPRXXQJUeHYoRvsNBg1mmnqskuTBrDXMFlv_0EE9H4IV6uMMoMJyXTkPpq0Ug9S2lH3erTe2EFBSIgyRqElRuLa-kelF2dM5axvbH2oz664zLxuYvwv1CzUfBxHn2nj2s5PF2qGxhQKbkLNj72cF825ay6uB5VCm7FCy_sTqPxy_KcHb6d-AgAA__9jJHFm). Happy Independence Day! As we celebrate the adoption of the Declaration of Independence, here's your Fourth of July edition--perfect reading between parades, cookouts, and fireworks. As our team spends the holiday with their families, today's edition is abbreviated. We'll be back to the full lineup on Monday. We're sponsored today by [Brooklyn Bedding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb_GbImMbXAzeGiFsqVrR_SMH_AaGyNjEvH3lbtUmTufq6Oj-3Xrb0CelukTApo8xn7B5-YxZ0z9DOt6jHFPebY0WYQ907h7S73gojlxfeKqd0D-6FXlzIgoUFZoat3UrZBt01Sz0QouqsXWuUYDon4baqs5vwhXC2UBKjLFxjVXNedaqrOS2ra6FjCMiNw5pjg6yjGdvyMtecbRH_GB6TzEUHkz57xuTL4zcWXialOMd38sFp2jZSqbAuR1z6Hf4p4GZLL7k9RMtBBWJj_KIKCjPTDZYQDyL2iAsAJNC5NdaS3NL5wck52F4X5AclUybn2S97S1mik-Fd1vb_7XyQ8jfgIAAP__YmyRVQ), an American-made favorite offering a special Independence Day sale.
|

## House Passes 'Big Beautiful Bill'
The [House approved the One Big Beautiful Bill Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO3SAMRp-GbFwRk8DE0CXb37VjBMEkrrghAvNf5e2rdOgLdPFypCOf79fX-uUp07n_9G90nMp64qdlZMa6Hv667lR65SPQHtB3ptRzoBUUzFJZqaY1esr3Og3RJURAPaAb7Twa0Gaeh8PZcdYBtqCi0XH2BjRsAZLXxptZpXEg99iUVdOolNXTa9I2GDuC3xKiilFMCiNxqa_fhU4-MOW7fGN9beU9ZHcwX03oHwIWAct5X6XxgwQsj1jAouxztIClN_n0CViO0hvKy7eGTQba5b88GShn6TeWDc9I5y6JJRfJtb8v6RNjlaF2ag9qXPu-ZxSwDNXF60M5UzNWTGp_e8p_f-T_GvbbwZ8AAAD__wSfjcw) on Thursday by a 218-214 vote, advancing a broad legislative package to President Trump’s desk. The measure includes extensions to the 2017 tax law, new funding for defense and border initiatives, and changes to federal benefit programs. The final vote followed a [record-breaking 8-hour, 44-minute speech](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAUhJ8GOiJ8-LMLitu4y223tCAcm7PCwbJxorz9Kin2Bbab0Uif9M3XdboGKnRf_ocVfZvrdMfnUbA13Kcctu0113NvOdISMZyN5rNEmkCCEdIJqacUqLwmzZOfEQEVR98501lQ1hievemViwFVAIi9NcOgkhmkU72VyUXbc_JvmnRSd1I6pS9auWhdB-E2I8qUmJaYqNX98l3p3jLO5VUfuF9udeXF59a2g6l_DEYGY8uYqZT3xmDMdcW30CeeBzIYjepVB4P4dLHUTURaxK-ciFSKaPu5bgxGvvu0PakUOqxjWi5roA-btz-d9fDwEwAA___qC325) by House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, who criticized the bill’s impact. The passage meets a key July 4 target for the administration and cements a central piece of Trump’s second-term agenda.
## Hiring Surges, Unemployment Near Record Low
The U.S. [added 147,000 jobs in June](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3OnTAURFdjOiP_gdO4SBTRfWlTomt8DffJYGSb98LuI7KF1KMZzTm_v-YvoETH-gt2dC3m-cBPTdgalnmD87xjvkrbPK0e4WoUr-RpVkINXFguzByA0j2bLriIqFB36KQd5Kj0OAzd5kYQAFraUQU_eowRPAyDElZL5aX61pF71oQVRgphtemNtn60UsESEUUIzAgM1HLpX5mOtmFMd35j6Ze8d8ltrZ2V6e9MTUxN4JeHoF_zEzM1_bgqHVgrU9NGhY6V458Tl4aB15Q_GPjrOpDDToG3cu1n5Q0Kxfg0asvlZnqiwPRPqbQRVouhKy6cH0qJ6miZEesOlP69af-l8O3U3wAAAP__Ru-GTA), surpassing expectations and showing a slight increase from May’s 139,000 gain. The unemployment rate fell to 4.1%, near historic lows, according to the Bureau of Labor Statistics. U.S. [jobless claims dropped to 233,000](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL8GOqLFNjYULq5Jl2uvRGt7HTYyGIFJxN-fuF-4ajQaaTTzfh7jAznx8vzGmWyJeVzosycqhbZxwnU9Yz62Mjl-OsKjcDyS41GA6BowDagxIKdzVHWwkUiQrMm2pmu1kLrr6sk6MkOPJiANPoA2wgFEaHs16N7rXtZsrzYwoFoAI9VNSeO0aQX6SAQhVAoocMnb7ZV5KRPFdOY3bTef5zrZqZR1r-RXJe6VuON6Hbiiy2yFfaJK3F_ZJdr3xifkeW-OheY15XOmpTSOFopc9ibhmWO81OWtwejBG4XUug7R6WiCNKoT0g3kQap6s2H9cEq8a1MpeM7I6W9T-RfItxW_AQAA__96foiP) for the week ending June 28, beating analyst forecasts and signaling continued low layoff levels. The four-week average also declined, falling to 241,500.
## Chestnut Returns to Defend Hot Dog Crown
[The Nathan's Famous Hot Dog Eating Contest](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAQRU-DM1pQBjMdEGxCNptuaGFTNrXCYNnVY3lPv5q-wsRf-nrv_fkcPyMVquvvuKHnpY0Vr7MgMx5jjvt-L-11cJ5onTC-mJZXmWgEBVYqJ5UZU6Ryj6ZLfkEE7Dv02lk9QD9Y22WPET6s7vXwNHNULpkFQaFFA1Z_qOezI__9ppwyWinXm4fp3TQ4DXFeEFVKwihMxO14_G1UOeNS7vaFx2NuW1d8Zt5P0f8SEASE67oeeO71exQQWrm3neZTQDi5HbeAMAoIlAQEYwfQzhoB4e1TI-dYZW4sU1slRqa6yrlVxpPlnGOtWOR-0D_sDp_2i0qhc3DCqHWLVN48_KOIXx7-BwAA__9wIIUs) will once again feature Major League Eating legend Joey Chestnut this year. Chestnut was banned from the competition in 2024 due to sponsorship deals he'd signed with Impossible Foods, a plant-based brand. Chestnut is widely regarded as the greatest professional eater ever, [securing 15 hot dog titles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuwyAUgOHT4C0RYAxhYOjiLV07IjAP-0XYWPg5UW5fpVfo_usb_p-7vwcsuM3fYQVHufoNXkcBImh-Cfv-zvVstEScI4STMJ8lopdcDhduLlz5FLC8veqSywAS-g6cMIPQstfD0C1O3FS0ymgx2T5P-aat0oOMUVurY1a2Q_fRuOFKcG56dVW9idoIGaYMwFNiikNCqu36qLjRArm86xPadaprV9xCtB-s_2JyZHJcw6O2AmE-AQLhNn8qJkcIBO1gchRcd82l_YWl4KENU3xeA5Y_jf614OnkbwAAAP__CbBvtg) since 2007. On the Fourth of July in 2021, he set the all-time record by consuming 76 Nathan's Famous hot dogs in just 10 minutes. Last year's winner, Patrick "Deep Dish" Bertoletti, sees Chestnut's return as an advantage. _" All eyes on him,"_ [Bertoletti said](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ_GdEZmMfhvXPwN3aVNiYy9xhsZjMzeoXv7iChvkHZGmtH3fT7mh6NM-_rhNrQcy7zjdWZkxjondxzvWJ6V00Lrgu7JFJ95oRkUDFIZqfQcHOX3rJtgIyJg36DtzNCN0I_D0CQLC_Rd1MaELo7-H3g0wflx7AatYvCxIXuvKaN0p5Tpdat7s4ymA-cjogpBaIWBuNT2q9DOCWN-lxfW1petyTYxH6fo_wuYBEzXdbUXnYlfdy1gunkETLgzVna0b7iz_A0D4iEDnUkuWLnc2CRTYRnKKn1y2yFgaqoNx0U50zkaodW6Oco_3_wnYS8L3wEAAP__6xaB6g), _" I can just roll in and do my best, and that's all I'm hoping for."_ You can watch the full event live today on ESPN. The women's contest begins at 10:45 a.m. ET, while the men take center stage at noon.

**➤ Former boxing** champion Julio César Chávez Jr. was arrested by ICE on Wednesday in California for overstaying a U.S. tourist visa and now faces deportation to Mexico. clean_body: The on Thursday by a 218-214 vote, advancing a broad legislative package to President Trump’s desk. | | | | | | Friday, July 4, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1776, the Continental Congress formally adopted the Declaration of Independence, announcing the American colonies' separation from Great Britain and . Happy Independence Day! As we celebrate the adoption of the Declaration of Independence, here's your Fourth of July edition--perfect reading between parades, cookouts, and fireworks. As our team spends the holiday with their families, today's edition is abbreviated. We'll be back to the full lineup on Monday. We're sponsored today by , an American-made favorite offering a special Independence Day sale. | House Passes 'Big Beautiful Bill' The on Thursday by a 218-214 vote, advancing a broad legislative package to President Trump’s desk. The measure includes extensions to the 2017 tax law, new funding for defense and border initiatives, and changes to federal benefit programs. The final vote followed a by House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, who criticized the bill’s impact. The passage meets a key July 4 target for the administration and cements a central piece of Trump’s second-term agenda. Hiring Surges, Unemployment Near Record Low The U.S. , surpassing expectations and showing a slight increase from May’s 139,000 gain. The unemployment rate fell to 4.1%, near historic lows, according to the Bureau of Labor Statistics. U.S. for the week ending June 28, beating analyst forecasts and signaling continued low layoff levels. The four-week average also declined, falling to 241,500. Chestnut Returns to Defend Hot Dog Crown will once again feature Major League Eating legend Joey Chestnut this year. Chestnut was banned from the competition in 2024 due to sponsorship deals he'd signed with Impossible Foods, a plant-based brand. Chestnut is widely regarded as the greatest professional eater ever, since 2007. On the Fourth of July in 2021, he set the all-time record by consuming 76 Nathan's Famous hot dogs in just 10 minutes. Last year's winner, Patrick "Deep Dish" Bertoletti, sees Chestnut's return as an advantage. " All eyes on him," , " I can just roll in and do my best, and that's all I'm hoping for." You can watch the full event live today on ESPN. The women's contest begins at 10:45 a.m. ET, while the men take center stage at noon. | Peter – protesters were loud and clear that America has NO KINGS: more than **5 MILLION people peacefully protested his tyranny.** Our democracy is at stake and we cannot stand by while Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies turn our country into a dictatorship! [**We're fired up and want to continue this momentum by DEMANDING that our senators support the No Kings Act. Our petition needs 7,000 names before 11:59 PM so we can send it to the Hill. Will you be one of the many champions who continues to fight for our democracy?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fda0f32-dacd-4922-96f1-0b07224e7c83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T131533ec-bcb0-43eb-846a-d671e86d77a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4e8812e-7fc6-4737-8257-3ecafb64773c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| People are TIRED of Trump's MAGA disaster and reintroducing the No Kings Act would mean: ❌ Trump would be convicted of all of his crimes, including his 34 felonies. ❌ The 6-3 conservative majority Supreme Court would be held accountable for any activities involving corruption. ❌ We would protect our democracy by STOPPING the MAGA agenda once and for all. ❌ Trump would never be allowed in the White House again!! It's critical that we act now and fight for our democracy before Trump completely destroys it! Lucille, there are no kings in our country, and we're going to keep it that way. **[Please will you be one of the 7,000 people that step up and demand that our senators put an end to Trump's tyranny by supporting the No Kings Act? Hurry, before the petition closes at midnight!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b29b59e-69f1-4c31-be78-b736644c9d5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84a91c9a-35f4-47a2-8c70-fbf138cb0a35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Celebrating America!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I hope you enjoy a great Independence Day with your loved ones.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, This is one of my favorite days of the year - there's not much that beats gathering with family and friends for barbeque, a few beers, and fireworks to celebrate our Founding Fathers' courageous stand to unshackle us from British rule.
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.-GwDqAutMrM_w)
---
249 years ago, the Second Continental Congress officially adopted our Declaration of Independence. They laid out their vision for a new type of nation, where "all men are created equal" and where the purpose of our government is to ensure the unalienable rights of "life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness."

In the end, the toll paid by the American patriots was very high, with tens of thousands killed and thousands more grievously injured. They risked it all to win our Freedom. **And ever since, the brave men and women who 've served in our United States Armed Forces have defended the freedom and way of life they secured. **
Today, let us recognize and show our appreciation for the sacrifices made by so many to build and protect the America we know and love. I will be _proudly_ celebrating America, and I wish you and your family a very happy 4th of July!

_Happy Independence Day and God Bless America!_

Ted Cruz
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://trk.tedcruz._wNavkpeALvOoVYgZZzg)
---

Houston, TX 77265

body:

| | Hey Reader, I got you a gift for you... Something to help protect you and your family while you’re on the road. And you’re going to want this, especially if you travel with your CCW. Because you don’t want to go to court with nothing but a story... you need solid, indisputable evidence...

body:
The Department of Homeland Security is [installing 17 miles of waterborne barriers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SrCAQhZ8GMixgFGYCgpuYzU03tPhplapWpgB1fPstZ_cNNuyurj7n-76ew9NGjOv03y5g6ntMwwpHQagV8rCkDC7lANlt6SzbegD6tMA0SC47xjXj7RBsxHNoaTCOh4egYITuhJLqrh50Nt61_iaD7K5dJ7zjAtTdBfVwwPlN0WiuZ1zzVgguuGpA37kWUrejkhaCJi2HEGvKTZ2hwtuWEc-0Q258WiiaudZXIbd_RPZE9sdxNLtFhNPDWrPF64rI_sIissfkLbLfIcyFvbZa4zoxodkSEQpLI8txh8w-zCytrKStzuyTzH50ENnTbMLriIixqKvitNj4yaL1bx53I78DAAD__3V3ibA) in the Rio Grande near Brownsville as a deterrent to illegal border crossings, according to a Thursday press release. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem signed a waiver to expedite construction.

# Friday, July 4, 2025
---|---
**Happy Independence Day!** On this day in 1904, the first regular passenger train passed through the new town of Kingsville, established on land donated by the nearby King Ranch. A celebration marked the completion of the [first 142 miles of track](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2urCAURp9GO81my48WFLexm9ue0qBslARlgswwvv2J8wqnWtW3vmT9PKaH8cEf63-zk84fF6eDyhkoZ0rTHhPNMVlK8yte5-soFJa40zohoGhANcAna3y4Jl5bPYMdWE2aKcEkyl4O9aal4FIsohMdLgP0IMh1veucdIASOld7fctAAWcMGMiWVA-KoeJOoiGrKg5kfY6pzRtl-pjThSu-KbVL3Ougt5yfZ9X9q3CscCyltPncTDyCP6iNaa1w_K4aa65mvm5UONKR003JsU7aPosPwZ_yflt348NXnv-W5K3xNwAA__8WLXUW) for the St. Louis, Brownsville and Mexico Railway. Dallas native and Highland Park graduate Clayton Kershaw became the 20th major league pitcher to log 3,000 strikeouts on Wednesday night when his Los Angeles Dodgers beat the Chicago White Sox at home. Read about the time he struck out [every single batter he faced](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGOpDAQRU8DWbXswtgQEGxCNptuiApcBmsMRrZnPH37VfcVJn7S1396_z6WD_LBX_tfOnkqPy4uF9ccuBROyxkTrzFZTutXfOavq3LY4sn7ggJ7EAaEWiz58FxUa6dV2FG2PEnTS4160GN7THK1blDjim6TvWRcLcmhGwcpOyk70bV-eo0JI5SUQgr9YDMII9Eop5HYmkYJtr7E9CgHF_6h7MIzfnN6bPFsw3SUcuem-9Pg3OBca31UR_SCDc6Uit8CNzjnO6aSG5xDzEDXzoEz2Gh3Thm2QM8SL_jklA-qcHNyvBXY6WQ4_H4EuizclD7h_QBQCP0GkLcjxtDgjIMBNfadFtaBVqsG5ZyC1XAHhnC0aLUae9emyd7Vh-CzfsntJ_nwdim_K_A94f8AAAD__8r9meQ) during a high school game in 2006. We’re glad you’re clicking on the stories we’re sharing. _The Texas Flyover’s_ engagement rate exceeds industry benchmarks, which tells us we’re delivering the kinds of stories our readers care about. Today’s edition of _The Texas Flyover_ is a bit shorter than usual as our team takes time off to observe the Fourth of July holiday weekend with loved ones. We will return with a full edition on Monday. Today, [Service Plus Home Warranty](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0E1uqzAUxfHVmFmQ78XYMPDgPUV0lFT9kNIZMviSWDU4Mk6c7L6iW-j8r5-OzunQH4zzbjkfzUw6PabQL5RXTylR7OcQaQjRUhxu4bnelkx-DDOde-RY77jacdFb4_yzF4XVA7ctFKRB1SBRNrItLpqkNbwW7URGTKAqaLECiePYioZLawqnN4wrLgA4cFmSargCVGKSaMgqJjhZl0Is04USPcw6-We4UyzHMBdeX1K6rqz6x7Bj2OWcyxzHb7cM3m8Fww5foAF4Q8mw258-2v_vxy2uujGSSe5OvbOs2tdSqoahXG8DsGr_-dW9FlHba3beu1VuQ86zcb9qkf721l3jTwAAAP__aRd7Cg) is sponsoring us and offering a special Fourth of July sale to our readers.

## DHS Installing 17 Miles of Border Buoys
The Department of Homeland Security is [installing 17 miles of waterborne barriers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SrCAQhZ8GMixgFGYCgpuYzU03tPhplapWpgB1fPstZ_cNNuyurj7n-76ew9NGjOv03y5g6ntMwwpHQagV8rCkDC7lANlt6SzbegD6tMA0SC47xjXj7RBsxHNoaTCOh4egYITuhJLqrh50Nt61_iaD7K5dJ7zjAtTdBfVwwPlN0WiuZ1zzVgguuGpA37kWUrejkhaCJi2HEGvKTZ2hwtuWEc-0Q258WiiaudZXIbd_RPZE9sdxNLtFhNPDWrPF64rI_sIissfkLbLfIcyFvbZa4zoxodkSEQpLI8txh8w-zCytrKStzuyTzH50ENnTbMLriIixqKvitNj4yaL1bx53I78DAAD__3V3ibA) in the Rio Grande near Brownsville as a deterrent to illegal border crossings. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem signed a waiver to expedite construction. The state installed 1,000 feet of buoys near Eagle Pass in 2023 at a cost of $1 million. The Biden administration sued to remove the barrier, but it remained in place through a series of rulings and appeals. After President Trump’s return to office, Gov. Greg Abbott announced he would be [adding more buoys](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSqzAMQE8DnTO2v7GTwsVv6LLtlozAgnjWWIzsBHL7HXKFrVRI8-Y9fd-HO8QU8_IFK_p6zDRk3EvCWpGHlRhH4oA8PuldnnnHNNGKy6Cl7oR0QpohQEzvwbTBjzLcVIteuU5Zba_21j68MdDZ0Ck1ThqkdG5SxlkdNHRXNdqujf6ESSeNUlJJe0F3lU5pZ2arAYNrjMQQK_GlPrDiAWVOb3ohXyZa2-QftW6l-fe_0X2j-5-Zjvo6V43uz5ZzQI2UxU6cQqN7hCWh2KAUURCLwGODXM4LmgVHEgtDDijOaDECc0QWzxyQRcZdQFhjjqXyh9qyD9seU4rFnqrLCjF9zOrf_vny-jcAAP__1NmNcg). The announcement follows news that apprehensions of illegal immigrants at the southern border [reached an all-time low](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAQhuHTQGZku8GGwMEmZL3phsjgoqmVf5BdNM3tR8wcYeKSSu_z_XtOT4se4-uvDWDos6Ypwlk8EEGeQsowp-wgz0e6yhFP8EsK8Joklx3jmvF2chb9NbW1MzN3g6jBCN0JJVWvhnozg5wfFoTuVb9ooTq1uLXv7Pxwru3aQdRo7mdc81YILrhqQPdcC6nbVUkLTlctB4eUckMbEHxsWf2V3pCbJYXam41oL9XjTyXHSo7neTZr-tyK-17JcU8eCZdSyZHyEXZmXcCIhbIlTJGVzd7awn6orMByZKSLZVhSdoX9PyIwu-8ZNogFUywsQ7AYmU9nnY3bT_Qei7pTX8Gi_y6j3-35NvIrAAD__2iZj3g) of 6,070 in June. _“The world is hearing our message: the border is closed to law breakers,”_ said Noem. Meanwhile, the Texas Health and Human Services Commission released data that illegal immigrants accounted for [more than 100,000 hospital visits](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2yozAMhZ8GOmVsX4KhoNgm3d12S0axFdBc_7C2CMnb75BXWLWaOd_5zp_v-Rs5cFp-Y6RJXo88JzpqIBEqc8yF7rl4Kvc9v-ueDgouR1pmo8wVlAXVzR45vOeu9dNd-VG3NGl71b3ph35s12ns3HgdBnMd7ZfvO-vw7gbUDo0jUsa2PJ1hyqpOa6VVfyE7KKuN7R69QfK26RR5llwuspLQC-sjvPOTysXl2IZpFdlq8_WrMbfG3I7juPy8MJ3Pxtw4PakKLyicU23M7XQCWTGBVufBnnx2e6Qk5GFDYUpSoeZ9WQUcFgJ8CBX4kGHNdWPBUOGgQlDo786FPEgGrD_AMfJSPjCogrKfyLZMfjs4BK79abNE5PApL_83-XMy_wIAAP__1WuaxA) between November 2024 and February 2025 at a cost of $434 million. The information is being collected in accordance with a directive issued by Abbott last August.
## 'Biggest Structure In The World'
SpaceX CEO Elon Musk has said the new $250 million Gigabay factory being built at the company’s launch site in Starbase is designed to [produce 1,000 Starship rockets a year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU8DHWg8gJ0ULrahy7ZbojEewJLByHZCuP2K7BG2_Xp6ejM_j-FBzrtt_qaVdX5PYdj4SJ5z5jisIbIJ0XI0z3Cm53awH8PK84CAXQWqgnaw5Pw5tKXVBuxdlKyF6oREeZP3ctEIFqdGMowWG3NXsjETS-puk2V1A1E6fclAQSsECJD1NSuBqp0kEltVtMDW5RDrvHDmN6XJn-HFsR7DWnq95LynovkqsC-wP46jXs9EG205bC5cUIH9dVWBfQrPvFQfSYE9xexGz9e-08jvanYzGTqrlCkaSvxHVggtQKe6el_2Mmq7H857l-SVNq_k_Kck_-9_L42_AQAA__9rXIZm) and could be “one of the biggest structures in the world.” A similar facility is being built in Florida. Musk made the remarks during a May 29 company meeting in which he discussed his vision for establishing a self-sustaining colony on Mars. Two days earlier, the ninth Starship test flight ended in the destruction of the rocket and Super Heavy booster. _“These numbers, while they are insanely high by traditional space standards, are achievable by humans because they have been achieved in other industries,”_ Musk said during the meeting, which was [posted to social media](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LtuwyAUxvGnwVsizuFmBoYu3tKlQ7tZ2BwSJBwiILe3r9xX6PoNv0_6f5_mk085Xc-ffiPXX7HMV3q2TL1TnbdSaSk1UF3u5d3u1yfltWx0npGjOnBz4HIOPuX3LIfgFh4sDOTAKNCoR22Hi6MYUCglgpDcWMntquwaQVvEJZKlIbkd44ZLAA5cH8mM3AAaGTV6CoZJTiH1Uo_9Qp1evsX8Lg-qx7VsQ3aX3m-NiQ-GE8Ppta8Mp6-bX-mH4dS67_fGcAKLI4xKKLBCoLBawlBduD1Tzqnp_ee8-ZT_2P6_GA-HvwEAAP__ePZwTw). Work on the 700,000-square-foot factory has already begun. A 24/7 livestream of several sites at Starbase can be viewed on the independent media platform [LabPadre](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz7GOhCAUheGnkW7MhUFwCopt7GbbLQnIVUmuYpAZxrffuK-w_Tlf8v887dNFitv87VY05TMlu2E9CEvBbNeU0accMPtXOo_XVpHGtOJsBYjuBvoG0gYX6bSSBeMhPDhDw3XHlVC9erDFdD3IIDvpJ69hGu_Ce63BYRgRe-V7Fs2FgQbJOXBQLeoeNBdaTko4DLqRgCGWlNuyYMGPOyY60xtzO6aVkVlK2Y_m_tWIoRFDrbUl53cXMl6DRgwsm7DXSBQPdWnz6iL9ncv_kt9G_AYAAP__P2VrUA).

The ACLU of Texas sued 11 school districts on behalf of 16 families. clean_body: The Department of Homeland Security is in the Rio Grande near Brownsville as a deterrent to illegal border crossings, according to a Thursday press release. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem signed a waiver to expedite construction. | | | | | | Friday, July 4, 2025 ---|--- Happy Independence Day! On this day in 1904, the first regular passenger train passed through the new town of Kingsville, established on land donated by the nearby King Ranch. A celebration marked the completion of the for the St. Louis, Brownsville and Mexico Railway. Dallas native and Highland Park graduate Clayton Kershaw became the 20th major league pitcher to log 3,000 strikeouts on Wednesday night when his Los Angeles Dodgers beat the Chicago White Sox at home. Read about the time he struck out during a high school game in 2006. We’re glad you’re clicking on the stories we’re sharing. The Texas Flyover’s engagement rate exceeds industry benchmarks, which tells us we’re delivering the kinds of stories our readers care about. Today’s edition of The Texas Flyover is a bit shorter than usual as our team takes time off to observe the Fourth of July holiday weekend with loved ones. We will return with a full edition on Monday. Today, is sponsoring us and offering a special Fourth of July sale to our readers. Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | DHS Installing 17 Miles of Border Buoys The Department of Homeland Security is in the Rio Grande near Brownsville as a deterrent to illegal border crossings. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem signed a waiver to expedite construction. The state installed 1,000 feet of buoys near Eagle Pass in 2023 at a cost of $1 million. The Biden administration sued to remove the barrier, but it remained in place through a series of rulings and appeals. After President Trump’s return to office, Gov. Greg Abbott announced he would be . The announcement follows news that apprehensions of illegal immigrants at the southern border of 6,070 in June. “The world is hearing our message: the border is closed to law breakers,” said Noem. Meanwhile, the Texas Health and Human Services Commission released data that illegal immigrants accounted for between November 2024 and February 2025 at a cost of $434 million. The information is being collected in accordance with a directive issued by Abbott last August. 'Biggest Structure In The World' SpaceX CEO Elon Musk has said the new $250 million Gigabay factory being built at the company’s launch site in Starbase is designed to and could be “one of the biggest structures in the world.” A similar facility is being built in Florida. Musk made the remarks during a May 29 company meeting in which he discussed his vision for establishing a self-sustaining colony on Mars. Two days earlier, the ninth Starship test flight ended in the destruction of the rocket and Super Heavy booster. “These numbers, while they are insanely high by traditional space standards, are achievable by humans because they have been achieved in other industries,” Musk said during the meeting, which was . Work on the 700,000-square-foot factory has already begun. Among the new suspects are two former mayors, Pearsall ISD trustee Maricela Garcia Benavides, and Frio County commissioner Raul Carrizales III. () ➤ Austin: ElliCor, a Houston-based toy store that sells collectibles like the popular Labubu dolls, opened its seventh store in Texas last weekend. Customers formed a line that wrapped around the building. () ➤ Fort Worth: Merit Street Media, the TV network founded in 2023 by celebrity psychologist Dr. Phil McGraw, has filed for bankruptcy and is suing Trinity Broadcasting Network, its launch partner, over failed distribution promises. () ➤ Amarillo: Union members at the Tyson Foods meatpacking plant have ratified a new four-year collective bargaining agreement that includes a 32% pay raise, additional time off, and expanded retirement benefits. Members had threatened to strike last week. () ➤ Houston: A resident walked out his front door Tuesday to find a large alligator sunbathing in his front yard. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Lewiston Police Launch Crime Suppression Initiative to Curb Rising Violence, Shootings
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Lewiston Police Launch Crime Suppression Initiative to Curb Rising Violence, Shootings (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=ad15c731ea&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Edward Tomic on Jul 03, 2025 03:53 pm
The Lewiston Police Department announced on Thursday that they have launched a new initiative they are calling a crime suppression enforcement detail to combat a recent uptick of violent crimes in the city. [RELATED: Arrest Made in Fatal Lewiston Shooting of 17-Year-Old...] According to Lewiston Police, they conducted a multi-jurisdiction crime suppression enforcement detail on [...]

name: John Kasich
subject: Happy Birthday America!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
As we celebrate America's Independence Day, I've been reflecting on what it means to be an American| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/LXvvoYU3g5bS0YwkvB0AFwCWxWuZia9uN11vCkNSLQL4eGYAYq1Yn0cAxlr5vu8E2O9J8QOP2G5ohgJprJSUcSq5Oa5MOcHdObVuBYTEyzjIb2IpJpSnNa8iDb1jirmjYMUq16l0DFy0DXo8QnYzthmy3xMyznfWqspKmKDdkZLE_oOLeqeJs2wWY2EGcSaQMn2UKmbInATO-TXPIOXGIznlHeZZX_inE0qL1bnU_y7haC2DAta6VHGcQJMhUcHl8fhEWHp9cdtHabQIOX-eW2YKuKIrwfmjRKKiXMO1H-YBVn7TeAR0P6TOS2vw2CQHM6Pqc_5CHZnI4ZU4wDu--F79_b-TeqCqq9QFQA0oXw/_LWerHh2Kb4Gap6pR7dMpbZzxLjHag35/10)
---
Peter, As we celebrate America's Independence Day, I've been reflecting on what it means to be an American, and why the nature of our politics in Washington D.C. seems to sometimes project to the world an image of our nation that is losing our honor and compassion.

But away from the Washington circus, I see those American values reflected every day in simple acts of kindness. I see them when strangers hold doors open for others, or when one driver lets another go in front of them in traffic, or when someone donates food or cash to a homeless person they pass. That’s what it means to be an American.

The great power of America is not revealed by the actions of our elected leaders - it's shown by each of us in the way that we make a positive difference in our communities or on the lives of others by the actions we take each day.

I believe that America will rediscover what we can achieve when we heal this divide and work together again. I'm not naive to the scale of the challenge, but our nation's birthday is a time to reflect on all of our history: the achievements, the mistakes made, the lessons learned, the opportunity for hope.

Together, we have faced division before and I know that our brightest days are ahead. I'm counting on you to keep the faith!

Thank you for all that you are doing to help. Happy Birthday America! -John
---

clean_body: As we celebrate America's Independence Day, I've been reflecting on what it means to be an American| | | Peter, As we celebrate America's Independence Day, I've been reflecting on what it means to be an American, and why the nature of our politics in Washington D.C. seems to sometimes project to the world an image of our nation that is losing our honor and compassion. But away from the Washington circus, I see those American values reflected every day in simple acts of kindness. I see them when strangers hold doors open for others, or when one driver lets another go in front of them in traffic, or when someone donates food or cash to a homeless person they pass. That’s what it means to be an American. The great power of America is not revealed by the actions of our elected leaders - it's shown by each of us in the way that we make a positive difference in our communities or on the lives of others by the actions we take each day. I believe that America will rediscover what we can achieve when we heal this divide and work together again. I'm not naive to the scale of the challenge, but our nation's birthday is a time to reflect on all of our history: the achievements, the mistakes made, the lessons learned, the opportunity for hope. Together, we have faced division before and I know that our brightest days are ahead. I'm counting on you to keep the faith! Thank you for all that you are doing to help. Happy Birthday America! -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

Friend,
---
We're on the 1-yard line, and we're either about to score big or fumble badly.
---
_The latest Rasmussen polling shows the Democrats ' lead in the midterms has been CUT DOWN to just **1 POINT** ... well within the **_margin_ _of_ _error_**._
---
But here's the kicker - one of our greatest advantages in the 2024 election was our unparalleled voter data.
---
A fully verified file allowed us to not only see who the most high-propensity voters were, but also where Republicans could most _effectively_ spend our resources to WIN.
---
_However, as it stands this year, we 're still missing countless voter profiles, leaving key zip codes unrepresented._
---
**After all our hard work to send President Trump back to the White House and secure majorities in both chambers of Congress last November, I REFUSE to allow one of our biggest 2024 _advantages_ turn into our ACHILLES HEEL at the midterms! **
---
Friend, we've crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
_That 's why I'm reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats._

name: With Honor Action
subject: A Fourth of July Message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a3f4878ae64e/bats-brews-and-a-birthday-salute-to-the-us-army-14053232?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| Friends,

As we gather with loved ones this Independence Day to celebrate our nation’s birth, we are reminded of the core ideals that have helped shape the United States—life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

At With Honor Action, we believe the best way to honor these ideals is through public service and principled leadership—especially in our highest legislative body, the U.S. Congress. During a time of historic polarization and dysfunction, we continue to support the principled veteran leaders in Congress who demonstrate that courage, integrity, and putting country before party are not relics of the past—they are essential for our future.

Many veteran leaders who are now in Congress are consistently working across the aisle to get things done, from strengthening national security to expanding opportunities to serve our great country. Their example provides a powerful antidote to division.

And it was their work that was a central topic of a conversation With Honor Co-Founder and CEO Rye Barcott recently had with Jeanne Meserve on the Special Competitive Studies Project's NatSec Tech podcast. The [episode](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=c4e00a26b8&e=33f53a5b1a), which just came out on Wednesday, was not just about With Honor Action's work, but the work of bipartisan veteran leaders in Congress who work across party lines on everything from biotechnology, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence to foreign policy and expanding service opportunities in America, both uniformed and non-uniformed.
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=33eb3cc8ba&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| This Fourth of July, as we reflect on what unites us as Americans, let us also look to the leaders who embody that spirit—those who have worn the uniform and now serve with honor in our halls of government. Their example should inspire us all to overcome gridlock, rebuild trust in our democracy, and remember that unity is not uniformity—it is a shared commitment to something greater than ourselves.

>From everyone at With Honor Action, we wish you a safe, joyful, and meaningful Independence Day.
---
|
---
| | | | Please follow With Honor Action on Twitter via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=3a956fe96d&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.
---

name: Governor Kelly Ayotte
subject: Happy Independence Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108
body:
We are blessed to live in the greatest nation on earth.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friend,
Happy Independence Day! We are so blessed to live in the greatest nation on earth.
Joe, Kate, Jake, and I hope you have a wonderful day celebrating our country with family, friends, and hopefully some good food!
Wherever you may be celebrating, we hope you will take time to remember and thank the men and women of our military who are deployed overseas to protect our freedom, as well as our first responders keeping us safe here at home. Their dedication and sacrifice make it possible for us to enjoy days like today.
It’s an honor to celebrate our country and represent New Hampshire as your Governor. Thank you as always for your continued support.
Wishing you a safe, fun, and Happy Independence Day!
All the best,
Kelly
---
| Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108
---

name: Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: Delegate Sewell's Fourth of July Newsletter
body:
| |
---
# District 25 Fourth of July Newsletter
---
|
---
Dear Inquirer,
---
|
---
As we come together with family, friends, and neighbors to recognize the 249th year of national independence, I encourage each of you to take a moment to reflect on the values of freedom, democracy, and our ongoing effort to build a more perfect union. Whether you plan to attend a backyard barbecue, enjoy a fireworks display, or take a well-deserved break, I hope today is filled with hope and community. In this newsletter, you will find highlights from recent events, updates on stories making headlines across Northern Virginia, and a list of exciting events coming up in and around the Greater Prince William Area. Whether staying close to home or traveling for the holiday, I hope this newsletter helps you feel informed and connected to all that is happening in this place we call home.
---
In this newsletter, you will find highlights from recent events, updates on stories making headlines across Northern Virginia, and a list of exciting events coming up in and around the Greater Prince William Area. Whether you are staying close to home or traveling for the holiday, I hope this newsletter helps you feel informed and connected to all that is happening in this place we call home.
---
**WHAT TO DO IN AND AROUND PRINCE WILLIAM COUNTY FOR THE FOURTH OF JULY**
---
**Event Title:** **Dale City Independence Day Parade and Family Fun Day** **Date:** Friday, July 4, 2025 **Address:** The parade will process down Dale Boulevard, Dale City's main drag, from Kirkdale Drive to the Dale City Commuter Lot. **Time:** Line-up begins at 9:00 AM, and the parade will kick off at 10:00 AM. **Additional Details:** Now in its 54th year, the Dale City Independence Day Parade is one of Virginia’s largest and oldest Fourth of July parades. Immediately after the parade, mosey on over to the Family Fun Day in the Dale City Commuter Lot. Visit with vendors, play games, and enjoy concessions until 2:00 PM. **Event Title:****Firecracker 5k and 1 Mile Fun Run** **Date:** Friday, July 4, 2025 **Address:** Freedom Aquatic and Fitness Center, 9100 Freedom Center Boulevard, Manassas **Time:** The 5K race begins at 8:30 AM and the 1-mile walk/run at 9:30 AM Additional Details: A portion of the race proceeds will benefit Hero’s Bridge, a local nonprofit that supports elderly veterans. Visit [freedomfirecracker5k.com](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/sbk0nXRBQBkvWP6MpVzKMg~~/AAS2yhA~/o5uQM8OqyDxkPNP2oK38ceJuaKL11mkXluDSXCLRVDBpvkwBBz-3KecfqgOxG929LRT9-hAcyrNtV1X388hji9pkn_1-QHSh5vueVObf5teryGrEXa1zBfM9SWhJeijN) for more information. **Event Title:****Celebrate America Fireworks Display** **Date:** Friday, July 4, 2025 Address: Historic Downtown Manassas, 9431 West Street, Manassas **Time:** 3:00 PM - 10:00 PM **Additional Details:** Ring in the 4th of July in the heart of Historic Downtown Manassas. The fireworks show will kick off at 9:15 PM. Starting at 3:00 PM, games and rides for kids, face painting, 4th of July memorabilia, plus multiple food and craft vendors. Uncle Sam and Lady Liberty will be in attendance. Bring lawn chairs or blankets to get your best seats on the Manassas Museum Lawn and beyond! Please note that the downtown parking garage will be closed. All are advised to leave their pets at home. **Event Title:****Manassas Park Fourth of July Fireworks Display** **Date:** Saturday, July 5, 2025 **Address:** Signal Hill Park, 9300 Signal View Drive, Manassas **Time:** 5:00 PM - 10:00 PM Additional Details: Manassas Park will host Independence Day with an evening of food trucks, outdoor activities, fellowship, and fireworks once dark. Free shuttles will run from the VRE Station to Signal Hill Park starting at 5:00 PM. Fireworks begin at 9:15 PM. Visit [manassasparkva.gov](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/TmBJ1Wfwh5C9HdwPwoOX-g~~/AAS2yhA~/_2YscMn1YkT7jZBnUPKcdpcEv9yGcvH1-EqWSHmnGgkWUgEebiL6ZL99WRl9n_TQPfsSkc9DkVjTWJpiJHVRXrlfjUg4ZJC5fveLZpc_ZRhQpOwBJO7nYe6b6BusYe9q) to learn more. **Event Title:****Dumfries Independence Day Fireworks Display** **Date:** Sunday, July 6, 2025 **Address:** Garrison Park, 17749 Main St., Dumfries **Time:** 5:00 PM - 10:00 PM Additional Details: Come out and enjoy food vendors and live music. Fireworks will start at dusk. Be sure to pack a blanket and/or lawn chair to take in the display.
---
**MEET THE HONORABLE LISA MICHELLE BAIRD**
---
On July 1, 2025, the Honorable Lisa Michelle Baird officially assumed her role as a Circuit Court Judge for the 31st Judicial Circuit, serving an eight-year term. A familiar and respected figure in the Prince William community, Judge Baird brings with her a long-standing commitment to justice, fairness, and public service. The name may ring a bell as Judge Baird previously served with distinction on the Juvenile and Domestic Relations District Court bench. During her tenure, she earned a reputation for presiding with compassion, fairness, and thoughtful leadership in cases involving some of the most vulnerable members of our community: children and families navigating incredibly difficult circumstances. Judge Baird’s approach was marked not only by a deep respect for the law but by an unwavering commitment to equity and empathy.
---
|
---
Now, as the latest addition to the Circuit Court, I have no doubt Judge Baird will bring the same integrity, wisdom, and care to matters of equal or greater complexity and consequence. Her experience and judicial temperament will undoubtedly serve the community well. I look forward to the fairness, integrity, and leadership she will bring to every courtroom.
---
**THE 2025 GENERAL ELECTION**
---
The statewide tickets for the November 4, 2025, General Election are set. On the Republican ticket, you have:
* [Winsome Earle-Sears](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/GoBADYTovagDNvcg8no_Aw~~/AAS2yhA~/HYXN8Gce9F8mvyT-kAxHig9HXSe0gvGCVv9AUPPzAIiBaSqK6yUiIWw5pRGksnUfGH3a4uo-HmNsDcOXMk3E8V82BBafXTv1MzJO9DzqOwjDIIlqHxc-H_uPoWwlzO15) for Governor
* [John Reid](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/bb9tznUja2mshte7N9pvpQ~~/AAS2yhA~/YQnZCo9Orx7BpIai1pyPL60SMs680rkhqYOMkXdXyLNYSBuVWBHcBGpPeDd4xgdIFc7m_jdpBZToXeFSi7uM0iNCPlQjKctJB03J5ucZR59IspYZKePQfAfAFRiLjaPb) for Lieutenant Governor
* [Jason Miyares](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/Whm9HEwBZ0UzbNuCJyefUw~~/AAS2yhA~/XvO33WYhZc66naEK0xE94C4s1u29MEUUUCwD1WmBSqFiyVFVP41zcmd4YwpkIS5d941vSZX41IsRWrI7mG2MVnw9IdO1SFS-ZJ2xOPuQ228~) seeking re-election as Attorney General

On the Democratic ticket, you have:
* [Abigail Spanberger](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/oAnRlWieUZRaUhPxSKrXZQ~~/AAS2yhA~/KISRJ1QvgUeBvi1PlforRxaSZdfQG2pO6CulhDYsn2IDGQ4QRVOatZaJl4aVtHE4dsUf7oeFZyJ_AxCJ9hC5nzvV9mJSW6qkuPXMqwruV37tXcbV-4ToBckOsm0oynwK) for Governor
* [Ghazala Hashmi](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/xW-vbWLsrCT5LtUd5SesNw~~/AAS2yhA~/HYXN8Gce9F8mvyT-kAxHil8_ALlqE-BVOv9LS1C32kNy7Ilop7HHCpGfGfuV6F4TGviGOcvS1mJkuxrV65z7foYV4atS8vMm_cu3xWedIo_2-QnHZrAz4AEcM54C9hFP) for Lieutenant Governor
* [Jay Jones](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/gHnHZjcV8DbQDncc242DKQ~~/AAS2yhA~/0h_-QNeDcyiO62xS2PEMVXttZzw-DgTY73wq3-jxpynjJ2VINSMrp5XN5iQWUFeSqKlSB41ng_0a5HwE_Qyq6MjBTsRNPEbCg1fqsvKf0ys~) for Attorney General

Please note that a full list of certified candidates, including down-ballot races and any third-party entries, will be posted [here](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/nsmqOWsd1WJBkRDNY32_7Q~~/AAS2yhA~/SLr2reWY_Hwkk9hB2Plo_dsDonrB-iY8xCFa-xrbcED3SCzGaf01mHl_FdhX-YMCAbIhK6BU0rAPR2z5c3gc26o6hx9jtRaKRtLAzErylxHhl1o1a-h3SP4tHVXZfFQtdbc03_8VU289NEAA6u_URsLBx7vtdJ5nj__H1_DZYB4~) no later than July 11th on the Virginia Department of Elections website.
---
**GENERAL ELECTION DATES OF NOTE**
---
Below, you will find election days of note for the November 4th General Election. [**Register to Vote/Update Voter Registration Deadline**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/_SdugRp20BG8H_ThNaDAzA~~/AAS2yhA~/V-tM06tfymGRY4RMTa5eeAwS0v55xjgRRUyCQeFd0vhGHpesYdSSOhetp8Dh0HeDOD2kbdBzMqdhWXUSeXrZKm2OQd8YL2_1wPlJL7K9BdXO-yOljuUeYtLBr6KKCp2at6U2Cy5PTF_yLhPDyIP9aqAYAFGQFLFtBkHdo3XTqTqtUnDGAuFiqaXaGPIhARnvRyUYRqI0qELXbVAlHZsN-iMdaHGnEVvwr6maQgEpeDuk6vuwAflqDBCLjAFmZs2LCdZzAvnOS5cHtR5mgks7WQ~~)**[:](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/_SdugRp20BG8H_ThNaDAzA~~/AAS2yhA~/V-tM06tfymGRY4RMTa5eeAwS0v55xjgRRUyCQeFd0vhGHpesYdSSOhetp8Dh0HeDOD2kbdBzMqdhWXUSeXrZKm2OQd8YL2_1wPlJL7K9BdXO-yOljuUeYtLBr6KKCp2at6U2Cy5PTF_yLhPDyIP9aqAYAFGQFLFtBkHdo3XTqTqtUnDGAuFiqaXaGPIhARnvRyUYRqI0qELXbVAlHZsN-iMdaHGnEVvwr6maQgEpeDuk6vuwAflqDBCLjAFmZs2LCdZzAvnOS5cHtR5mgks7WQ~~) **October 24, 2025 You can still vote if you miss the registration deadline by using Same Day Voter Registration (SDVR). SDVR starts the day after the regular deadline and ends on Election Day for in-person voting. Please note:
* If you register using SDVR, you will need to cast a provisional ballot.
* You must register and vote at the same location when using SDVR.
* During early voting, you can use SDVR at your Local Registrar's office or a satellite voting location in your locality.
* On Election Day, you can only use SDVR at your precinct polling place.

**Early In-Person Voting:** Friday, September 19, 2025- Saturday, November 1, 2025 [**Apply to Vote Absentee by Mail**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/R0zPZxLXDucqayjuUi26oQ~~/AAS2yhA~/evL-Oqjzl8i3AB1e5F8D4Gs6LcL0mPODb-HPp6TSrxEdSTBE-LKvFWs9Rp0qgvhzWIvSkqbrMkCTXMBX_39mGNZsyQF2pMLNul4Qg6xLIiCFMq6wv5numwu8iHym1zb3wPQ3x0sVKXULzHcQo-2kt2dTFoReGf3qE_3pWoWXBRM~)**:** Now through Friday, October 24, 2025
---
**HATE CRIMES SECURITY GRANTS** **APPLICATIONS RE-OPEN**
---
After celebrating Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Month and Jewish American Heritage Month earlier this year, we are reminded once again of the rich contributions these communities make to our nation and the importance of ensuring their safety and dignity in the face of rising hate. In light of the heartbreaking loss of two members of the Jewish community in Washington, D.C., my commitment to combating hate in all its forms remains unwavering. No one should live in fear because of who they are or what they believe. In support of this commitment, the Virginia Department of Criminal Justice Services has reopened applications for the [Hate Crimes Security Grant Program](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/A6NgzQy37a3mIrVAGQzRRA~~/AAS2yhA~/gq6tD-qwf-ZhnFGHdTfwziN6yKC4wuTXjw4TS10xKAz1YPq1jvYJ_xbXIv_HpqCVk6bFv_amZSPeHbtpvrt5B3ElQ0S0TFi41Rx-Tsz8c9nYxct4JbHuAz4pxK_IhMXciPpI6OFTi8r5tSlww1e9EhOlh-Z_rZMpjv_HgjTS5H9hGFwCemtLo9QZtmhYXXcNfdPS4TcRmkOeB9Me_PjZUHYhXix_1v-xdvD3hmg5YIg~). This vital funding helps at-risk nonprofit organizations and places of worship enhance their physical security and better protect against hate-motivated threats. I encourage local organizations and places of worship to apply, and ask that you share this opportunity widely to help protect vulnerable communities. **Learn more and apply**[**here**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/VvB1mf30lEboTkd2FLS-fg~~/AAS2yhA~/w98vmwtF49b-F43GJU0s-xtrtJJq84VNO3vwkuUp_snZaYE7qT3V02W31wfczi7e4hOO9XlI-DlUleRvvBKb9Kx2InSCnf2g73nt-4KmJB0N5_bGV62ZRl1EP3i_mWfhhK6cDsVC3hflZewipLYsssRWbNNqeWBr0Vrx0HsjEfWGyCkgfLMDzRbatNFwvqN4Q1OUajEtVkqyIDmL2ussTV3OpeZWxImLA4Sf8iqLNtM~)**. Applications must be submitted by July 30, 2025.**
---
**REAL ID DEADLINE HAS PASSED: WHAT DOES THAT MEAN FOR YOU?**
---
As of May 7, 2025, a Real ID or passport is required to board domestic flights. While not required in Virginia to drive, you will need to secure your Real ID ahead of any travel. You can apply at the DMV website using this link: [https://www.dmv.virginia.gov/licenses-ids/real-id](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/dfH5Bcul0Mic-Hrm-GP9ww~~/AAS2yhA~/SsbJrMsvENCNyhxhiiY82_ce0z4Zxta83aEXXih740DWbWl-4wU3Oq0u8HuiIm2CzgeS-BQ4JTnyn-X0uJ1eDakeGiktBHm1ha4LzBj6aXeE8EoWpc2fbPrNJSkXo-_yQQAero4U16cVvDgItlVFug~~) Be sure to [plan your documents in advance](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/Sa_2Fo1vOcNCUsfjJZUwXg~~/AAS2yhA~/c8Rgm_tSZp80u2aPJRoFKAeOBuNJWnybhZDtcZbCXq4H6S5M1LqogLvdIXA0b-pDYpUx7RbuSBHaqxoY2B-fuD50hf7gEzKU-9lC3bpoARBXDESe50jQivzOVxZ6iOnfc0cKCJ1t9VdFMtoJMKGftv901Qt9LqRDKcnDHnpWrV8~), and please note: _If your name appears differently on your proof documents, you will be asked to present additional documentation to connect the names, such as a marriage certificate, or civil union documents filed with a government agency or court, divorce decree or court order. Note: Marriage licenses and marriage certificates signed only by the wedding officiant (for example, a member of the clergy) will NOT be accepted._ If you are planning to travel in the future, do not delay submitting your application! Real ID applications are increasing, so prevent surprise delays and apply soon!
---
**LONG-TERM RECONSTRUCTION OF I-95 EXIT 160 INTERCHANGE**
---
Construction is underway on improvements at the I-95 Exit 160 interchange at Route 123 (Gordon Boulevard) to improve safety, operations, and bicyclist/pedestrian mobility and connectivity, according to the Virginia Department of Transportation. **The improvements include:**
* Replacing the northbound Route 123 loop ramp to southbound I-95 with a signalized left-turn to the southbound Route 123 ramp to southbound I-95.
* Widening the southbound Route 123 ramp to southbound I-95 from one to two lanes.
* Moving the Route 123 and I-95 Express Lanes ramp intersection slightly south.
* Realigning the southbound I-95 ramp to northbound Route 123.
* Adding a shared-use path along northbound Route 123 from Annapolis Way to Devil's Reach Road.
* Widening and replacing the beams and deck of the southbound I-95 bridge over Occoquan Road.

**Throughout the construction phase:**
* Daytime lane closures outside of peak travel hours on weekdays and overnight lane closures will take place, as needed, along southbound I-95 from Route 123 to Occoquan Road; Route 123 between Devils Reach Road and Annapolis Way/Monroe Drive; and Occoquan Road between Deerfield Lane and Devils Reach Road.
* Pedestrians on Occoquan Road may encounter closures on the existing sidewalks around the I-95 overpass and are asked to follow detour signs as necessary.

**A “pardon our dust” meeting regarding project construction is planned for later this summer. Details will be shared once available.**

---
|
---
As always, my office is here to serve you. If we can assist you in any way, please don’t hesitate to call us at 703-261-4787 or email [DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov](mailto:DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov). Stay connected, and we look forward to continuing our work together!
---
In Service
---
|
---
|
---
_The Honorable Briana D. Sewell \-- 25th House District_ _DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov_
---
[**Unsubscribe**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/6HzNOubSVGuJLNMIL3pBGA~~/AAS2yhA~/yHZ83i1z8XABExwHf7BB3Tf7-aSKHN1dPG6G4YsXKVi85x1e4mi-GxnXuBl1FUAm78rdcuLafNWS-F-vsOuVLY92u3DacMH9dkxMHFwbjFqftt2wmTynSd9sPQNUBLf2puSSRH_o3Dd06xyqil1dBLNc7ZG4DtHbVlAHyu8CiZuWnpUVlwe3CPiNNX3Ta5ZAyXV-22Iwj-9mEEh7zuAjKyJYtto7NXa3bWETr0O_MuCRrueeZUWZaB5WENJR4hZwdUaKhiaeMZ-I2b4wJZ3HI4KVwy7kM68kLFlg53AtzIgeB2fVSTGK3RRZY9L1tFCT) from future updates

Whether you plan to attend a backyard barbecue, enjoy a fireworks display, or take a well-deserved break, I hope today is filled with hope and community. In this newsletter, you will find highlights from recent events, updates on stories making headlines across Northern Virginia, and a list of exciting events coming up in and around the Greater Prince William Area. body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/72f7RwkKoRIzoEKx5bXrgK6xmm7_rVXpcMArmYU9Xv91l5C4NP4z7BqDygv3ChQ4NiV6I2hrnmAx3o112AkguSJQmk5vCSNlmMjcszdNC-bSTqFYHaagA1rO3JKyWgNq_HAMyvqhw9iV1uN7KG8m-RgfMJ9SaaoDlI0Z_ZQ-cB4-oZY-c5c9eId1lxGNonhHx0BzQQFzhNk7y4yQ9KnUFzFA_kgHhoKNN9JrTrsuXDyCzm9sOS4Jcpg9qCBXtiWn5rOwksu3ABkF-KjDcOPQiEYNGgU5nhLPX9BlV5ooXSBpcPkm3A_VXO2f6exEUBQ6I4yiVJX48E1CkH1rNm4uNWncjpt6F9Mj0LJeRBa1Mw/7a7cPqtwqq5eqWhIcs-kJMDoQREhJMTB/10)

## Why the Declaration of Independence Still Matters
“We hold these truths to be self-evident, that all men are created equal.” How many times have we heard those words? While I frequently run into those who think that conservatives should just throw up their hands and leave New York to its fate, it's a mistake.

New York symbolizes America to the world.

It’s the nerve center for the entire global economy. It has America's most famous sports teams, museums, buildings, and more. It is the global capital of finance, media, and the arts.

America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome.

**And of course, that's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it.**

If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it.

Turning Point PAC is taking back critical swing states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire from radical socialists like Mamdani.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani | | | | | | | | | | | Patriot, We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country. Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani: The socialist candidate for mayor of New York City. It took this guy approximately ZERO days to confirm our worst suspicions. Mamdani, a self-declared socialist, wants to “globalize the intifada” and import values into the West that will destabilize our civilization. Everything about him runs counter to America First. The fact that he could win in arguably America's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on. Turning Point PAC is working harder than ever to . We must ensure that radical socialists like Mamdani do NOT gain power in cities, counties, and states across the country. Help us and by donating today. Patriot, the future of Trump’s agenda will be decided on the streets of Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York. While I frequently run into those who think that conservatives should just throw up their hands and leave New York to its fate, it's a mistake. New York symbolizes America to the world. It’s the nerve center for the entire global economy. It has America's most famous sports teams, museums, buildings, and more. It is the global capital of finance, media, and the arts. America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome. And of course, that's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it. If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it. Turning Point PAC is taking back critical swing states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire from radical socialists like Mamdani. But we can’t do it without you, Patriot. Please donate today to make America First the law of the land in 2026, 2028, and beyond. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: A breakthrough in the belly of the beast
body:
They couldn’t cancel this tour...
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e5e43fb33c9e40f6801d171bfc89da03&_e=63n-DwFbKn2pfKW7683aNu5Nq2kxOfLL21ReMawsVIPXNnTbNBnuSShh9O8QsvbAMsDdUBXrewkzJgvqENG7KQLdAhGIuFE4mcr9gJ2svm8abgiC5Svo40ftUswKCdiwqxHwrOxYIqVdf8m50N0blC8RKf0lME2FE1UZSv3oynT3VcC0eVJdrSf7Zpk7JOqh-jdQx_P_kS4mnabHZDdrc8YW8_IgpYblOmFu2KleX8R5rdhrq3mA9-aZlk86J-6XFIiC9_WmZDIfss4PIy8BGXbjA3OGxzh-Sn3aM-5g_AYP6WBMAZJMN8Vns8EknmY1Tc0mMvi-X-sf8ZS01i2uaRlmM0jHgxjsHekBcoWPyeuayTozq1UBSG5sFMtQ4hc0Oen1hLGNW1fBbhkoq3smM6MG2KzZgVgKk8lxmInY6ubUdpGDEPTZbEuDVhbCHYycG7tD8YA2aXcE_JL8g_DMa8c_YrnuWQ1r6u9u2emvwW-iaY-7d-W-JnqehrgrUG6ewEKm7P9MnhP_y8JRWjeucA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?**I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside...You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e5e43fb33c9e40f6801d171bfc89da03&_e=63n-DwFbKn2pfKW7683aNu5Nq2kxOfLL21ReMawsVIPXNnTbNBnuSShh9O8QsvbAMsDdUBXrewkzJgvqENG7KQLdAhGIuFE4mcr9gJ2svm8abgiC5Svo40ftUswKCdiwqxHwrOxYIqVdf8m50N0blHstgd0QWuqjngJ_QVPy1BbXEZPldD_KALn7L19s4l2Fnv2d4zyd61vqp42zTSQwt6s3gIwJDbulydg-P22Pka2ECeQRieTfsj65BT2PWe78AWCZSSKB6GSr_1ScvA0896ygPgSG4jzVeagxiQEAmtLB4SvggfksMAwoNUflL0dnjbEbkqmsqnWN_MBLXldIY4vKVkbITz6jtnfEowLmij86OqoXmtGEuEeLihEMDgk5-UO36YbphF0yg-NdLHU32y-bCXJzXjBxM9o_qI_JsPpnMh-V642lhA84vCaf7KZTa7uzSMhAIRNkfnyzAWpXZawanStbK4-iRXogSUylywa_LSXM7r9BFRuye7htxzzEQN-uBQamhALA_i5g3FRQFw%3D%3D)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:**Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.**And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...”They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e5e43fb33c9e40f6801d171bfc89da03&_e=63n-DwFbKn2pfKW7683aNu5Nq2kxOfLL21ReMawsVIPXNnTbNBnuSShh9O8QsvbAMsDdUBXrewkzJgvqENG7KQLdAhGIuFE4mcr9gJ2svm8abgiC5Svo40ftUswKCdiwqxHwrOxYIqVdf8m50N0blOfYTZYi6yRX2zDetsTMssF9jeEDZiWBqq5JLrYR5T99-nxE5gTtYKrYKQrYJyD0klZ162dPhun2G4QoOQgoqHht2_10JwImsUPdwvRYnmXD4GwgGLQ1SG1q2lp-UPMqP6VJCD-ii8ltHx3wKnAS1RDMURuSbMa3yX6gBtnNuOdtdQsJxFC9ywpeQ0Sr6ASWTU6XhB3uFUHpDUVYtIS_Otyh5Q11f0IqjwAX7kUvfWmod6Z1pUBIFHTGSvanlAZF-1TCl5lc7gbm0lpaj9XX_tpg4Vip1zpBZb4GytSU8SaKdLvBVUA6Uq-oytCVyyGmuOk9VsTKLXW-NWtToxHRjy2yDNsreue8cw1Fg8ta2p2H2mVc67FJe4uS-LDPmdDW4A%3D%3D)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.And each one was just as powerful...This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before._But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago.**Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did.**Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message...**But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e5e43fb33c9e40f6801d171bfc89da03&_e=63n-DwFbKn2pfKW7683aNu5Nq2kxOfLL21ReMawsVIPXNnTbNBnuSShh9O8QsvbAMsDdUBXrewkzJgvqENG7KQLdAhGIuFE4mcr9gJ2svm8abgiC5Svo40ftUswKCdiwqxHwrOxYIqVdf8m50N0blInpwWMFmIjayg7XRK3I51yZg8ois43gqmuyVbZLq5M0VbfzONvJ3haOIekOXaLLjEzlLqDIip0xE_f2hj3EUkQhy2Cv1n-u6LIGGqgl3VmwtRei44I5qn-1eXPnP7Q0_grgf9z2SMfPK5xayC6Wk4Na3Jt29S5ePMOW_PjHZFmdYTwnQpKESVjOX0KOtCCdfEjRCZyiNCzcCykxWmZW01OB9kBtEfeBthjSNOhFFZHi-0xWFb8S7Bz6wcMyJC3en6VZVWAWS3U9_O44lUV1LdAkYAg-vDI9u3qgGl93SC6Ushu77tOvLOgxDkYabUXtb_6mQr8PtL8cyPB8FQw8RuNkx0UALP_JlP7lod-C-WYyAJJ0zOORFP1XrI0hgFe9eQ%3D%3D)
---
_Friend, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.**But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible.Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most.**You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...But this summer?We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through.We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. **_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Friend._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible...We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong.**I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.****Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e5e43fb33c9e40f6801d171bfc89da03&_e=63n-DwFbKn2pfKW7683aNu5Nq2kxOfLL21ReMawsVIPXNnTbNBnuSShh9O8QsvbAMsDdUBXrewkzJgvqENG7KQLdAhGIuFE4mcr9gJ2svm8abgiC5Svo40ftUswKCdiwqxHwrOxYIqVdf8m50N0blLn9AoblqlvRBSbcDqpenL3ZedF6BQ0VJ-IsTX_Yk0ertOCHjWcpWrBvKsFxar7py4EQ82TECZKHuBAHkvCp1an1lKr3WZKnUJAl58F02Prk7POtlR_eZyXTKGW_P1Y8t_LqAoUuS9OpmwaIbYN9qmuAnA0c40YqcXnI1A1AGx3pxO9InIXQbifm0vL7pSBddqFfTO87qC4JS2A1LSs4th0Xj1rVI-cV25iXJNDPw4mnUqC9T-S21UrBIPpC4H7P8nrrvoH17x4LKfZgRsZPxWH16SP_jlI3HV6nElWypw2kgywYFE4pnsBH3R2IfMID3CbbK1kgaJ5X-xaZDamvxiLe7lc-UQC8j_Ujvi4pLqj8kLZgY6jqwCUB9RvDdevkNg%3D%3D)
---
**P.S.** I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Friend... **_But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS._** These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas.This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.**And the Left is terrified.** You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore.**Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student.** **And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED.** That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. _So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._ Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. **[We’re not done. Let’s go DEFEAT the Left once and for all.
