name: Jeff Merkley
subject: We’ve seen how powerful our democracy can be when we raise our voices together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Today, I’m taking a moment to reflect on what this Independence Day holiday means and what it asks of us.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110859635/555556183/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWRkZGNlMC1lYjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4frRcBFMom1ujZ2SpHeozgtNxuOy9hpZTktUTW5enc=&emci=8d0fdc12-4958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=01dddce0-eb58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Today, I'm taking a moment to reflect on what this Independence Day holiday means and what it asks of us. This day honors our independence, our freedoms, and the bold vision of a nation built on liberty and justice for all. And while we've made enormous progress, the promise of America remains unfinished and the fight to fully realize that founding promise is far from over — especially as we confront growing threats to our democracy. **We've seen how powerful our democracy can be when we raise our voices together.** We saw it in the No Kings protests. We saw it in the Hands Off demonstrations. And we'll continue to see it as Americans stand united against Donald Trump's strongman authoritarianism and the MAGA extremism trying to drag our nation backward. Right now, our institutions are under siege — from a Supreme Court hijacked by Justices pushing a right-wing agenda to a Congress where too many lawmakers ignore the will of the very people they represent to elections flooded with dark money from corporate special interests buying influence behind closed doors. Meanwhile, Trump and his Republican cronies are ripping up the very foundations of our democracy and passing vicious, unpopular budget plans that gut Medicaid for millions of Americans. **But I refuse to back down, and I know you won't either.** This Independence Day weekend, let's recommit to the fight. Stand with me as we work to protect our democracy, root out corruption, stop authoritarianism in its tracks, and build a country that delivers freedom, dignity, and justice for all of us. We've proven that when we rise together, we can push back — and we will keep pushing for the future we deserve. Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: Today, I’m taking a moment to reflect on what this Independence Day holiday means and what it asks of us. | | | | Today, I'm taking a moment to reflect on what this Independence Day holiday means and what it asks of us. This day honors our independence, our freedoms, and the bold vision of a nation built on liberty and justice for all. And while we've made enormous progress, the promise of America remains unfinished and the fight to fully realize that founding promise is far from over — especially as we confront growing threats to our democracy. We've seen how powerful our democracy can be when we raise our voices together. We saw it in the No Kings protests. We saw it in the Hands Off demonstrations. And we'll continue to see it as Americans stand united against Donald Trump's strongman authoritarianism and the MAGA extremism trying to drag our nation backward. Right now, our institutions are under siege — from a Supreme Court hijacked by Justices pushing a right-wing agenda to a Congress where too many lawmakers ignore the will of the very people they represent to elections flooded with dark money from corporate special interests buying influence behind closed doors. Meanwhile, Trump and his Republican cronies are ripping up the very foundations of our democracy and passing vicious, unpopular budget plans that gut Medicaid for millions of Americans. But I refuse to back down, and I know you won't either. This Independence Day weekend, let's recommit to the fight. Stand with me as we work to protect our democracy, root out corruption, stop authoritarianism in its tracks, and build a country that delivers freedom, dignity, and justice for all of us. We've proven that when we rise together, we can push back — and we will keep pushing for the future we deserve. name: Wes Moore
subject: Happy Independence day
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=270%2E1086043%2Ef-uU7f ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=270%2E1086043%2Ef-uU7f ]Wes Moore for Governor

I wanted to write you a note on Independence Day,
Peter.

I know it can be hard to celebrate our history when it isn’t perfect. The
unevenness of the American journey has made some skeptical.

But I’m asking you to make that skepticism your companion, and not your
captor. Take my grandfather as an example.

He was born in South Carolina, the child of Jamaican immigrants. When he
was just six years old his family was chased out of the country by the Ku
Klux Klan. But, Peter,
my grandfather returned.

He is the one who taught me that patriotism cannot be passive. That
patriotism is not the belief that your country is perfect, but rather a
belief in an ideal that is worth fighting for through struggle and
sacrifice. And that we should let the hard truths about our country be a
guide toward a better future.

His lessons live through me every day. And, on a day like today, I think
it is important to recognize that while this country is not perfect, we
can strive to make it better.

I love this country. I fought for it in uniform and I’ve continued to
dedicate my life to public service now as
Maryland's governor.

Together, we can defend our hard-won freedoms and make it a little easier
to get by, for everyone.

I hope you take the long weekend to celebrate with your family, see your
loved ones, and take a much-deserved rest. I’ll be enjoying some quality
time (and great food) with my family today. After that, the work
continues.

Happy Fourth of July.

Elevate,

Wes

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I am proud to be an American
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I love this country. And that is why I get up in the morning every day and do my best to improve it.
#

Friend —
I’m hoping each of you can take some time to disconnect and enjoy your friends and family today.
As I think about what today represents, I am reminded how proud I am to be an American — how proud we all should be, even in tough times..
Never forget that the United States of America is more than just whoever is sitting in the Oval Office or who occupies any seat in Congress.
America isn’t perfect. Never has been. We have always been a work in progress — the great experiment — and now is no different.
You can be proud that America never stops working for a better world for our kids and our grandkids. You can love this country for the promise it was and is for the future.
I am proud to be an American. I love this country. And that is why I get up in the morning every day and do my best to improve it.
There is only one sure way we lose the future we want, and that’s by giving up.
I am not giving up. I am not quitting. And I hope you’re with me.
Thank you, as always, for being part of my team.
Mark

| Here's why you giving $5 today matters more than ever:
* Republicans are already in a messy primary, with front-runner Texas AG Ken Paxton trying to throw doctors in jail for providing abortion care.
* Now, not just one but TWO brand-new polls show me leading in this race.
* With Trump and the GOP wreaking havoc on our economy, our fundamental rights, and our democracy, we need leaders who will take on corruption.

People are fired up – and they’re ready to fight back! [That’s why I’m asking for $5 today](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdebdbefa-ee4c-468d-8e55-85631fd32148/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf57eb1ad-c8ea-4044-a02b-3a35106e9bb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Seriously, it can make a HUGE difference in these early days of our grassroots campaign. I know $5 might not sound like much when you think of the tens of millions the GOP and their rich mega donors have. But it adds up quickly! If everyone reading this chips in, we'll hit our goal in minutes – and we'll be that much closer to finally bringing Texas the leadership we deserve. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25a0e5e9-e828-4e5e-9462-bb1ed3b0dc0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

On Independence Day, it’s important to reflect on this day’s significance. Beyond the celebrations and gatherings, **it’s about our shared commitment to ensuring every voice contributes to our democratic process, emphasizing the importance of safeguarding every ballot.** This commitment faces challenges. Extremist groups across the nation aim to diminish our rights — creating red tape through voter suppression, enacting extreme bans on reproductive care, and selling out our public lands to the highest bidders. The upcoming 2026 elections are a critical juncture. **There’s hope though** — communities are uniting, raising their voices, and actively defending our collective rights. Organized people will beat organized money every single time. Together we can fight back and protect our democracy. Happy Independence Day. Martin Heinrich | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110861624/555561947/-1710431385?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250704_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTgwNWJlYi1lZjU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fW8EVUn8HSGx5vqpECH-eMg1aufadX9opHZTgxA4u2U=)

clean_body: On Independence Day, it’s important to reflect on this day’s significance. Beyond the celebrations and gatherings, it’s about our shared commitment to ensuring every voice contributes to our democratic process, emphasizing the importance of safeguarding every ballot. This commitment faces challenges. Extremist groups across the nation aim to diminish our rights — creating red tape through voter suppression, enacting extreme bans on reproductive care, and selling out our public lands to the highest bidders. The upcoming 2026 elections are a critical juncture. There’s hope though — communities are uniting, raising their voices, and actively defending our collective rights. Organized people will beat organized money every single time. Together we can fight back and protect our democracy. Happy Independence Day. Martin Heinrich | = | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Tina Kotek
subject: The values we hold dear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Happy Fourth of July, Peter!

Today, we celebrate the promise of America — a nation founded on the ideals of freedom, equality, and democracy. But we also know that the promise has never been fully realized for everyone. And right now, those founding ideals are being tested like never before.

Across the country, we’re seeing efforts to roll back rights, silence dissent, and rewrite the rules of democracy. Here in Oregon, we’re pushing back — with courage, clarity, and a deep belief that our shared future can be better than our past.

This Fourth of July, I’m thinking not just about fireworks and flags — but about the work we have ahead. Work that demands our voices and our vigilance.

Let’s honor this day not just with celebration, but with recommitment:
To liberty.
To justice.
And to one another.

Enjoy the holiday with your loved ones — and let’s keep building the kind of country we all deserve.

With hope,

Tina

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-q3-2025]

Portland, OR 97242

Peter — this Independence Day comes at a tough moment for our nation. Republicans beholden to Trump this week passed Trump’s Big Ugly Bill that will kick millions of hardworking people off of their health insurance, eviscerate green jobs, and give an enormous handout to wealthy billionaires who are making our lives _worse_. At a time when Americans need help the most, the MAGA mob turned its back on the folks across North Carolina — they instead chose to cater to an elite few. **This nation was founded on the ideals of “We the people,” and that shouldn’t come with a price tag.** Our democracy is fragile, Peter, and the first half of this year has shown that it takes consistent, regular action in our communities if we’re going to put a stop to the MAGA agenda. I hope you and your loved ones have a safe and happy Independence Day. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The strength of the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Today we celebrate the Declaration of Independence.
It’s built on the idea that each and every one of us is created equal, and that each of us deserves equal treatment under the laws of this nation.
No tyrants, no kings, no one above the law. Just a government of, by, and for the people.
**But 249 years later, we stand at a new crossroads.** Every day we face unprecedented attacks from the current administration on the Constitution, the rule of law, the right to vote, and our democracy itself.
But just as we have at every previous crossroads, we are standing up to fight back. We made that choice when it came to our independence from the British Empire; again when it came to defeating the Confederacy and ending slavery in the Civil War; we fought and overcame fascism and tyranny in World War II and we overthrew Jim Crow to establish Civil Rights and Voting Rights twenty years later.
Let’s remember where we came from, what we’re made of, and who we are at the end of the day.
We are the heirs of the sacrifice, the service, the struggle that has brought us through these last 249 years. What we do with this inheritance – whether we “meanly lose it or nobly save it” – will define us in the pages of history and determine our country’s future.
Let’s keep the faith and keep up the fight.
— Beto
P.S. [**Watch my full Independence Day message here.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65235?t=1&akid=240207%2E444211%2EUQGMfD) Thank you for standing with us in this work.

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250704-240207-footer&t=2&refcode2=240207_444211_UQGMfD&akid=240207%2E444211%2EUQGMfD)**

Peter —
This July 4th, declare your independence from gerrymandering and celebrate the birthday of American democracy with a pledge to keep fighting for fair maps and fair representation.
[**Add your name to show you’re still on the side of democracy →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110862615/555564883/-164970620?refcode=cul_aotl_tier1_email_Declare4th_email_20250704-AOTL-Tier1-Declare4th_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20250704-AOTL-Tier1-Declare4th_&utm_campaign=Declare4th&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4ODA1YmViLWVmNTgtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Jxhzt1KtEHsOidoNZZchyVDl0qnflCrAw2FKOFbgaU=&emci=15d55b03-6e57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=68805beb-ef58-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
**“If you want democracy, you have to DO democracy.”
— Attorney General Eric Holder**
**We’re working alongside Attorney General Holder to end gerrymandering because fair maps mean freedom — the freedom to have your elected leaders truly represent your voice, your needs, and your values.**
The best way to celebrate our nation’s founding is to rededicate ourselves to securing justice, equality, and opportunity for all. Every American should have an equal opportunity to make their voice heard in our democracy, and politicians should not be able to gerrymander their way into power and silence people who disagree with them.

clean_body: Add your name to show you’re fighting for democracy | Peter — This July 4th, declare your independence from gerrymandering and celebrate the birthday of American democracy with a pledge to keep fighting for fair maps and fair representation. “If you want democracy, you have to DO democracy.” — Attorney General Eric Holder We’re working alongside Attorney General Holder to end gerrymandering because fair maps mean freedom — the freedom to have your elected leaders truly represent your voice, your needs, and your values. The best way to celebrate our nation’s founding is to rededicate ourselves to securing justice, equality, and opportunity for all. Every American should have an equal opportunity to make their voice heard in our democracy, and politicians should not be able to gerrymander their way into power and silence people who disagree with them. Thanks, and happy Fourth of July, Team AOTL is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. name: Sarah McBride
subject: The most patriotic thing we can do is to continue fighting for each other
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
#
I’m in Delaware today, spending the Fourth with family and neighbors, and reflecting on what this day is meant to represent.
Across the country, we’re celebrating the promise of freedom. But even on this day, that promise is being actively undermined. Today, Donald Trump will be signing his one big ugly bill, a bill that hollows out Medicaid and food assistance for families, veterans, children, and seniors to reward the ultra-wealthy.
Forcing people to choose between groceries and prescriptions is not freedom.
Freedom is being able to see a doctor without going into debt. It’s time to care for our loved ones. It’s having control over our own bodies. It’s clean air, safe communities, and a government that serves regular people, not just the powerful.
Delawareans sent me to Congress to fight for that vision. And I’m committed to doing just that with the urgency this moment demands. Because in the face of such cruelty and division, **the most patriotic thing we can do is to continue fighting for one another.**
Thank you for reading. I’m wishing you and your loved ones a safe and Happy Fourth of July.
— Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250704-1&t=1&refcode2=2157_21716_0GRiyj&akid=2157%2E21716%2E0GRiyj)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

subject: This July 4th—Celebrate Freedom by Studying the U.S. Constitution

Course Title: Shield of Rights – Understanding the U.S. Constitution Start Date: Monday, July 14 Time: 7:00 PM ET (1 hour, every Monday) Cost: FREE Hosted by: Generations For America Foundation Whether you're new to the Constitution or deeply familiar with its pages, this course will inspire,

| | Dear Patriots and Friends, As we celebrate this sacred Independence Day, let us remember that July 4th is more than fireworks and flags—it is a bold declaration that liberty is worth fighting for. On this day in 1776, our founders pledged their lives, fortunes, and sacred honor to secure the blessings of freedom. Now, nearly 250 years later, we must ask ourselves: What are we doing to preserve it? President Ronald Reagan once said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. It must be fought for, protected, and handed on.” Freedom is not passed down in the bloodstream. It is learned. It is earned. And it is taught. That’s why Generations For America Foundation is proud to invite you to join our free U.S. Constitution course, beginning Monday, July 14 at 7:00 PM ET. This one-hour weekly session will be led by seasoned experts committed to restoring constitutional literacy in America.
---
| |
---
| | Course Title: Shield of Rights – Understanding the U.S. Constitution
Start Date: Monday, July 14
Time: 7:00 PM ET (1 hour, every Monday)
Cost: FREE
Hosted by: Generations For America Foundation Whether you're new to the Constitution or deeply familiar with its pages, this course will inspire, equip, and energize you to be a modern defender of liberty. The time is now. Our nation is hungry for truth. Our future depends on you. Register today and take your stand with us. Because if we don’t educate this generation—who will? God Bless America, Ingrid CenturionLTC U.S. Army Ret.

body:
Donald Trump stood on stage last night and bragged about his so-called Big Beautiful Bill — calling it a “birthday present for America.”
We're raising funds NOW to hold EVERY SINGLE Republican who voted for this cruelty accountable and elect Democrats who will RESTORE what’s been taken. Chip in NOW to show that Democrats are not backing down >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=070425_1]
Because here’s what Trump is signing into law today:
❌16 million people will lose their healthcare
❌ 25% of nursing homes will shut down
❌ 51,000 preventable deaths every single year
❌ 2 million kids will lose access to food
❌ 1.75 million blue collar jobs will be wiped out
❌ 1.4 million students will lose their Pell Grants
❌ And the ultra-wealthy will get a $975 BILLION tax break
That’s not “beautiful.” That’s a national tragedy.
Our plan is clear:
✅ Expose what this bill really does
✅ Hold every single Republican who supported it accountable at the ballot box
✅ Elect Democrats who will RESTORE what Republicans destroyed and protect working families for good
This is it. We can’t undo Trump’s signature - but we can make every Republican who stood with him regret it.

subject: Happy Independence Day!
body:
Today we celebrate our freedom.

| | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110863511/555568834/15171162?refcode=E14062-20250704-FourthofJuly-header-Holiday&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwMzFkMmNmLWYyNTgtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=swpOuz0Mmh9MJ6v12T7aRvXHVND3LnZdDxyHxq8hfNc=)** Happy 4th of July, Peter! Today, we celebrate the values that define America — freedom, independence, and the promise of a better future for all. As we gather with loved ones, let us remember that it’s up to each and every one of us to protect our democracy and defend the freedoms we cherish so much. We’re especially grateful to the brave men and women in our military who are spending this day away from their families in service to our country. Wishing you a safe, joyful, and patriotic Independence Day. — The Blue Dogs
---
* * *

name: Mike Thompson
subject: America’s 249th birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter – today, we celebrate the birth of America!

Let us remember the founding principles of our country: life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

These principles have guided our country’s democracy for 249 years. They continue to be the core of our government, society, and culture. It is on these principles that we’ve built the American Dream.

We cannot take these founding principles as a given. Our freedoms and democracy have to be fought for and defended, protected against extremists that want to tear our country apart.

Thank you to everyone who donated and supported my end-of-quarter fundraising efforts. Our strong numbers show that we will never stop fighting for our freedoms, the very core of our country.

However you are spending today, I hope you join me in celebrating our beautiful country and our founding principles. And let us not forget the bravery of the revolutionaries that got our independence, nor can we forget the importance of defending our freedom every day.

Happy Birthday America!

From Jan and I to you and yours,

Mike

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: Today, we celebrate the independence of our country, and tomorrow, we fight to protect it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

I hope you are having a restful and celebratory 4th of July.

As we celebrate our country’s independence, we must always look to our U.S. Constitution – which is now more vulnerable than ever.

Our sitting president has taken numerous actions in his less than 6 months in office that defy and disgrace our Constitution – invoking the Alien Enemies Act, threatening to take legal action against his political opponent, and ending birthright citizenship.

And just a few days ago, the far-right Justices on the Supreme Court ruled in favor of Donald Trump, giving him even more power to defy our Constitution — an immense threat to our democracy.

Donald Trump has and will continue to disregard and disrespect our Constitution and the ideals that our nation was built on.

“With the stroke of a pen, the President has made a ‘solemn mockery’ of our Constitution” – Justice Sonya Sotomayor

So we must continue to fight back, Peter, and I vow to continue protecting our democracy & advocating for Americans’ fundamental rights every day.

Today, we celebrate the independence of our country, our Constitution, and our democracy. And tomorrow we continue to fight to protect it.

Have a safe and joyful rest of our holiday!

Zoe Lofgren

DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-04_4J_ZOL_ES-26999&amount=25]

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.

subject: Wishing you a safe and joyful Fourth of July
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Today, as fireworks light up our skies and families gather across Minnesota, we pause to reflect on the enduring promise of our nation: liberty, justice, and opportunity for all.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110864501/555572720/155294723?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTkxMWQ5Ny1mNTU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NBS3p0PXb7bB5il1d75UOQhL3VdOxyJO-GcAieGHVJU=)

Peter,
Today, as fireworks light up our skies and families gather across Minnesota, we pause to reflect on the enduring promise of our nation: liberty, justice, and opportunity for all.
From the Iron Range to the Twin Cities, Minnesotans embody the spirit of freedom and resilience that defines America. And when we come together—neighbors helping neighbors, united by a common purpose—our communities thrive.
This Fourth of July, let’s recommit to the values that bring us together: strength, courage, and an unwavering belief in the power of democracy. When we stand united, there’s no challenge we can’t overcome.
Wishing you and your loved ones a safe and joyful Independence Day.

Tim Walz

name: AOC
subject: Even if you don't see a way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It's still worth trying.
#
I will always, always believe that it's worth trying, even if you don’t see a way — **because ways emerge**.
I was not supposed to get elected to Congress, by any stretch of the imagination.
**I was insane**.
It’s not just a cute story — I was wiping down a bar and asking people to vote for me. It wasn’t a summer job I had once. I was not supposed to win.
The guy I was running against spent $3 million against me, and I was making $2 in my paycheck once a week because I was working off tips and they take it all out.
**But things happen in America**. This is still a place of possibility.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

clean_body: It's still worth trying. I will always, always believe that it's worth trying, even if you don’t see a way — because ways emerge. I was not supposed to get elected to Congress, by any stretch of the imagination. I was insane. It’s not just a cute story — I was wiping down a bar and asking people to vote for me. It wasn’t a summer job I had once. I was not supposed to win. The guy I was running against spent $3 million against me, and I was making $2 in my paycheck once a week because I was working off tips and they take it all out. But things happen in America. This is still a place of possibility. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

| | Team Grothman wants to wish you a very happy 4th of July, friend! Not a day goes by where we aren't appreciative to live in the freest, greatest nation on earth thanks to our brave servicemen and women, _some of whom made the ultimate sacrifice_ \- to keep it that way. Glenn is looking or ideas for the weekend and asked us to reach out and see how you are spending your 4th! **Are you:**

clean_body: | | | | | Team Grothman wants to wish you a very happy 4th of July, friend! Not a day goes by where we aren't appreciative to live in the freest, greatest nation on earth thanks to our brave servicemen and women, some of whom made the ultimate sacrifice \- to keep it that way. Glenn is looking or ideas for the weekend and asked us to reach out and see how you are spending your 4th! Are you: Thank for letting us know. We'll get these ideas over to Glenn ASAP! Have a safe and happy Independence Day! -Team Grothman | | FOLLOW GLENN ON SOCIAL MEDIA! | | | | ---|---|---|--- Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

name: Kim Schrier
subject: Today, we celebrate our freedom and our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110865474/555576498/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQyOWQ5Ni1mODU4LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sY_GQjpYDeMuEb_Rlf-id2-hi422T_xv3QaPbVtY2f0=&emci=56e36cb9-2158-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8bd29d96-f858-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Today, as we celebrate the birth of our nation, I’m reflecting on the promise of our democracy— _and the responsibility we all share to protect it._

This holiday marks not just our independence, but the enduring fight to build a country where every voice is heard, every vote is counted, and every person has the freedom to live with dignity and opportunity.

We’ve been reminded that democracy isn’t something we can take for granted. It’s something we must nurture, defend, and strengthen in our communities, at the ballot box, and through the conversations we have with each other about the kind of country we want to leave to the next generation.

So today, alongside the parades, fireworks, and family gatherings, I hope we’ll each take a moment to honor the values that unite us and recommit ourselves to the work of making America a place where those founding ideals of liberty, equality, and justice are truly within reach for everyone.

Wishing you a safe and joyful Fourth of July!

—Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. clean_body: Peter, Today, as we celebrate the birth of our nation, I’m reflecting on the promise of our democracy— and the responsibility we all share to protect it. This holiday marks not just our independence, but the enduring fight to build a country where every voice is heard, every vote is counted, and every person has the freedom to live with dignity and opportunity. We’ve been reminded that democracy isn’t something we can take for granted. It’s something we must nurture, defend, and strengthen in our communities, at the ballot box, and through the conversations we have with each other about the kind of country we want to leave to the next generation. So today, alongside the parades, fireworks, and family gatherings, I hope we’ll each take a moment to honor the values that unite us and recommit ourselves to the work of making America a place where those founding ideals of liberty, equality, and justice are truly within reach for everyone. Wishing you a safe and joyful Fourth of July! —Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Fellow patriot,

Far too often, the bravery and vision of our Founding Fathers is
forgotten. They risked everything to create a country built on the
principles of freedom, justice, and equality.

Today, we're facing a new challenge. The Radical Left is working
tirelessly to undermine our values and destroy the very fabric of our
society. But we won't let them succeed.

That's why we're inviting you to join the 1776 Club, a group of
America First Patriots dedicated to defending our nation's founding
principles and promoting the values that have made America great. Your
membership is pending and we would be HONORED to have you join our
ranks!

As a member, you'd join a community that's committed to defending our
Constitutional rights and freedoms, preserving our nation's history,
and promoting the values that have always made America strong.

We need you standing alongside us and other like-minded Americans who
share your passion for our country and its founding principles.

And as a special invitation, we're asking you to chip in just $17.76
to receive your membership. This is a small price to pay for the
freedom and prosperity we enjoy as Americans.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Wishing you a happy Fourth
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

This Fourth of July, I’m thinking about what it truly means to love our country.

To me, there is nothing more patriotic than standing up for what you believe in, rolling up your sleeves, and working to deliver the freedoms this country promises to everyone—not just the privileged few.

It’s an honor to serve our state as we work together to ensure everyone can afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect. I’m grateful for your partnership and ready for the road ahead.

Happy Fourth to you and your loved ones.

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

name: Cori Bush
subject: The irony of today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Two hundred and forty-nine years ago today, our nation’s founders formally adopted the Declaration of Independence – a document written, in part, by enslavers who didn’t recognize Black people as fully human.
So today, I’m reflecting on what freedom truly means.
If I’m honest, “freedom” is a complicated word for me.
That’s because, for millions of Americans, freedom isn’t a reality. It’s a promise that’s been broken again and again by politicians who prioritize billionaires over Black and brown communities, who choose war over peace, and who deny basic rights like healthcare, housing, and bodily autonomy.
The irony of July 4th? We’re still fighting for the freedom this country has claimed to stand for since 1776.
That’s why I’m fighting every day through Politivist Action PAC to elect leaders who will actually deliver justice, equality, and real freedom for all. Can you stand with us today? Chip in to help build the movement for a true, lasting freedom>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250704_freedom_act]
Because freedom is more than a holiday. It’s a right worth fighting for.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
Founder, Politivist Action PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250704_freedom_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q3?refcode=x_250704_freedom_act] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at PolitivistAction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com] .

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxoklkf4h2tip37d2i2ln57ubx5ljj7y2rvnwiscvyh56vncekod2ot5zj7sczaps7dl1t8dnchhfx5wdw6lfsl0e41j7w76p4bsu23c8s9rwj52gag4zqp18guhyprrw3j9msdg62sdjb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syvzdt&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syvzdt&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syvzdt&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syvzdt&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxoklkf4h2tip37d2i2ln57ubx5ljj7y2rvnwiscvyh56vncekod2ot5zj7sczaps7dl1t8dnchhfx5wdw6lfsl0e41j7w76p4bsu23c8s9rwj52gag4zqp18guhyprrw3j9msdg62sdjb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syvzdt&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syvzdt&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Hi team,
We’re sorry to bug you on a holiday – but there is big news that we wanted to make sure you saw:
This week, Republicans in Congress passed a bill that will rip healthcare away from 16 million people, take food off the table for 40 million people, raise costs for working families, and eliminate jobs .
House Republicans are pushing to cut millions of Americans off of programs like Medicaid and food stamps, while New Dems are standing up for the people who need them most – working families, seniors, and children.
While House Republicans give more tax breaks to the ultra-rich, we’re fighting for a fair economy that works for every American.
Republicans are enabling Trump to undermine the rule of law to push a partisan agenda, New Dems are focused on uniting Americans around the common cause to defend our democracy.
This cruel bill only makes us more committed to fighting for working families, a strong economy, and safe communities.
We need to know which future you’re investing in: Can you chip in just $1 to help New Dems advance our agenda and flip the House in 2026? » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q32025_df?amount=1]

But to a people-powered movement like ours, it’s what drives us forward.

While Republicans push their Project 2025 agenda, we're building a movement strong enough to fight back and flip the House.

Here’s where we stand:

name: Rob Bonta
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250704&t=1001&akid=1861%2E1088799%2E3_UuQo ]Rob Bonta

Happy Independence Day!

249 years ago today, a group of revolutionary leaders gathered to adopt
the Declaration of Independence, laying the foundation for a nation built
on liberty, justice, and the promise of opportunity for all.

Today, we celebrate America’s independence from tyranny and all that makes
our country great. Our people, and those who come here seeking their own
American Dream. Our values, and those who work to uphold them in their
lives and communities. Our freedom, and those who protect it.

We know, as those leaders did long ago, that patriotism doesn’t start and
stop with waving a flag, but in taking action to advance our democratic
ideals, defend our unalienable rights, and fulfill the promises made more
than two centuries ago.

Loving America doesn’t just mean marching in a parade or enjoying a BBQ on
the Fourth of July (although I certainly plan to). It means fighting for
the best of what we can be — standing up for the vulnerable, defending our
freedoms, and holding our institutions accountable when they fall short.

True patriotism belongs to all those who see America for the great,
imperfect, and still ongoing project that it is, and actively work to be a
part of its progress.

I’m proud to be an American, and I’m proud to work every day to make
America a better and more just place for every single person who calls
this country home.

Wishing you a safe and happy holiday.

-Rob

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=1861%2E1088799%2E3_UuQo
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=1861%2E1088799%2E3_UuQo

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

_Join us in French Lick for IDEA 2025!_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868196/555586850/-398826277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=)** Hoosier Democrats, we are just over a month away from the 144th annual IDEA Conference in French Lick! This year it will take place [from August 14-17](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868197/555586851/563597392?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535). This is one of the longest yearly traditions not just in Indiana, but in all of American politics. Democrats will gather in French Lick and West Baden Springs from all over Indiana to learn from each other, attend Party meetings, and gear up for 2026 and beyond. This is your invitation to join us for this year’s festivities! Make sure to book a room under our [room block](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868198/555586852/563597392?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) to ensure you get the best price possible. Also, [be sure to register](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868199/555586853/-398826277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=) for the golf outing, and Saturday breakfast if you are attending. This year promises to be another exceptional French Lick, and we will see you on the porch next month! ****_Republicans' Big Bad Ugly Bill Will Remove 220,000 Hoosiers From Health Coverage and Close Rural Hospitals_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868200/555586854/946139294?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868201/555586855/946139294?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) The middle class loses under the One Big, Ugly Bill, with their share of the tax burden growing while Republicans cut taxes for the wealthiest in the country. Every Indiana GOP member of the U.S. House voted for this bill, including Rep. Victoria Spartz, who had raised concerns throughout the process. Her vote could have stopped this bill. The bill has numerous provisions cutting SNAP benefits, Medicaid coverage, and funding for higher education grant programs. It will cost Indiana over 5,000 clean energy jobs. The bill would kick 220,000 Hoosiers off their health coverage, and close many as a dozen rural hospitals. While every Indiana Republican voted for this disastrous bill, every Democrat, including Reps. Frank Mrvan and André Carson, stood with Hoosier families and voted NO. IDP Chair Tallian’s pushed back on the bill: “Indiana Republicans should feel ashamed. This bill is the worst piece of legislation to come out of Congress in decades, and is likely the biggest transfer of wealth from poor to rich that the US has ever seen. “I served with several of these now members of Congress during my time in the Indiana General Assembly, and all of them at least pretended to have a moral compass. Now, they gleefully cheer as they trade the lives of the poor, the children and the elderly for yet another bullshit tax break for billionaires. “People will die. Hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers are now at risk because they will lose access to food and healthcare. Predictions are that millions around the rest of the world will die because of the stingy, miserly cut to USAID. All so that a few Republican mega donors could buy themselves another yacht. Americans have always been generous, unselfish and compassionate. Apparently, our GOP legislators are not. I am disgusted.” ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868202/555586856/1707501198?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)**
[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868203/555586857/1707501198?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) On July 1 of this week, most of the new state laws passed during the 2025 legislative session go into effect across Indiana. There is certainly plenty of bad news to go around across Indiana from this legislative session, including a cruel state budget that cuts 73% of funding from local public health, eliminates thousands of Pre-K slots for Hoosier children, and zeroes out funding for trails and public broadcasting across Indiana. Democrats fought hard to reject these cuts, and will continue to advocate for vulnerable families throughout our state. The good news is, [Rep. Mitch Gore’s bill](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868204/555586858/326215458?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) to ban the purchase of luxury vehicles by state officials went into effect. It will stop officials like Diego Morales and Micah Beckwith from ever purchasing luxury vehicles on taxpayer dollars again, like this did earlier this year. Rep. Chris Campbell also passed a bill [allowing foster children to open bank accounts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868205/555586859/-1371615092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) to achieve financial independence faster. _**People’s Town Hall Series**_ We have more upcoming People’s Town Hall events! Sign up for our event in Fort Wayne in Early July! FORT WAYNE – Tuesday, July 8, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET
Allen County Public Library Theater, 900 Library Plz, Fort Wayne, IN 46802 **[SIGN UP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110868206/555586860/521585169?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTQ1Y2YwZS0wMzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyNbGwFxQJN-xm_PLF54zyR3DoolWIoJPuhy1RaP2Q4=&emci=ba125d1e-0159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e45cf0e-0359-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)** Richmond – Thursday, July 24, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET

clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = Happy Fourth of July from Hoosier Democrats!! ** Join us in French Lick for IDEA 2025! = Hoosier Democrats, we are just over a month away from the 144th annual IDEA Conference in French Lick! This year it will take place . This is one of the longest yearly traditions not just in Indiana, but in all of American politics. Democrats will gather in French Lick and West Baden Springs from all over Indiana to learn from each other, attend Party meetings, and gear up for 2026 and beyond. This is your invitation to join us for this year’s festivities! Make sure to book a room under our to ensure you get the best price possible. Also, = for the golf outing, and Saturday breakfast if you are attending. This year promises to be another exceptional French Lick, and we will see you on the porch next month! Republicans' Big Bad Ugly Bill Will Remove 220,000 Hoosiers From Health Coverage and Close Rural Hospitals The middle class loses under the One Big, Ugly Bill, with their share of the tax burden growing while Republicans cut taxes for the wealthiest in the country. Every Indiana GOP member of the U.S. House voted for this bill, including Rep. Victoria Spartz, who had raised concerns throughout the process. Her vote could have stopped this bill. The bill has numerous provisions cutting SNAP benefits, Medicaid coverage, and funding for higher education grant programs. It will cost Indiana over 5,000 clean energy jobs. The bill would kick 220,000 Hoosiers off their health coverage, and close many as a dozen rural hospitals. While every Indiana Republican voted for this disastrous bill, every Democrat, including Reps. Frank Mrvan and André Carson, stood with Hoosier families and voted NO. IDP Chair Tallian’s pushed back on the bill: “Indiana Republicans should feel ashamed. This bill is the worst piece of legislation to come out of Congress in decades, and is likely the biggest transfer of wealth from poor to rich that the US has ever seen. “I served with several of these now members of Congress during my time in the Indiana General Assembly, and all of them at least pretended to have a moral compass. Now, they gleefully cheer as they trade the lives of the poor, the children and the elderly for yet another bullshit tax break for billionaires. “People will die. Hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers are now at risk because they will lose access to food and healthcare. Predictions are that millions around the rest of the world will die because of the stingy, miserly cut to USAID. All so that a few Republican mega donors could buy themselves another yacht. Americans have always been generous, unselfish and compassionate. Apparently, our GOP legislators are not. I am disgusted.” Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. On July 1 of this week, most of the new state laws passed during the 2025 legislative session go into effect across Indiana. There is certainly plenty of bad news to go around across Indiana from this legislative session, including a cruel state budget that cuts 73% of funding from local public health, eliminates thousands of Pre-K slots for Hoosier children, and zeroes out funding for trails and public broadcasting across Indiana. Democrats fought hard to reject these cuts, and will continue to advocate for vulnerable families throughout our state. The good news is, to ban the purchase of luxury vehicles by state officials went into effect. It will stop officials like Diego Morales and Micah Beckwith from ever purchasing luxury vehicles on taxpayer dollars again, like this did earlier this year. Rep. Chris Campbell also passed a bill to achieve financial independence faster. People’s Town Hall Series We have more upcoming People’s Town Hall events! Sign up for our event in Fort Wayne in Early July! FORT WAYNE – Tuesday, July 8, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Allen County Public Library Theater, 900 Library Plz, Fort Wayne, IN 46802 Richmond – Thursday, July 24, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Allen County Public Library Theater, 900 South A St, Richmond, IN 47374 Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDIANAPOLIS PUBLIC SCHOOLS – IPS is taking comments about the recent legislative session, and the creation of the Indianapolis Local Education Alliance by lawmakers. IN DEPT OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT — IDEM is seeking public comment on current environment regulations. This is to implement Braun’s executive order this spring to weaken regulations. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings the National Democratic Training Committee on Tuesday, July 8th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🛑**If you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities are providing a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the current administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

On July 4, 1776 the Declaration of Independence was signed. It was a bold and courageous document that supported the belief that the people, not a king, should rule themselves through a government by the people and for the people. The Colonists fought a long a bloody war to defeat the British and create American Democracy. Life has not been a smooth ride since then. There have been numerous wars and upheavals that placed our democracy at risk. Men and women fought and died to preserve democracy and our country. Today we face a new kind of challenge to our democracy from within. It is the socialist/communist revolution from within. The first battle in this war has begun with the NYC mayoral primary victory of Mamdani.
He wants to create a socialist/communist takeover of New York. This will destroy our democracy and free market economy. We need to fight the war against socialism not with guns and blood but instead at the ballot box with our vote.
The battle has come to Connecticut, and we must use the local and upcoming state and federal elections to send a message that we reject socialism/communism.
Vote and campaign for pro-democracy candidates.

subject: Sign: Tell Elon Musk to Obliterate the Republican Party
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Tell Elon Musk to Obliterate the Republican Party](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc29b949f-17c8-48d7-82c9-a69384b61693/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tafbcfa40-ea64-4b89-bbad-97760aa18060/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Elon Musk did a heck of a lot of damage when Trump first took office. But now that he has broken with Trump and denounced those in Congress who voted for Trump's "big" bill, he has the chance to do some good -- by obliterating the Republican Party. [**By spending whatever he needs to, to weaken the Republican Party brand, and defeat its members in the next election.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T216bd3c5-7282-49ce-a4e7-cd62bcdd5f82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Musk has the resources to make an unprecedented impact, through ads, grassroots mobilization, and every other campaign tactic known and yet to be developed. He can literally spend 100 times what was spent combined in the last presidential election. Musk has said that Trump's bill is "utterly insane and destructive." Well, every single Democrat voted against it, and nearly every single Republican voted for it. If Musk really cares about America, he work to defeat Republicans, and elect Democrats. And he will start doing it today. [**Add your name: Tell Elon Musk to Obliterate the Republican Party**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T469e75f2-30fc-4012-9182-9bb9435b5ab2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Peter,

We’re celebrating the birth of our beautiful country and the democratic values that we live by: **_freedom, liberty, and justice for all._**

These values have guided us through challenging times in our country’s history, and they continue to be the core values of our society and culture. Today, the founding principles of our country are under attack. Protecting and defending our freedom and democracy will always be a priority to me.

So, I encourage you to join me in celebrating the heroes who have shaped our country and ensured our independence from an oppressive monarchy. At the same time, let us also acknowledge that we continue to be in pursuit of a more perfect union. Let’s recommit ourselves to the freedoms promised in the Declaration of Independence and continue fighting for each and every American.

From Anna and I to you and yours, we wish you a Happy Fourth!

Kyle

name: Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
subject: Deputy charged with first-degree murder after being cleared
body:
| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot , That’s me, my three kids, and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches, in the picture I’ve sent you.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6ebe1f2604b14005ab833b0e7a27b1db&_e=VlHfUKKKonX2jGx_ofNtAj_cIbh1CMN7mORXvwHjaqBRs1HDogqfQv2hlAFsqgWW7q3rEdp8prUaWV7vBEyVUMq21O-xf-51k8AUcEcOLXyPQeMRpcOipm_UziuZI-Gbnt2nC2fGRiRBub-4F6Aryxo4ml7oNwhOBRWLI1Ib2Vo83mV4dMyl9m4G4-ZJJQ6V4T9wbHgNqm25S9C6aEz6W6VMgZy_r8Gajwhhypo3HDRKCiimPjYgH85VMWH_qCOWXYyylW5KImSoaDY_73et7NQkEGspt4sbq9129Z3b2Z7AhlKdYeZf_LG16amVnAFdrI6NUMrFgxVWV_LXyFVEbosbdZkozkS-eiem8y5hSkYswXP77NOcsPhgkXKdysGJ2DABs6kN_6HLxpnM15E6Epvf3ne2ReHHsb86wcS2ISqyOe-qGos34FLQ7ISc9UZCvpLviY1jLzZfDMWfDRZtEz32od8etsVT7QXRcBCnSCSuwaFsJrwYIxCfxeJrUd_9wFxefc7isT1-P0iB1fcKu2hTf-FJgUgfhWEuED-ZAX1s0MLyeA5ogLGYaq_vtRGIcrZfT5Ft1xCsn_PtWZRE5mx5Tnw1Mm_vMs21JEuHy9KWwBRRutcTBhSbDjoxQ7jJ367OSEtEL_DQSM4P8G2VM-TU8GqZ6pTjpWO76dOFR6Jd_2H5yCB_-1kHQK-K15a_)
---
This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because a police-hating, Soros-funded prosecutor... ...is trying to rip my husband away from our family and lock him up for life for doing his job. **[And he might succeed if no one can help us.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6ebe1f2604b14005ab833b0e7a27b1db&_e=VlHfUKKKonX2jGx_ofNtAj_cIbh1CMN7mORXvwHjaqBRs1HDogqfQv2hlAFsqgWW7q3rEdp8prUaWV7vBEyVUMq21O-xf-51k8AUcEcOLXyPQeMRpcOipm_UziuZI-Gbnt2nC2fGRiRBub-4F6Aryxo4ml7oNwhOBRWLI1Ib2Vo83mV4dMyl9m4G4-ZJJQ6V4T9wbHgNqm25S9C6aEz6W6VMgZy_r8Gajwhhypo3HDQ54M6syAdRi-cMQ4VzV43q7eK0QH_DLiuY6NJuo8L5DXyZbNYBE9kaOmeIocjegbrzft0gT9FWDPVNcUae25eeWXPi6-53wdRV9GyVGqbHe-QY_jQha-fgp9W-fq0ZBjgstqoieOMoJOwz7kNTB9q7XmV8B_l3MucjcGZcMybX3LGILJqTBNVVa1RoluhF1CA7LHGa3lVMd27QHkM0QWFXSiHaUTTc8hkha8zQwfhWuBzZi7_SP4S1tj4GD4R9G17w2OHKo9ZwmnnAKQf7A_2JEzGToBkLyO133E8XuJeJNO1B56NCRJUjtsoBt-gPcS-vupwj7cZg-toKaw1Q5GYKYrI3Tp8grKVSPAuSCpK2C_KigyK6QoRDQKCfGNrz6H2rcoXaSrQyL_fbFAprWFKPCL_FtNfsZE_j8UBQBTMt30ZzrAusMtY4OoEcpKfem2vfQFzYC61qsfuR7MmYBPx5)** I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were “mostly peaceful.” It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down the interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn’t restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same “beanbag guns” that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before things got any worse. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. But what Chance didn’t know is that one of the beanbags he fired wound up hurting a rioter’s hand. And nearly **TWO YEARS** after my husband helped save our city from being burned to the ground... ...the county prosecutor decided to charge my husband with “aggravated assault by a public servant” – a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, I went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don’t care if my husband is innocent. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year-old police veteran. My husband was a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He’s served on mission trips – planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars could be his “reward.” Even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God’s grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us – the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (**LELDF**). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policeman’s best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they’ve agreed to help Chance. My friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: **[Will you help Chance, too?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6ebe1f2604b14005ab833b0e7a27b1db&_e=VlHfUKKKonX2jGx_ofNtAj_cIbh1CMN7mORXvwHjaqBRs1HDogqfQv2hlAFsqgWW7q3rEdp8prUaWV7vBEyVUMq21O-xf-51k8AUcEcOLXyPQeMRpcOipm_UziuZI-Gbnt2nC2fGRiRBub-4F6Aryxo4ml7oNwhOBRWLI1Ib2Vo83mV4dMyl9m4G4-ZJJQ6V4T9wbHgNqm25S9C6aEz6W6VMgZy_r8Gajwhhypo3HDSZkRr4u8lq4eBFBH-gxIKABAPsWjHw_dtXwWBRrvOy7QP-hQbwoFKOebFiniwWQHz5VsM3NdIuRL7tfCwa737hUR0o1CzTJPVLvAyuxY9PcykYe85dnG5v0Dgb9FvB9OkX-xLZ9kt70MkTZJg5svMBoM2FVYO9x-WSeqlXAa-PXI1Ho0P4vywm2pQJdseu2gEBG9DuhC2W-W_8co3EB4m-p-mDEOphWbdJmV_tTSYor9uR_FkQy4KL8ttdrQf_cQA1xxNVfGdmMnkStukgXeVO6IKiUKxPMQOLcQle56oZs4ixlxaCMZKTCFsgLrvNSdgEkkwGhadreOsWaUycURYLw9lcwlrE9_ZUpaglwI_h5PC6p_FDnwFd1QBnrUi2FjcYgfcEQyZLARGHvQk_K4LNbwvM_FjFmAzbUEibXcIte3_ea90lHWNaucTMXuVvnWm6m9bjKwOCHciSUkxjoncQ)** Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused?
