You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance’s trial starts in December. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he’ll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won’t be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won’t be able to walk our daughter down the aisle on her wedding day... I can’t bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, – or any amount – could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his “reward.” And to make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros-back prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance’s trial begins. Chance and I have three children – and one more on the way. Please don’t let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They couldn’t cancel this tour
body:
- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s
strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The
comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t
just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless.
- We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the
years... but never one quite like this.

Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve
never felt this much urgency to say one thing: THANK YOU.

I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._
while it was happening...

But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?

I DID.

And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar
before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring
Finale at UC Riverside...

You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the
videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...

But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:

PATRIOTS LIKE YOU HELPED LAUNCH THE MOST POWERFUL CONSERVATIVE CAMPUS
TOUR IN AMERICAN HISTORY.

It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.

AND THE AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR’S SPRING FINALE WAS IN A PLACE NO ONE
THOUGHT WE’D EVER TOUCH: CALIFORNIA.

The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where
mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas
aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._

And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.

Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the
“Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.

And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love
America...”

They ERUPTED.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

It wasn’t just another great tour stop...

IT WAS A BREAKTHROUGH.

Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it
was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.

And each one was just as powerful...

This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._

And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to
dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...

The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever
before.

_But let’s back up for a moment..._

Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the
Spring, this all started months ago.

BACK IN JANUARY, WHEN WE WERE LAYING OUT THE CALENDAR... THESE WERE
THE GOALS: GO BIGGER. GO BOLDER. GO DEEPER INTO LEFTIST TERRITORY.

We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe
“Red” states...

_But the ones the Left claimed as their own._

And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like
you — that’s exactly what we did.

LET ME GIVE YOU THE BIG PICTURE:

✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops

✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students

✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising
up

✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who
are rejecting them... _wholesale._

Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person..._
finally heard one._

Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag...
_were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._

Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of
something BIGGER than they ever imagined._

There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into
this one message...

BUT JUST LOOK AT WHAT WE'RE ACCOMPLISHING:

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

_Friend, this is why we fight..._

Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.

BUT FOR A GENERATION-WIDE CULTURAL RESET — PLAYING OUT IN REAL TIME,
IN REAL PLACES, IN THE HEARTS OF REAL STUDENTS.

This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.

And I hope you know: IT WOULDN’T EXIST WITHOUT PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your
generous gifts — made all of this possible.

Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these
campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America
First message the most.

YOU WEREN’T JUST WATCHING THIS TOUR... YOU WERE POWERING IT.

Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._

The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...

But this summer?

We’re preparing for something even BIGGER.

We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New
targets in Leftist territory to break through.

We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to
complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.

To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds.

AND RAISE UP THE BOLDEST, MOST UNAPOLOGETIC GENERATION OF
FREEDOM-LOVING AMERICANS SINCE THE FOUNDING OF THIS COUNTRY.

_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me._

Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen
what’s possible...

We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._

Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.

The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps
rolling strong.

I CAN’T SAY “THANK YOU” ENOUGH TO THE PATRIOTS LIKE YOU WHO’VE
HELPED MAKE TURNING POINT USA THE FORCE IT IS TODAY.

TOGETHER, WE’RE SAVING AMERICA... ONE STUDENT AT A TIME.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

P.S. I’ve been doing this for over a decade now...

_BUT I’VE NEVER SEEN MOMENTUM LIKE THIS._

These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our
ideas.

This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.

AND THE LEFT IS TERRIFIED.

You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our
students... But it’s not working anymore.

BECAUSE YOU AND I ARE REACHING THE NEXT GENERATION — CAMPUS BY
CAMPUS, STATE BY STATE, STUDENT BY STUDENT.

AND THAT’S WHY I’M ASKING YOU TO STAND WITH US AGAIN TODAY.
BECAUSE EVERY DOLLAR YOU GIVE TODAY WILL BE MATCHED.

That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And
your impact? DOUBLED.

_So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what
we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._

Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.

Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this
country when it returns this fall...

Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to
become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...

And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of
America’s young people again.

WE’RE NOT DONE. LET’S GO DEFEAT THE LEFT ONCE AND FOR ALL. MAKE
YOUR GIFT TO TURNING POINT USA TODAY AND HAVE YOUR IMPACT IMMEDIATELY
DOUBLED.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA &
DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=298587&trkid=764871630&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Fireworks. Freedom. And ZERO Apologies.

body:
Raise the flag, fire up the grill, and let freedom RING!

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/july-4th?utm_source=email&utm_medium=ac&utm_campaign=2020702_ORGOP_July4th&utm_id=CE)
---
---
| | Friend, it’s the most patriotic day of the year – and we’re **ALL IN.** Today, we celebrate the birth of a nation that defied tyranny, stood tall for liberty, and became the greatest force for freedom the world has ever known.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/zAb8MRqYY7sw/d1NlQXI5NzIxTVJtWTJSVFFqb2F5eTIxVW5jTEhpZTJKcHNRWG1VeFhTWmdVNzZKeXdCSmZXdUI5dVUxOVRBM3l1aFlwYVNuUm84ajVaREdQbHF4dzc0WGpvRmNvSThENkhmcEdnOEF4Tk09S0/)
---
| | July 4th, 1776, wasn’t just a date. It was a declaration. A declaration that the government works for the people, not the other way around. That freedom is worth fighting for. That America will **NEVER** be ruled by kings, communists, or cowards. So light those fireworks. Fire up that grill. Wave that flag like you mean it. Because this is what patriotism looks like – bold, loud, and proud. From the entire Oregon GOP team, **THANK YOU** for standing with us in the fight to defend this great country. God Bless America – and Happy Independence Day! Thank you, Oregon GOP **P.S.** Want to show your stars and stripes all summer long? [**_Grab our “Party Like It’s 1776” gear and let the Left know: We’re still free, still proud, and still the greatest nation on earth. >>>_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/XaEqBx7jj0sV/d1NlQXI5NzIxTVJtWTJSVFFqb2F5eTIxVW5jTEhpZTJKcHNRWG1VeFhTWmdVNzZKeXdCSmZXdUI5dVUxOVRBM3l1aFlwYVNuUm84ajVaREdQbHF4dzc0WGpvRmNvSThENkhmcEdnOEF4Tk09S0/)

## **Become a Paid Blue Amp Subscriber -- Power the Soundcheck Fund!**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.U2A4xvX6T1tB5dZd7YaxwD6F8p6_abW7Ej1Yl6fHPfE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167524719)
### This Is What Fighting Back Looks Like, My Friends
They've got billionaires. We've got each other.
Every day, the MAGA machine--propped up by oil barons, tech oligarchs, and authoritarian billionaires--pumps out disinformation designed to confuse, divide and conquer.
You know it. You feel it. And if you're like me, you're sick of watching them steamroll the truth. And you're _angry_ at what they're doing to _our_ country.
#### **That 's why we created the Soundcheck Fund.**
It's simple: _We 'll expose the grift, call out the lies and give **real** journalists and creators a megaphone--our megaphone--to tell the truth. **We have already put five figures into The Soundcheck Fund --out of our own pockets--to kick it off with grants to creators.**_
But to build a force that _can 't be bought and won't be silenced_, we need one other thing: **YOU**.
* * *
### Why This Matters
Right now, we're growing Blue Amp into one of the most trusted voices on the left.
We're independent. We're fierce. We have a huge platform. And we don't answer to corporate gatekeepers.
But freedom isn't free. Never has been.
The **Soundcheck Fund** is how we fund _the resistance_ --dozens of truth-tellers across the country. An ecosystem.
If you've been getting these newsletters for free, and you've found value in them...
If you believe we need a stronger pro-democracy movement--of creators, journalists, broadcasters, etc..
Then here's how you can help:
👉 **[Become a paid subscriber right now.](https://substack.com/redirect/604b1f5a-bf38-435d-92f6-249a3c676e15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Not later. Not someday. _Now._
* * *
### What You Get When You Join
* Full access to all Blue Amp Letters
* Exclusive Soundcheck Fund interviews & videos
* Behind-the-scenes Q&As in weekly video chats with Cliff Schecter & David Shuster
* The knowledge that _you 're helping fund the independent media we need at this moment_--not the media the billionaires want.

This isn't a donation. It's an act of resistance.
You're not just buying a subscription. You're building the only kind of journalism that can save democracy: _independent, relentless, unafraid. At exactly the moment we need it._
[ Join Now -- Fuel the Fight for Truth](https://substack.com/redirect/604b1f5a-bf38-435d-92f6-249a3c676e15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Thanks for being here.
For reading.
For caring.
Let's take the next step--together.
-- Cliff

If you enjoy Blue Amp, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe.

[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/sQ2CTzsgCbYAZRy5rU5baORLAW2LCwKb2hiO2PnWpVCfuwBtzlUI9iCzNRDwmn1D_0IVNKYr7zX-LrYCk-NgNSA5O_iZG-e-K04fkwyB7vCDdqh90W5acpvt_ZIF2FWzb64OKiGxdu1KLj7nUauChG5PKH7T96HQiNpV3MxEIofdE58VwhU_oyuovPD0lEnEGe5gDIZYmhmytsPUNQJy3z-K-puwcqSI_N27AkHX-9fLl50jrc8MX96mvmFadWge8W8LGxbwZX3pM7oWfrAPFBAp84cYv110Rcm_nlL3Bc8mSM5xqI3MyBcqIICr7CyDb9IXWHYb5VlgXMbwWAuALF17anueGVDb5oBL4slrHVypHSKvf4T_F9VlWIee4Xu6PwYbnVt3hqjSZhhaorpKMhquYEjgnQ9CNAGi8IdACtOdXPolI6eM1q3152MWZMbIqcPwdKkf2G_qhLl1-634cX2LqC7b--mGV95eBZ4Rtv8_4R_ufNq0o_BMURQrxQ4Oh2qY3YxqLOaGUkAhuobcvgUDT8jRYr6EB0u1sShF9Swqk9_MEArzT954cGSVcvLDLoZNLF7iIQrUPMGWxzoPHkR38xezB0PIm5S5tW4eQ0Zml5DWdl4JV1lCNPyyMQR3LVvOJO9GtCI-buV2Yy8xi47y1RuRshFC9Y5zRY93aW9jidNaFMm0t_iXydiD-2KW6bMU4aI0YmEJeMi3KRVV1YKE6bhFvIMvdkz3S6E9S1IYYAq67tloSeOXi0QwwxfyDxl0hOWvpQ/_IlXZ9b5DX93_quz2b_fQwquUYMAXL2j/10)

**Peter** ,

**Happy Independence Day.**

body:

| Peter,

**_Zohran Mamdani declares victory in NYC’s Democratic mayoral primary as Cuomo concedes_**
---
[Source: _Associated Press_]
---

clean_body: I had to take drastic action. | Peter, I was praying I wouldn’t have to write these words... But a radical, defund-the-police, communist, raging jihadist antisemite whose supporters have direct ties to terrorist groups is all but certain to WIN the Democrat Primary and is now set to become the next mayor of New York City. Zohran Mamdani declares victory in NYC’s Democratic mayoral primary as Cuomo concedes [Source: Associated Press] Like most Americans who are horrified by this, I was hoping that Kathy Hochul would finally show some semblance of a backbone and stand up to the extremism that’s taking over her party. But instead, she FULLY EMBRACED her party’s radical nominee, his dangerous rhetoric, and far-Left policy positions. That’s right – Kathy Hochul and New York Democrats have officially embraced not just Mamdani, but also Marxism, antisemitism, anti-capitalism, jihadism, and sheer insanity. Make no mistake, with a communist, jihaidst antisemite expected to be New York City’s next mayor and WEAK Kathy Hochul as our governor, every principle we hold dear as freedom-loving Americans will be under assault. Given the scale of the threat we now face, I had to do something drastic.Desperate times call for desperate measures! So, I called every donor I know, called in every favor I have, and secured a 500% MATCH on all grassroots contributions to help SAVE New York. I’ll be perfectly honest, Peter – if we don’t FIRE Hochul in 2026 and elect a governor willing to STOP the insanity coming out of New York City, our freedom will be crushed by the most extreme Left-wing agenda imaginable. This is an existential threat to our very way of life as Americans! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

President Donald Trump **[delivers a bone chilling 4th of July speech](https://substack.com/redirect/3c412619-2c2b-4e79-afdd-93dd4ed09ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to the troops.
This is what MAGA truly means...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3c412619-2c2b-4e79-afdd-93dd4ed09ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"As long as we never stop fighting for a better future, then there will be nothing that America cannot do!" Trump said as the crowd roared with cheers. "We will always be the people who defeated a tyrant, crossed a continent, harnessed science, took to the skies, and soared into the heavens, because we will never forget that we are Americans and the future belongs to us!"
"We are one people chasing one dream and one magnificent destiny,... and **[we are all made by the same ALL Mighty God!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/3c412619-2c2b-4e79-afdd-93dd4ed09ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch and just try not to tear up:
[Click To Watch Trump's Historic Speech](https://substack.com/redirect/3c412619-2c2b-4e79-afdd-93dd4ed09ff3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

## Dad Jumps Overboard to Save Daughter on Disney Cruise
A father jumped overboard on Sunday to rescue his 5-year-old daughter [after she fell](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAQBuDT2B0RYAymoHhNurx2SzQ2g02EwQKSKLdfOSvtBbYbaUaj7_-_bvYGIYa0_ocdjV-9bT7bhK8asTUs1oHLTyxzhuJycqEmfC_lEarllI-EKkKFdRDi24reGY_IcejRMDUyOWqhVb8ZLpB7TpX2Si6gh8EPYlZuBj3gpBnrgzm_UUUFp1SM8jIJMc2azZOXMHGgnaDoQsvlcs8htQ19fJ-uy5L3PpqttaN2w7-OXzt-PTAfEc9Vx68_ZPIxIzmgVkwrFuKwLiXMWMmed0yNOHDk_tiPSn4DE_DtPIXHup0DY0oKOsq-GHe8QoyhStUJuu4Q4ofS_tzh0_DvAAAA__9-rol-) from the fourth deck of the Disney Dream cruise ship into the ocean. An eyewitness said the girl was [sitting on a railing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb0SYYOwMDF28pWtH69k87FdhsIAk8t9XpFJ_oMtdrnR1z_m6T3cgT2H9hB2NW91UXJwCvrLHUjBNFmx8YpojJBuDpRzwXNKD8iSF7LjouVCTBfLnpBprHKLEa4Om7btWdzd165vNDBYVwKJ1B7DAFfrFOT1oFIvV7YDYkKlrohdKCqE6fRmUGuZbOw9OwyBBMCXQUonp8h0plA2dP-uvyxL3xputlCOz6weTI5NjOI-YS62YHOswk6Poa7RMjo_MKx-T4y8Nf-MgPyBnDCsmbjEviWbMvGBK5E4KK9_jjqFw4A7KholDsNzCY90KJv6q1Z8nJscmGXu8yHvKumdKrDuQf58t_7b8NPInAAD__4hJlZY) in a restricted area while her father tried to take a picture, and she suddenly fell. Moments later, the code "Mr. M.O.B." (man overboard) was announced over the intercom, prompting crew members to launch life preservers and deploy a rescue boat. The father reportedly treaded water with his daughter for about 20 minutes before they were safely rescued. Disney Cruise Line praised its crew for the fast, successful rescue. Watch [a video of the rescue here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdEGDM9hQuLgNXW67peWfcTKRgyPjDeLtV-wrbHekI3065_u62ZvjzOv9v3uRSfdkWyp2pX3L1BpVG10sH6q-uBrLGnlb6Qj1mzcrQY4X0BdAGx3nw2IXTSKSdO3IDHoc1DjjrLuHiZNUk3PeayU9whAipaRC8BrGeUbq2Jw00IASAEfVT4iTnwc_JeUm6UAgUORWav8svLYHpXycu_pQXl02j9bem7j-E3IRctn3vfc-nJ2Qy3lGyOXDkcoZQs0AesSnUqWrJr53zpk3pQXC_eU4_zLbn2V8jPwJAAD__7NudG4).
## Bride Meets Son's Heart Recipient
After losing her 4-year-old son Myles in a tragic car accident in 2023, [Kaci Wilson chose to donate his organs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQRk9jMiNjm7_AwUorNupNJ0QFLkONDG7ZNd3i9iPmChM_6dP73sdjfgBFOrf_cKALW5g5pPnEd4nIjHn24NML85Ig-3R6Kidea_6iMmulW6l6qezsgeI128q7gKjRVOiavm26drRjX-3Orh7ssEJQZuhatfRdCGPofaNNMLYJFbl7TfXKaqVs29WDtcMyNssQOhg0KGEVeuKU689EJ-8Y4nV71Ws6quh25mcR5o_Qk9ATLOv9oN7SjYWe_j1uMsFB8RJ6OhLvmOWByEUu6ZIZV6QXehmBUZZ0FrkjZJZ4JKZ0QhR6KpzyJcxEXpi_jTaqNe2gquz8800xUul6YdV2AMUfK_51zpfT3wEAAP__VmyLFQ), saving multiple children, including 7-year-old Saleh Ahmad, who received Myles' heart. Saleh was born with a chronic heart condition and spent most of his first five years in the hospital, including three years on an organ transplant waitlist. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb8GOxx8omhBkcZu06Z0HvJcSRAcIEv27zObX0h9Z-45cz5u6w2dd-H-jifp_b6vZY9roJo9lUJptWjjg5KJmGwM1uVAzy19u7yCgIELxYVcLTr_XGVj9U4E1DekOzV04zDLWTWHtigHMmYHmnucJqOGseuk2RRZ0w0KG6dfb0IJCULIYWwnKSczd2baR5wABZOCrCsxtZ_RhXLQ7p8vr3aLZ-P1UcqVWf_GYGGw1FrbmtC_RgbLw1mKDBa86IcfhKnwkjDky2MoPNHmLkeh8Ir-K3MbQ0w88zOe3MYaeDmIo8ueGCwAAmbRA4OlSdpe1Xnv8qiYFPcT3R-xKf_u-NDwGwAA__-xjooI). Kaci and Saleh kept in contact and met for the first time at her wedding. In a tearful embrace, she listened to her late son's heartbeat through a stethoscope. ## Runner Finds Lifesaving Stranger
Tommy Chan, 39, woke up in a Canadian hospital four days after [suffering a heart attack](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL9Gs2shomhA8BKzeemG1hUuyi7CFDBj-fdb7n7CZqeTrtP98Vge6LwL2388SNnNLsXGJdCZPZVCaTFo4pvSGjGZGIzLgS6dXi4vnPEemAQmFoPOX4uojbJEnLqaVCv7dugnMcl6Vx0xY4UdtJ2o7cZ27fQ6EVmx9sbocaqdutuYZIIzJvqhGYUY16ldRzvgyJFVgpFxJabmM7pQdrL-ur0aHY_aq72UZ666fxWfKz6f59noVTcaKz7fWyo-awxo7hxLwfMGDPDLkF4hUIJnzIUMxOBdIMD85cIGxhm44gsyvgmOC7yzBGWnADvBFgtgAAz5pARtI3vJ5cjqpMzzdN67PMhKsO1A539My58vfiv-HQAA__8E-JPp), remembering nothing of the evening run that nearly killed him. Determined to find and thank those who helped, Tommy posted a message online: _“Did you save my life?”_ —hoping it might reach the strangers who had come to his aid that night. His post reached nurse practitioner Tawnya Shimizu, who was driving with her daughter when they saw people gathered around Tommy. Tawnya pulled over and started CPR until emergency crews arrived. [Doctors urge bystanders](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb9u3DAMh5-G3iJItOQ_g4erUwMZUhRZOhqyRJ8V6KSDpJzrpc9enKfu5fLx40CQ-P16n9-18y5cf-gbDet1ncsa50B79lQKpdlqGx-UlqiTjcG6HOgw6cvlGTmqF96-cDlb7fwxy8oOKxFSXdEgWiUa1cu-rbbByJ4Edo0xC7VL25teEgppFiuMbJWs3PDcxlsukXOpGtZJ2S29WLq10R1qDpKTdSUm9hldKBut_njexUy8VX7YSrlnqC-AE-C07zvTm_6MXylon1lMV8DJRgc4Cc6EaATgNL59MP5PCa4kYA315Q_Ul0K_C9Sv345cdLCUABXy8efHyU3nk4nupAtZf5y6EAXAcXx72niOBGsaQPUdAVXHAVVfI6ufjXoF7FmVBnvfnfcuNy1Ifr1p58-nyn-n8RjwbwAAAP__hz6Tpw) to act in moments like this, saying it can be the difference between life and death.

Use yours to record memorable videos or surveys and protect your property today. | Dad Jumps Overboard to Save Daughter on Disney Cruise A father jumped overboard on Sunday to rescue his 5-year-old daughter - from the fourth deck of the Disney Dream cruise ship into the ocean. An eyewitness said the girl was in a restricted area while her father tried to take a picture, and she suddenly fell. Moments later, the code "Mr. M.O.B." (man overboard) was announced over the intercom, prompting crew members to launch life preservers and deploy a rescue boat. The father reportedly treaded water with his daughter for about 20 minutes before they were safely rescued. Disney Cruise Line praised its crew for the fast, successful rescue. Watch . Bride Meets Son's Heart Recipient After losing her 4-year-old son Myles in a tragic car accident in 2023, , saving multiple children, including 7-year-old Saleh Ahmad, who received Myles' heart. Saleh was born with a chronic heart condition and spent most of his first five years in the hospital, including three years on an organ transplant waitlist. . Kaci and Saleh kept in contact and met for the first time at her wedding. In a tearful embrace, she listened to her late son's heartbeat through a stethoscope. . Saleh then , a moment Kaci stated was the "closest I've felt to Myles since the accident." 📣 Join Amy Hess for a heartfelt interview with Kaci in today's Feel Good Flyover Podcast. () Runner Finds Lifesaving Stranger Tommy Chan, 39, woke up in a Canadian hospital four days after , remembering nothing of the evening run that nearly killed him. Determined to find and thank those who helped, Tommy posted a message online: “Did you save my life?” —hoping it might reach the strangers who had come to his aid that night. His post reached nurse practitioner Tawnya Shimizu, who was driving with her daughter when they saw people gathered around Tommy. clean_body: I just unveiled a new Social Security plan, and these will definitely affect you. Seriously, you need to take a look at this. | | | | KEEP YOUR FILTHY HANDS OFF SOCIAL SECURITY! Friend, I wanted to update you on some of my Social Security initiatives, and these will definitely affect you! #1 Illegals shouldn’t be receiving social security checks! That’s why I signed a Presidential Memorandum to ensure Illegal Aliens won’t get them! HERE’S THE BIG ONE... #2 ELIMINATE TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY — putting more money in YOUR pocket. That’s right. You shouldn’t have to be taxed LIKE CRAZY to receive the checks that men and women like you worked so hard for! But don’t thank me yet. Democrats are trying to shut down my initiative right now as you’re reading this. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas. It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late. All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY: Thank you, Donald J. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. * **INSTITUTED** tax breaks for billionaires like Elon Musk,
* **FIRED** thousands of federal workers for no reasons,
* And so much more!

Remember friend, under President Joe Biden...
* The FIRST Black woman was nominated to the Supreme Court,

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: This Is What We Fight For
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Proud to celebrate freedom and the American spirit today | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8f9b0fab29e4/welcome-to-team-flippo-10338877?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=774405aac1&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Friend, As we celebrate the birth of the greatest nation on Earth. A country built by patriots who stood up to tyranny and risked everything for the promise of freedom. **As an Air Force veteran, combat commander and a proud American Patriot,** I believe we owe it to them to keep that spirit alive. Our freedoms were paid for in blood, and it is our duty to defend them.
---
|
---
| This Fourth of July, I am reminded why I stepped up to run for Congress. It is about protecting the values that made this country great, faith, family, freedom, and a government that works for the people, not against them. Wishing you and your family a safe and proud Independence Day. Let’s keep fighting for the America we love. God Bless Nevada. God Bless America.
---
|
For Nevada, for freedom, and for America, David Flippo
_Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
_**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=c94e4cc307&e=273c9a71fb)**_

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Celebrating 249 Years of Independence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Celebrating 249 Years of Independence**_
---
Friends, Today, Hoosiers from all 92 counties will gather to celebrate America's the 249th anniversary of America's independence. We are so blessed to call this great nation home and even more so to be Hoosiers. Your Indiana Republican team is hard at work for you. Our leaders in Washington have worked with President Trump to deliver historic tax cuts in the Big Beautiful Bill. Back here in Indiana, Governor Mike Braun and Republicans in the state house are continuing their efforts to make government more efficient and effective for Hoosiers. You can read more about the work we are doing in my Op-Ed published today by the Fort Wayne Journal Gazette [here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/gVQI1u9ntOk3fMbranI1YIG2knrN3vSC23ksbtl9Vqy5otteLFIev2eB6tE6tTBsNoqAV-eYdjdeyD3jCbBGtpuuvhs_upUCQgR8RJo3D4MPVWJU3OG1Anfm0z1Z0iIq5xh-Z8rN16CNWxcsJMJmIGqypoweLMUeLCYL4yIZK5lnjKPOCKJPACoALLMR4XYQnc0nO7NEKFXzNEb1e4_PhDdttb9-zM9AvcCbgB2AOp6Eo5rHvdT2egTM2z9vdyqnNjF_LlVo73m6KwPevbQURDD2kMPEZyTfh-GfH61XzlMUKuT_ghq4-sTYFoiE8s_KsUzUskF9qEL6mL1ZqayS5p1DSkHoEspF7vT0hzgulg5bS27BTz4fcvjDwyRRNJ7JrSqmRbuc0yTvyYjY9dD1vF9_DczrFONL1U2fz5ZJKId6kUQPVmWvKQUMmJ0rsxS5DrhTC0ycr96k34hOgpK4mn2l0sUi02urQlyIlQmy6bPBj54-32mn5HpEOPJxSEnoIZJnhBTUI40LAztvcPQ2jegPp3IMYUi44IqQqCgDJ9AALuBz8sLc-gzw47atzwSlv0aZ4q9zrICFGE7pPaP035hfL0k87fO1AVRuZ29rYnifp56uw1GntDB8MsElLUfd-hIStQT9Qa9JOXINJuc553Iy5dR_1rI5UilzojCTwDzoax29QDoqG-Hq28egfxKV2YxUdkI/Ljor6g7sbjnV3pZWJArNXzJa-sPCUPiD/10). I hope that this weekend is full of fun, family, and freedom for you and those that you love. Thank you for your support of the Indiana GOP and happy Independence Day!
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman

The Indiana GOP is happy to announce that our updated website has been launched, with a completely redesigned interface and new features! clean_body: | | | | | | | Celebrating 249 Years of Independence Friends, Today, Hoosiers from all 92 counties will gather to celebrate America's the 249th anniversary of America's independence. We are so blessed to call this great nation home and even more so to be Hoosiers. Your Indiana Republican team is hard at work for you. Our leaders in Washington have worked with President Trump to deliver historic tax cuts in the Big Beautiful Bill. Back here in Indiana, Governor Mike Braun and Republicans in the state house are continuing their efforts to make government more efficient and effective for Hoosiers. You can read more about the work we are doing in my Op-Ed published today by the Fort Wayne Journal Gazette . I hope that this weekend is full of fun, family, and freedom for you and those that you love. Thank you for your support of the Indiana GOP and happy Independence Day! | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor Braun Visits Patoka Lake "Thank you to the state park staff at Patoka Lake for showing me the ropes! Our state’s parks are a great way to get out this summer and Make Indiana Healthy Again!" \- Governor Braun via Governor Braun Promotes Nuclear Energy "Indiana is uniquely positioned to be the national leader in nuclear energy, and my administration is committed to making that goal a reality." \- Governor Mike Braun via | Delaware County Decatur County Dearborn County Scott County Harrison County Dubois County Crawford County Chairwoman's County Visits: 55 | Announcing Our Updated Website The Indiana GOP is happy to announce that our updated website has been launched, with a completely redesigned interface and new features! To stay up to date on our work at the Indiana GOP, events across our state, and more ways to get involved, please visit . We are fighting every day to keep Indiana red and deliver on the Freedom and Opportunity that you voted for in November, and we can only do that thanks to the support of Hoosiers like you! If you have any suggestions or are interested in helping to elect Republican candidates, please do not hesitate to reach out through our website or to info@indiana.gop. Yours in service, INGOP HQ | Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? The Indiana Republican Party is now accepting applications for our Summer and Fall Internship Program! ✅ Gain hands-on experience in campaign strategy, communications, and event planning ✅ Work alongside state leaders and build valuable connections ✅ Make a real impact on Republican efforts in Indiana Apply Today! Spots are limited! 🔗 | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Mike Braun Hoosiers a happy and safe Independence Day. Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith a town hall in Kosciusko County to hear from Hoosiers about issues important to them. Secretary Diego Morales in the Linton 4th of July parade, the largest parade in the state. Treasurer Daniel Elliott in the Pekin 4th of July parade. the oldest consecutive parade of its kind in America. Comptroller Elise Nieshalla Hoosiers a happy Independence Day, and reminded us about the national debt crisis. Attorney General Todd Rokita the conservative state Attorneys General bringing a case to the Supreme Court to protect fairness and safety in girls' sports. Senator Todd Young an Op-Ed in support of shipbuilding as a national priority. Senator Jim Banks the Trump Administration for securing a trade deal with Vietnam. Congressman Rudy Yakym President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill. Congressman Marlin Stutzman Hoosiers a Big Beautiful 4th of July. Congressman Jim Baird Speaker Mike Johnson and his colleagues for passing President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Hoosiers a happy Independence Day. Congressman Jefferson Shreve the inclusion of his key legislation, the Build the Wall Act, being included in H.R. 1, the budget reconciliation bill. Congressman Mark Messmer about the historic wins in the Big Beautiful Bill, passed by the House. name: President Trump
subject: Updates on Social Security checks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I just unveiled a new Social Security plan, and these will definitely affect you. Seriously, you need to take a look at this.
| | | | |
---
## **_KEEP YOUR FILTHY HANDS OFF SOCIAL SECURITY_**

[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Friend, I wanted to update you on some of my Social Security initiatives, and these will definitely affect you!
**#1 Illegals shouldn’t be receiving social security checks! That’s why I signed a Presidential Memorandum to ensure Illegal Aliens won’t get them!**
__HERE’S THE BIG ONE...__
**#2** **ELIMINATE TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY** — putting more money in YOUR pocket. That’s right. You shouldn’t have to be taxed LIKE CRAZY to receive the checks that men and women like you worked so hard for!
**_But don’t thank me yet._**
_Democrats are trying to shut down my initiative right now as you’re reading this. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas._
It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late.
All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY:
**_[Do you stand with me - President Trump, and my plan to END TAXES on SOCIAL SECURITY?](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**
[YES](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
[NO](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
[END TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,

[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Donald J. Trump
[END TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)

name: Kelly Morrison
subject: This 4th of July, lets recommit to the work ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
I will continue to fight for the right of all Americans to pursue life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110871929/555600261/1062681229?source=250704_40j_op30d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkzOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVlNzYwOWYtMWM1OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UVTa-ZKd6Fvo4yfmqI4ZtRZ3RInGzLdJejnG_tCp9ck=&emci=c5673df2-1a59-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a5e7609f-1c59-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26798886)
---
| | Hello and Happy 4th of July, Peter! As we gather to celebrate our country’s 249th anniversary of its Declaration of Independence from a king, it is worth remembering that our democracy must be earned every generation. Yesterday, House Republicans did President Trump’s bidding and pushed through a bill **that will strip 17 million Americans of their healthcare, gut food assistance, force hospitals to close, raise energy prices, and explode the national debt. It will hurt all of us, but**** _especially_****our most vulnerable. ** Peter, this country was founded on the belief that we all deserve a fair shot at a good life. I will continue to fight for the right of all Americans to pursue life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. My motivation for this work comes from my love for our country, and my desire to see it work for all of us. I hope that you will join me this Independence Day to recommit to the tough work ahead of us as we fight for our democracy and our freedom. I’m honored to do this work alongside you. Wishing you and your family a happy and safe Independence Day, Peter. 🇺🇸 With gratitude and patriotism,
Kelly Morrison
---
|
---

Wishing you and your family a happy and safe Independence Day, Peter. 🇺🇸 With gratitude and patriotism, Kelly Morrison | | | | | ---|---|---|--- I've spent most of my career as a doctor, not a politician, and I believe we need leaders who are focused on delivering results for Minnesota families. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money , so I'm counting on folks like your giving what they can, when they can. = | Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date. If you only want to receive our most important emails, We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can . | | Morrison for Congress PO Box 684 Wayzata, MN 55391 United States | | Paid for by Morrison for Congress

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/c1i9-FHodreJJ8knJx8ZxQ5PXS3wZexDr1YcGEzzrJ1gKsV_OQcdpm98KsFSkiLbvjUuOIReK0ipgBu1Kmw6K_JcslGQpGlSnkM12YNEqteDJlMcnM0HoQnW5scDmQpZ0AA0K4PWGw729x04w58ZRAoLXI9-q6xV7WC07VtV329Zk4a45LPlqdxbYn7VkTP7OYdqWyKovaoRJgB1hmklZgxel7fn9aSxKX51p27XjaJ-n416fL8vQSCJku7eWjXAbzKwbpUo9ylpsO9BxcuQ4ansH8quNxinZIeJSbO3IkVOvGKqvu-Zy9ST_aLsuL5yk-KXl6WC3a75D_4w_iKySDmdDz0By8jn7bzL329_88kJBo55AExox-z5nUvXDyn8KSLWI_1KPyDa8b3-M3atOz6sa2YQhjslhJaXQyAc1VrbMcH9n2X_RkD00bEy1G2LumxBZmHKnTzo_OKYDNfXi0Y7igbR6bdFv048llZ9uEvjEi5XxNayGaetHnOMIJ_SoN6mJ_dF6MmLIwFQ5N97Ul9jpXagAzQsgpfaDuZfMuTCscpIM5b8FDIng5TMj9iATRwAnsloqXt0uQtgWipn8A0h4XWq4VvsDc38JjlTuQjJGSRBzdzp6pBNv8I0JdYIOCeqEcOYciVWDB_kcya4c7cD3MmdThWQg0PQitnDU-J5whbqUv1poHpIH8BZK9qQgBItT6U666QasJcOIEfKgDF0nRCjrbZOZltlPwICxMUb1wVQnte2nGcbPjTTeTltdvWgJwiRTdnWFuSBC5DyxVaemASoVQpx6WMoLhrVfvWHejrY3g/ecMcWhBIGsmamcN2LQRU2HRg7gbAYFZV/10 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/dLc2g5bTfOkbQxoiqCukX4Jn9QfPEegzb6XW5QRXveMzFkZ9eLftktTwb3ixR4xtyeIGYdzHPC_XzGbRokwYPnqPvEn8Zxuslvy2YTGsqH2lqzORRS79LYPX2YWB2uwfcW3BKUe1dxyQwG3crkcipliByWBOwan-phxMVGT-Qh-pem46Rbu4VFm3CYnxRBjj-YcJTyNM6ZJMytPQW4pb9SFeP-AUDSxG8WnnHE48EloA9Ty8j3k5PGwgYlctwB3P9oKXIXpfcbzxmMBpHtFWGhB1NUBf5X0UlCpwnSGE_bMhyDIpR1FUurEEcnBhCzuHd1bPYt1pEDpV69nFF8NYNqy7h0tND_lAe2Cqv7T2E-AAEHKbfEBl9lqna7-H8BtmFTicfGxu6gIXUmRl9a6Mqz3-RNBPsiQ3fz4WDVmKTkkO1jA3ipp-c-QBx0_Vid06B089qwHvXYsfKSy--Qi290Qzjf2G_Yt74gYijPwqiMU8wjQuNlV90j2Fb19izTsghOVSo5ZIzaaFStLRBUgI0iK_4M5-PCZ934Grw235KXpi_k97su1hViZPhAbOW0QJ1v94wnqmPGm7rirJVpCo5k4r0wCallva6-Ua3TFk-fnJmq68SpVMfUwoHQ6UByv9VkvRTEBgn6cX6ekhwaJiDdVeqt6bd7N9jvk4MkuDHtGpH7nEUBCI1JtcyDziqoZ9zWrqdf_TsQSIHwisLlx1CkMBcmyxk_g6VJcabKyj2bOrWXjGB5B9d918Lz4T71rG8UtRt8huMs4lN3zvof6vwiZu6cBMxDTjGDA3HIItEksExdjc-A/EbaeWH0dQc6wOXHH2-GdTh-8ZJXU2Agp/10 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/92XejFkNppIiULPT8sgm1d5NpxAlqpou5SfJN8ECSnSWdOkq-UKRkFqm_zLsf0tdjEeZvXuI_xktXVC_UwLRS14Km0FIVuTznaVBuc4jFmfyAjR3t0AfJXqi9CDORQWBAQgOYhaIxxqmTQ1j-GwP9TrsdzSXuRcs6PmANm8Ij_n4d4uCW_vDvtRosTlM8LZxRPl1SdiJt3t92NheIIWHzrj-3ngRBpZVZr-AFtqlmVxOCrmUAOfc1NyAkW6HzJCguaY_weGpzZAJQDJXKKevT-R0Q6skYninf0rMDmTrCQCNBboPV9W5Ai1VP6a-JK3Dy9fkOp1IaqF9I1h05silHFe5gZgNsbU-mZbg6FJf3Yt2ySFECxNafg25qKvVp7ETJ8BcDHsxxnPueKmJ4uuIMMStfgcF-SyjXX63E_nly3bda2nkTe_grREO3GvO4BTBqzk2EoV8W6iiHOB2ANvljaYFraNpmaKxMN0jusxnGpc_elhGoreK911vnbhiX0JjgKMK4pUXHcE3zZXDdpzvoiVcbekNR8ctMPcUXLrXyayODmA0odXZfN2UOSJLCbPPqNVN_p0-MxPctJkC9FXghpLW7qkQWt1Yorh3f4IqChMla1HIoDq57RpWtgca5wfI7CrQj2M97euxjiiCw48i1cPx1n95HaaRxpElNKeJwenLW4aguxfMa2k1jUHjgMdN5yZl08CCzsDfaFgaqlluIUh4IEqcSblYHt0phTiLgUFACnuu_c3jfXBJo-llMbcYrZj2jh81fpRUVsYBMNoX5cXgKCHCQmNLngWmowl-dOML13sMVA/vqpZG9n5usRRqDX4zSaAlnj7ioQXSmDT/10 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

[ PLEASE JOIN US ](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/FcocaCiDlIo7tKtdYoiAO9dBXumcTf9DhdMWxHWt7eNqJlwU3xpVAhrAHSOJuvkRIHPActCoMKmkLGyUQP-e0Wggr9h-iUM_Hjk4_9QkWGrZuc0gdNXHz-_9FEzwGPBkZ5mW0qi2e3z6J0DsONkHH0Q_VcvOfXsABnbsxhjvYk-x4RaQZ2bC_UO_2dZVv8d54oxi4I4OkRnBwOVFwBuQS9zwEclHhdmHmZhYTgjhAjEBuWNUptK-4ZhHDe8MrTB_MN7_E2SHvWYX10gvbiPf9Zr_nu6ZynId34JvmXbhlodkYY8VKbtipmjXvn_pLHWp4vPJo2O4W1puhx0byN1QtBGsQayN7fY8CBr56XLIY-fhjvhYH7oiD8a5P1HRoNydaQDFHf-BNHFfz0qnD9IP5X5_7oetMx4C-tSWGB27Sqeg3NxqMPCKrFynZRoCoqLtvx7820KIsdhCTclbfqL6dUN4h-FO9TAsYaF4nkL4zKt2DXg9Y9caTccUhCjEQ03yS2BEknaCbFlIo2gLx9EX2SKW4REtDHYbV7ia21gjbMHd1eOEWge7AwqDSBqeb9GXKkQXtShyTVQCLsQfQnNViOVv_rrpWUjBxxt0PVPTZjw6uKq4Xm1vz3AXTvhmD8Y7uc-pls3wXORr1_zW52XmR68ABz7IleCBmeXeQZXSpq6MUOaWadIrq3PsjJjgjKBGLn4OEpVBkZiaznwv_ruv7k-PcNgILcZypYDNwbVZQEaFAfIS1Oql81ZEc4mrv9zitXfIqgHpOu0czevrQ_QGyyIdM0cZUNM8WZv7qEpovyT7pFvbBw/fq9IRW1IVm4HQOYW77ab-JNCj_eS5O94/10)
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_[I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/srFUZVR3vNGx0JgVtHIEQ3dUYYO671e2YSJcwXig0qDVy88tI1asUBAgZAhan4nkst1cPyAAH533YZDFm4Kfw3fTtcS4pScOHPRE9d1eDTHuED4v2h6bzBFoB4SbfgFcvgodXl3V6WN7cJTfDkrRSwpyTq8234XJ_DA3bfeFPTk1b5TY--Zsi_BQEx-sVnIJ6Od5PvLC-nDs2A_xP0vFUnylBMsSR8MRuVlVV9zqxEUtRugVk01p5zezLRS1tMir6FVbkwL4mxaHoLDAxTKXq3H29BDLeZAozvZHjvxzBMsduUv9-M0ne2-EMJphjl93WtjG9OO7SBjjKEfRr8HNl8d0ljf7PlhN2xBs0iFm4Zrkb9LjIVsBlwL03ilmvZhfHAOY-I5yFx8xW4Cjb1ea5wdQlebjNIiG7hIZV_zE_CbMm3G96m0CQIqYvz-auH3H472zZFXtC_g-eS2eBYQTW5ujFpFDQo9KnuRIgqY4B-vdcEtI3eey_MOryHGX6k5qV9zLrS7IDeJliF5f9e_ZxObF4T1RVkk6Ba3ii90ccBQP6aBsN5jj-Mgbo1gUpzGBWhlKLc9ri52wawXkEQuMpbrXMbEpHgQH3S0ghTipFT7QHIyFCiTQyW6hXA3NU2MyEACCB5YdWJhAj7XAXKDQHWGvuNZhFvyUcFXmsuDq3zcGk1LJCkpP0ypwMsgmOEwq33LUNTQAnDtT4XOVD-2ZH-wJbaTP9Cf066BX8tf7b_c1gCNN26l8fZOX_onA2asRtCpsdWdWxnITCD8uFYTIe49C5ywHDfuLOGhAW5u2SIS33IZbxg/5cRsxjs24e_XUNy6p__UheFy5jS7q01K/10 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration \- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! We 're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:** | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 |

name: Jim Marchant
subject: Independence Means We the People
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marchant for Nevada
body:
Proud to celebrate the spirit of freedom this Fourth of July
| | | | | [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xtz2ofmKYt3jP76Xcvgcy81z3Pdh9Kj_f3eUa-K99_O_MTmntbraU1h_FTLwudoC_A2FZeAbJzGFtwmOGCKYCppQ5yzlS8nPH4qOLFFmypL0MDQndEj61QzbyC0XKhNoFBV8Tjl3FwqaEPWzkFLjKUcaanWZEIH7&c=M45pHVQUVM3R4oVSa1eoH5qmbXLF_tEqjf89LCLzSpoPE5RzjZCSrQ==&ch=OElc1Zoty3mgV44yn4IAceC6enaiAmdl4wNU8RWGwXnDeL2sb-6Vig==)
---
| Peter,
---
They fought for freedom, faith, and the right of the people to choose their leaders. That fight is not over.
---
|
---
This Fourth of July, I am more committed than ever to restoring the America our founders envisioned. It starts with free and fair elections, a government that answers to the people, and leaders with the courage to stand up to the corrupt establishment.
As Americans, we have a duty to defend our freedoms and preserve the values that made this country great. That is what my campaign is all about.
Wishing you and your family a proud and safe Independence Day.
---
God Bless Nevada. God Bless America,
Jim Marchant Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress - NV01 [JimMarchant.com](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xtz2ofmKYt3jP76Xcvgcy81z3Pdh9Kj_f3eUa-K99_O_MTmntbraU1h_FTLwudoC_A2FZeAbJzGFtwmOGCKYCppQ5yzlS8nPH4qOLFFmypL0MDQndEj61QzbyC0XKhNoFBV8Tjl3FwoYq8n6TWBj4wSw4UTxtOve&c=M45pHVQUVM3R4oVSa1eoH5qmbXLF_tEqjf89LCLzSpoPE5RzjZCSrQ==&ch=OElc1Zoty3mgV44yn4IAceC6enaiAmdl4wNU8RWGwXnDeL2sb-6Vig==)

Happy 4th of July from the Sean Spicer Show. We hope you are celebrating a safe and fun Independence Day surrounded by your friends and family. As the big, beautiful bill hits President Trump's desk, just like he said it would, it marks another historic achievement early in his presidency. The big, beautiful bill is President Trump's America First agenda and its passing shows a united Republican party. As President Trump signed the bill today, I want to share the latest data from Seth Kesher. If you remember, Keshel perfectly predicted the 2024 election right here on the show. His forecast models with states that register voters by party are incredibly accurate, allowing Seth to look at comparable counties and trends to predict how other states will vote. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Floods kill 6 in Hill Country as Guadalupe River rises, says Kerr county judge,** " San Antonio Express-News' **Gabriella Ybarra** , **Tony Plohetski** and **Anthony Franze** - "At least six people are dead, caught in "catastrophic" flooding along the Guadalupe River that prompted evacuations in the Hill Country after heavy rains washed the region overnight.

All Kerr County residents who live near the Guadalupe River have been asked to evacuate their homes and move to higher ground. All other residents are encouraged to shelter in place and avoid travel, according to the Kerr County Sheriff's Office.

The National Weather Service said a flash flood emergency is ongoing in South-Central Kerr County, including the Guadalupe River. The portion of the river near Hunt had reached the second-highest level on record, the weather service said.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/24837670-44d6-44e5-911e-d97753cc77d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As of 10:40 a.m. Friday, very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties. According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday.

As of 10:40 a.m., very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/24837670-44d6-44e5-911e-d97753cc77d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. After that, radar shows that light to moderate rainfall will continue for several hours, likely until 3 p.m. or later for parts of Hill Country.

Upward of 10 inches of rain has fallen across portions of South-Central Kerr County. Another 2 to 5 inches will be possible for the region before the rain subsides later this afternoon and evening. So the flood might get worse before it gets better.

County Judge **Rob Kelly** confirmed to Hearst Newspapers six deaths.

"We can confirm but we are afraid there may be more," he said. "They are still looking."

Child campers at Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls in Hunt, have all been accounted for, although rescues were conducted in the area, Kelly said. Emergency crews carried out rescues before dawn at an RV park near Howdy's Restaurant in Kerrville, which also has been damaged by floodwaters.

The Kerr County Sheriff's Office said "catastrophic" floods have resulted in "fatalities," though the agency said it would not release further information until next of kin are notified.

The sheriff's office said it is working with a local and state agencies to respond to calls and rescues. A reunification point has been set up at the Walmart at 2106 Junction Highway.

Significant flooding is also present in northern and western Kendall County, including in Comfort.

Comfort High School is being set up as a shelter for people who are displaced, according to the City of Boerne.

The Boerne Fire Department has deployed rescue teams to assist residents in the Comfort area.

Highway 27 at Cypress Creek in Comfort and FM 1350 east of Center Point will be closed by TxDOT until water recedes, according to the City of Boerne." [SAEN](https://substack.com/redirect/2fe4932d-baf8-4116-b8d3-eb1721acef57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "Floods kill 6 in Hill Country as Guadalupe River rises, says Kerr county judge, " San Antonio Express-News' Gabriella Ybarra , Tony Plohetski and Anthony Franze - "At least six people are dead, caught in "catastrophic" flooding along the Guadalupe River that prompted evacuations in the Hill Country after heavy rains washed the region overnight. All Kerr County residents who live near the Guadalupe River have been asked to evacuate their homes and move to higher ground. All other residents are encouraged to shelter in place and avoid travel, according to the Kerr County Sheriff's Office. The National Weather Service said a flash flood emergency is ongoing in South-Central Kerr County, including the Guadalupe River. The portion of the river near Hunt had reached the second-highest level on record, the weather service said. As of 10:40 a.m. Friday, very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties. According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. As of 10:40 a.m., very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties. According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. After that, radar shows that light to moderate rainfall will continue for several hours, likely until 3 p.m. or later for parts of Hill Country. Upward of 10 inches of rain has fallen across portions of South-Central Kerr County. Another 2 to 5 inches will be possible for the region before the rain subsides later this afternoon and evening. So the flood might get worse before it gets better. County Judge Rob Kelly confirmed to Hearst Newspapers six deaths. "We can confirm but we are afraid there may be more," he said. "They are still looking." Child campers at Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls in Hunt, have all been accounted for, although rescues were conducted in the area, Kelly said. Emergency crews carried out rescues before dawn at an RV park near Howdy's Restaurant in Kerrville, which also has been damaged by floodwaters. The Kerr County Sheriff's Office said "catastrophic" floods have resulted in "fatalities," though the agency said it would not release further information until next of kin are notified. The sheriff's office said it is working with a local and state agencies to respond to calls and rescues. A reunification point has been set up at the Walmart at 2106 Junction Highway. Significant flooding is also present in northern and western Kendall County, including in Comfort. Comfort High School is being set up as a shelter for people who are displaced, according to the City of Boerne. The Boerne Fire Department has deployed rescue teams to assist residents in the Comfort area. Highway 27 at Cypress Creek in Comfort and FM 1350 east of Center Point will be closed by TxDOT until water recedes, according to the City of Boerne." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Floods kill 6 in Hill Country as Guadalupe River rises, says Kerr county judge,** " San Antonio Express-News' **Gabriella Ybarra** , **Tony Plohetski** and **Anthony Franze** - "At least six people are dead, caught in "catastrophic" flooding along the Guadalupe River that prompted evacuations in the Hill Country after heavy rains washed the region overnight.

All Kerr County residents who live near the Guadalupe River have been asked to evacuate their homes and move to higher ground. All other residents are encouraged to shelter in place and avoid travel, according to the Kerr County Sheriff's Office.

The National Weather Service said a flash flood emergency is ongoing in South-Central Kerr County, including the Guadalupe River. The portion of the river near Hunt had reached the second-highest level on record, the weather service said.
[BECOME A PAID A SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/cf4e6ba2-2948-41fb-b328-19bc1f2d5960?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As of 10:40 a.m. Friday, very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties. According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday.

As of 10:40 a.m., very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/cf4e6ba2-2948-41fb-b328-19bc1f2d5960?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. After that, radar shows that light to moderate rainfall will continue for several hours, likely until 3 p.m. or later for parts of Hill Country.

Upward of 10 inches of rain has fallen across portions of South-Central Kerr County. Another 2 to 5 inches will be possible for the region before the rain subsides later this afternoon and evening. So the flood might get worse before it gets better.

County Judge **Rob Kelly** confirmed to Hearst Newspapers six deaths.

"We can confirm but we are afraid there may be more," he said. "They are still looking."

Child campers at Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls in Hunt, have all been accounted for, although rescues were conducted in the area, Kelly said. Emergency crews carried out rescues before dawn at an RV park near Howdy's Restaurant in Kerrville, which also has been damaged by floodwaters.

The Kerr County Sheriff's Office said "catastrophic" floods have resulted in "fatalities," though the agency said it would not release further information until next of kin are notified.

The sheriff's office said it is working with a local and state agencies to respond to calls and rescues. A reunification point has been set up at the Walmart at 2106 Junction Highway.

Significant flooding is also present in northern and western Kendall County, including in Comfort.

Comfort High School is being set up as a shelter for people who are displaced, according to the City of Boerne.

The Boerne Fire Department has deployed rescue teams to assist residents in the Comfort area.

Highway 27 at Cypress Creek in Comfort and FM 1350 east of Center Point will be closed by TxDOT until water recedes, according to the City of Boerne." [SAEN](https://substack.com/redirect/578e7508-7f81-4a28-bbb0-209922f927ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "Floods kill 6 in Hill Country as Guadalupe River rises, says Kerr county judge, " San Antonio Express-News' Gabriella Ybarra , Tony Plohetski and Anthony Franze - "At least six people are dead, caught in "catastrophic" flooding along the Guadalupe River that prompted evacuations in the Hill Country after heavy rains washed the region overnight. All Kerr County residents who live near the Guadalupe River have been asked to evacuate their homes and move to higher ground. All other residents are encouraged to shelter in place and avoid travel, according to the Kerr County Sheriff's Office. The National Weather Service said a flash flood emergency is ongoing in South-Central Kerr County, including the Guadalupe River. The portion of the river near Hunt had reached the second-highest level on record, the weather service said. As of 10:40 a.m. Friday, very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties. According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. As of 10:40 a.m., very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties. According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. After that, radar shows that light to moderate rainfall will continue for several hours, likely until 3 p.m. or later for parts of Hill Country. Upward of 10 inches of rain has fallen across portions of South-Central Kerr County. Another 2 to 5 inches will be possible for the region before the rain subsides later this afternoon and evening. So the flood might get worse before it gets better. County Judge Rob Kelly confirmed to Hearst Newspapers six deaths. "We can confirm but we are afraid there may be more," he said. "They are still looking." Child campers at Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls in Hunt, have all been accounted for, although rescues were conducted in the area, Kelly said. Emergency crews carried out rescues before dawn at an RV park near Howdy's Restaurant in Kerrville, which also has been damaged by floodwaters. The Kerr County Sheriff's Office said "catastrophic" floods have resulted in "fatalities," though the agency said it would not release further information until next of kin are notified. The sheriff's office said it is working with a local and state agencies to respond to calls and rescues. A reunification point has been set up at the Walmart at 2106 Junction Highway. Significant flooding is also present in northern and western Kendall County, including in Comfort. Comfort High School is being set up as a shelter for people who are displaced, according to the City of Boerne. The Boerne Fire Department has deployed rescue teams to assist residents in the Comfort area. Highway 27 at Cypress Creek in Comfort and FM 1350 east of Center Point will be closed by TxDOT until water recedes, according to the City of Boerne." * **TOP NEWS**

“**Floods kill 6 in Hill Country as Guadalupe River rises, says Kerr county judge,** ” San Antonio Express-News' **Gabriella Ybarra** , **Tony Plohetski** and **Anthony Franze** – “At least six people are dead, caught in “catastrophic” flooding along the Guadalupe River that prompted evacuations in the Hill Country after heavy rains washed the region overnight.

All Kerr County residents who live near the Guadalupe River have been asked to evacuate their homes and move to higher ground. All other residents are encouraged to shelter in place and avoid travel, according to the Kerr County Sheriff’s Office.

The National Weather Service said a flash flood emergency is ongoing in South-Central Kerr County, including the Guadalupe River. The portion of the river near Hunt had reached the second-highest level on record, the weather service said.

According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. After that, radar shows that light to moderate rainfall will continue for several hours, likely until 3 p.m. or later for parts of Hill Country.

Upward of 10 inches of rain has fallen across portions of South-Central Kerr County. Another 2 to 5 inches will be possible for the region before the rain subsides later this afternoon and evening. So the flood might get worse before it gets better.

County Judge **Rob Kelly** confirmed to Hearst Newspapers six deaths.

“We can confirm but we are afraid there may be more,” he said. “They are still looking.”

Child campers at Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls in Hunt, have all been accounted for, although rescues were conducted in the area, Kelly said. Emergency crews carried out rescues before dawn at an RV park near Howdy’s Restaurant in Kerrville, which also has been damaged by floodwaters.

The Kerr County Sheriff’s Office said “catastrophic” floods have resulted in “fatalities,” though the agency said it would not release further information until next of kin are notified.

The sheriff’s office said it is working with a local and state agencies to respond to calls and rescues. A reunification point has been set up at the Walmart at 2106 Junction Highway.

Significant flooding is also present in northern and western Kendall County, including in Comfort.

Comfort High School is being set up as a shelter for people who are displaced, according to the City of Boerne.

The Boerne Fire Department has deployed rescue teams to assist residents in the Comfort area.

Highway 27 at Cypress Creek in Comfort and FM 1350 east of Center Point will be closed by TxDOT until water recedes, according to the City of Boerne." Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Floods kill 6 in Hill Country as Guadalupe River rises, says Kerr county judge, ” San Antonio Express-News' Gabriella Ybarra , Tony Plohetski and Anthony Franze – “At least six people are dead, caught in “catastrophic” flooding along the Guadalupe River that prompted evacuations in the Hill Country after heavy rains washed the region overnight. All Kerr County residents who live near the Guadalupe River have been asked to evacuate their homes and move to higher ground. All other residents are encouraged to shelter in place and avoid travel, according to the Kerr County Sheriff’s Office. The National Weather Service said a flash flood emergency is ongoing in South-Central Kerr County, including the Guadalupe River. The portion of the river near Hunt had reached the second-highest level on record, the weather service said. » As of 10:40 a.m. Friday, very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties. According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. As of 10:40 a.m., very heavy rain continues to fall across the Texas Hill Country, particularly in Medina, Bandara, Kerr, Kendall and Gillespie counties. » According to radar, a swath of very heavy rain is moving through the most flood-affected regions, and it will remain there through at least noon Friday. After that, radar shows that light to moderate rainfall will continue for several hours, likely until 3 p.m. or later for parts of Hill Country. Upward of 10 inches of rain has fallen across portions of South-Central Kerr County. Another 2 to 5 inches will be possible for the region before the rain subsides later this afternoon and evening. So the flood might get worse before it gets better. County Judge Rob Kelly confirmed to Hearst Newspapers six deaths. “We can confirm but we are afraid there may be more,” he said. “They are still looking.” Child campers at Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls in Hunt, have all been accounted for, although rescues were conducted in the area, Kelly said. Emergency crews carried out rescues before dawn at an RV park near Howdy’s Restaurant in Kerrville, which also has been damaged by floodwaters. The Kerr County Sheriff’s Office said “catastrophic” floods have resulted in “fatalities,” though the agency said it would not release further information until next of kin are notified. The sheriff’s office said it is working with a local and state agencies to respond to calls and rescues. A reunification point has been set up at the Walmart at 2106 Junction Highway. Significant flooding is also present in northern and western Kendall County, including in Comfort. Comfort High School is being set up as a shelter for people who are displaced, according to the City of Boerne. The Boerne Fire Department has deployed rescue teams to assist residents in the Comfort area. Highway 27 at Cypress Creek in Comfort and FM 1350 east of Center Point will be closed by TxDOT until water recedes, according to the City of Boerne." name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: This July 4th, Our Fight for Freedom Continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter,
As we gather with family, friends and neighbors to celebrate the Fourth of July, I want to take a moment to reflect on what this day truly means, and why it matters now more than ever.
On July 4, 1776, pen was put to paper and independence from tyranny was declared. The Founders knew the risks. They faced overwhelming odds. But they believed in something bigger than themselves: a future where government was chosen by the people, not imposed upon them.
That spirit, a spirit of resistance, courage and the demand for representation, is the soul of American democracy. It’s also what defines us as Democrats.
Today, we face a different kind of test. Our rights are under attack, our elections are under threat and too many Americans are being left behind. The values that sparked the American Revolution, freedom, justice and equality, are not just historical ideals. They are promises we must keep fighting for.
So this July 4th holiday, let’s honor our past by stepping up in the present. Let’s organize, speak out and show up.
This isn’t just a celebration. It’s a call to carry forward the work that began in 1776.
Wishing you a safe and meaningful Independence Day.
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Donald Trump just signed one of the most devastating pieces of legislation in American history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We remember this day. We remember the lawmakers who voted for this shameful bill.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110872959/555603836/1328794144?refcode=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNjUxZWIwLTI4NTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QVu0iXT4_rH0jtOHETa-E94oyrupAzObXyhlQcAcwg=&emci=822cd183-f958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
**Donald Trump just signed one of the most devastating pieces of legislation in American history — handing billions in giveaways to oil and gas executives, slashing Medicaid, and gutting vital food assistance.** It breaks my heart that just as hurricane season begins, this law will essentially gut NOAA, the very agency that tracks extreme weather events that uproot thousands of lives each year. It breaks my heart to think of the families who will sit in emergency rooms, unable to afford care, because their Medicaid was ripped away. It breaks my heart to imagine rural hospitals shutting their doors, leaving entire communities without care. It breaks my heart to see this happen – to see the President of the United States defy the sanctity of the Oval Office and knowingly sign legislation that harms the very fabric of our country. And for what? More handouts to oil and gas CEOs? More cruelty disguised as governance? I’ve seen a lot in my lifetime. But this moment, this deliberate, inhumane choice to sacrifice people and the planet for profit, will stay with me for the rest of my days. Days like today push us to reflect, to look inward, and truly think about where we are as a nation and what we have to do to keep fighting for the kind of country that stands up for people and the planet. Because here’s what I know: **Even in our darkest moments, people come together. We organize. We resist. And we keep hope alive — because we have no other choice.** Now, we're organizing in key states around the country to stop Donald Trump’s reckless, deadly agenda from spreading further. And we’re already fighting like hell to take back the House in 2026. **Here’s what comes next:** | #1: We remember this day. We remember the lawmakers who voted for this shameful bill. And we do the work to vote them out and elect leaders who will fight for us. **I’ve always turned to protests to channel my rage into action and stand in community with my neighbors.[You can click here to commit to attending a protest near you this month.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110872960/555603837/-1944225818?refcode=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNjUxZWIwLTI4NTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QVu0iXT4_rH0jtOHETa-E94oyrupAzObXyhlQcAcwg=&emci=822cd183-f958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | **[**ATTEND A PROTEST →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110872961/555603838/74033201?refcode=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNjUxZWIwLTI4NTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QVu0iXT4_rH0jtOHETa-E94oyrupAzObXyhlQcAcwg=&emci=822cd183-f958-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)**
---
#2: My team is already identifying the most strategic races to invest in — leaders who will challenge the politics of the past and bring real, lasting change to their communities. But we can’t do this without your support. **[If we’re going to keep up this fight — for our rights, our climate, and each other — we need you with us. Can you chip in a few bucks right now to keep powering this critical work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110872962/555603839/2105508926?refcode=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNjUxZWIwLTI4NTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QVu0iXT4_rH0jtOHETa-E94oyrupAzObXyhlQcAcwg=)** | [**DONATE NOW →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110872963/555603840/2105508926?refcode=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8a651eb0-2859-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNjUxZWIwLTI4NTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9QVu0iXT4_rH0jtOHETa-E94oyrupAzObXyhlQcAcwg=)
---
Thank you for all that you do.
In solidarity,
xx Jane
