clean_body: We remember this day. We remember the lawmakers who voted for this shameful bill. | Donald Trump just signed one of the most devastating pieces of legislation in American history — handing billions in giveaways to oil and gas executives, slashing Medicaid, and gutting vital food assistance. It breaks my heart that just as hurricane season begins, this law will essentially gut NOAA, the very agency that tracks extreme weather events that uproot thousands of lives each year. It breaks my heart to think of the families who will sit in emergency rooms, unable to afford care, because their Medicaid was ripped away. It breaks my heart to imagine rural hospitals shutting their doors, leaving entire communities without care. It breaks my heart to see this happen – to see the President of the United States defy the sanctity of the Oval Office and knowingly sign legislation that harms the very fabric of our country. And for what? More handouts to oil and gas CEOs? More cruelty disguised as governance? I’ve seen a lot in my lifetime. But this moment, this deliberate, inhumane choice to sacrifice people and the planet for profit, will stay with me for the rest of my days. Days like today push us to reflect, to look inward, and truly think about where we are as a nation and what we have to do to keep fighting for the kind of country that stands up for people and the planet. Because here’s what I know: Even in our darkest moments, people come together. We organize. We resist. And we keep hope alive — because we have no other choice. Now, we're organizing in key states around the country to stop Donald Trump’s reckless, deadly agenda from spreading further. And we’re already fighting like hell to take back the House in 2026. Here’s what comes next: | #1: We remember this day. We remember the lawmakers who voted for this shameful bill. And we do the work to vote them out and elect leaders who will fight for us. I’ve always turned to protests to channel my rage into action and stand in community with my neighbors. | #2: My team is already identifying the most strategic races to invest in — leaders who will challenge the politics of the past and bring real, lasting change to their communities. But we can’t do this without your support. = | = Thank you for all that you do. In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: I wanted to inform you that your House GOP Membership is up for renewal. &2nbsp; | | | | Peter, I wouldn't be coming to you like this if it wasn't important. My team just informed me that, as of today, your House GOP Membership has YET to be renewed. This is no cause for alarm - "but I’m going to ask you to step up and renew your Membership right away! >>" | | | "RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP" | | I would hate to lose a member of our team like you, Peter. I know how hard you worked to elect Republicans and send Democrats packing last year, and we need that same grit and determination this year. "So without further ado, will you please renew your House GOP Membership for 2025 immediately?" | | | "RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP" I hope to see your name atop our revised Membership roster soon. Sincerely, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions . |

We can't emphasize enough that this legislation will be **_devastating_** for millions of Americans.

Republicans have made their priorities crystal clear: strip away health care, housing support, and child care funding from the people who need it most — just to hand massive tax cuts to their billionaire donors.

This is not governance. It's a wholesale sellout of the American people. **🛑 FIGHT BACK RIGHT NOW 🛑**
We're laser-focused on flipping the House in 2026 and ending this GOP cruelty. That's why we've _already_ endorsed 13 Democratic pro-choice House candidates so far this cycle.

This bill is cruel by design. It slashes funding for Medicaid, undercuts access to reproductive health care, and dismantles vital safety net programs — all while giving the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations a major windfall.

Make no mistake: _If you're not rich, this bill will make your life harder_. Republicans know that, and they passed it anyway.

They've proven, once again, that they cannot be trusted with our lawmaking institutions. They don't care about the daily lives and struggles of their constituents — only about protecting their own power and enriching their allies.

That's why EMILYs List is committed to taking back power **as soon as possible** , starting with the House in 2026. We've already endorsed 13 women running to flip Republican-held seats and defend vulnerable blue districts. But they can't win without our support.

We don't have billionaires bankrolling us. What we have is this grassroots community — and right now, we need you.

clean_body: Now, we fight back. | = BREAKING: Trump's shamelessly mistitled "Big Beautiful Bill" was just signed into law. We can't emphasize enough that this legislation will be devastating for millions of Americans. Republicans have made their priorities crystal clear: strip away health care, housing support, and child care funding from the people who need it most — just to hand massive tax cuts to their billionaire donors. This is not governance. It's a wholesale sellout of the American people. 🛑 FIGHT BACK RIGHT NOW 🛑 We're laser-focused on flipping the House in 2026 and ending this GOP cruelty. That's why we've already endorsed 13 Democratic pro-choice House candidates so far this cycle. Help power their campaigns: | = This bill is cruel by design. It slashes funding for Medicaid, undercuts access to reproductive health care, and dismantles vital safety net programs — all while giving the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations a major windfall. Make no mistake: If you're not rich, this bill will make your life harder. Republicans know that, and they passed it anyway. They've proven, once again, that they cannot be trusted with our lawmaking institutions. They don't care about the daily lives and struggles of their constituents — only about protecting their own power and enriching their allies. That's why EMILYs List is committed to taking back power as soon as possible , starting with the House in 2026. We've already endorsed 13 women running to flip Republican-held seats and defend vulnerable blue districts. But they can't win without our support. We don't have billionaires bankrolling us. What we have is this grassroots community — and right now, we need you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = More soon, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List.
